body: Melissa and her team are not only amazing photographers and videographers, they are amazing people. Melissa and her team went above and beyond for us and made sure our day was everything we imagined. The pictures are stunning and the video is beautiful. As someone who does not like to be in front of the camera, she made me feel beyond confident. My guests raved about her the entire night! I cannot say enough positive things about Melissa Lewis Photography! We love her and her team and are so thankful to have met friends for life. If you are looking for the best wedding photographer and videographer, look no further.
author: Colton Butler

body: One of my concerns with wedding planning was finding a photographer that didn't just take a picture but created a memory- I personally feel many of the photos you'll see online feel cold, and impersonal but Melissa was everything I wished for and MORE in a wedding photographer! I was lucky to find her at the Wedding Expo in MA and just fell in love with her style. Melissa brings such a real talent and a love to her work. From working with me as we watched the weather on my engagement photoshoot day, to her thorough questionnaires and meetings- I could not have asked for a better person to work with. Her team of photographers are equally as talented and easy to work with. My husband had an idea for a some candid shots during our photoshoot and Elise just went along with it! It was so good. Out of all of my friends that got married last year, I will say my wedding photos were by far the best because of Melissa and her eye for such detail.
author: Jasmine Peters

body: We first met Melissa at a wedding expo. Her bubbly personality and friendliness attracted us to her! We were amazed with her display of photographs showcasing her work. She is amazing at communicating and has helped so much in the wedding process. When my husband and I received our wedding photos and videos, we were truly in tears and were beyond happy. Melissa and her team captured our wedding day perfectly and went above and beyond what we were hoping for. Her photos captured our emotions from our special day and the videos are a keep sake we will hold near and dear to our hearts forever. Melissa provided us with a highlight film and documentary film that will allow us to relive our wedding day for years to come! On the day of our wedding, Melissa and her team were so friendly. My husband and I could tell that her team really cared about making us feel special. We are obsessed with our photos and videos!! I would highly recommend Melissa Lewis Photography for your special day!!!
author: Alyssa Ortiz

body: Melissa and her team are fabulous! She was probably one of the best vendors for my wedding in terms of communication and reliability. She made me feel so comfortable during the first meeting for the engagement photo shoot and then the wedding day was just perfect. She completely listened to me throughout the entire process and followed through with everything. I feel like this was the best decision. Worth every penny! It's just a bonus that her personality is so fun and awesome as well. Thank You Melissa!!!
author: Ashley Morris

body:
Melinda was absolutely perfect and a pleasure to work with on our wedding invites. She went above and beyond with the designs, colors and even included a watercolor insert for our invites that made our Maine wedding invitations perfect.

Melinda incorporated classic Maine vibes, will still producing a very elegant and beautiful wedding invite. She made the invites feel very unique to us and our family & friends could not stop raving about them once they received the invites.

10/10 would absolutely recommend Melinda/Amour Daydream studio to anyone!
author: Andrew Babbidge

body: A truly lovely experience! Melinda helped bring our visions to life and created beautiful and one of a kind invites and day of stationary for our wedding. She was easy to work with and flexible when needed! She even sent us multiple options via mail so we could touch and feel some of the paper options in person. I would highly recommend Amour Daydream Studio!
author: Brittany Dion

body: Melinda was great to work with throughout the process of designing our save the dates and wedding invitations! She’s always responsive via email if we had questions and happy to make herself available for a video or phone call if warranted. She’s very patient, knowledgeable and able to offer recommendations/suggestions if you're just not sure. I would recommend her to anyone who is looking for truly unique and customized stationery that's very polished and professional.
author: Lauren McGuiggan

body: I've reached out to Amour Daydream Studio on several occasions for both big and small needed (greeting cards, baby shower/birthday/wedding invites) - all custom designs! Melinda was great to work with. She took what little I gave her and turned it into amazing invites. She was flexible and very quick to respond. Especially when I had a last minute change. For our wedding invites she went above and beyond. The quality was amazing and they were visually stunning. Definitely will use Amour again ❤
author: Courtney Ramos

body:
I'm so overdue in writing this review for Melinda and it is partly because I'm not sure any written review can summarize how AMAZING she is to work with. She helped us design a semi-custom wedding invitation suite, rehearsal dinner invites, day of stationary, and our thank you cards. Melinda is beyond talented and was able to bring our vision to life even when I gave her limited information or a poorly worded explanation. Working with Melinda was my favorite part of wedding planning and I literally cried happy tears every time a package arrived.  Every piece that she designed for us was beautiful with such attention to detail. You could tell how passionate Melinda is about her work and her clients throughout the entire design process, from the consultation, proofing, printing, and assembling process. Melinda was flexible when I needed to change the quantities or had an alternative idea for day of stationary.

Melinda is responsive, kind, and genuinely cares about her clients. Some examples include how she helped me get in contact with one of my vendors who was unresponsive and the thoughtful Christmas gift that was delivered to our house.

Book Melinda and you will not be disappointed. I want to work with her on EVERY stationary need in the future.
author: Heather Goodwin

body:
Our wedding was absolutely magical in every way that we could have wanted, and Shannon was a major reason it went that well. We’re two people who had never envisioned our future wedding and were not looking forward to planning one, but we ended up with very specific ideas about what we wanted, some of which were pretty unconventional. Shannon never said no to any of our crazy ideas, and encouraged us to have the wedding that was right for us. She worked with us to refine our vision into a practical event design, and then executed it all and made it look effortless and beautiful. She understood the vibe we were after and got both the decor and the flow of the weekend exactly how we had imagined it. Day-of, Shannon was on top of everything and really allowed us, and our friends and family, to relax and fully participate stress-free. We absolutely could not have done it without her, and we feel like we made a friend along the way! Ask her about the wedding with the circus act, we’re sure it’ll be a good story!

Shannon, thank you for everything, and know that we appreciate your help and hard work more than we can fit into words!
author: Dan Fain and Ariella Gladstein

body:
Words cannot express the gratitude and love we have for Shannon and her team at SES Events! Not only is Shannon an incredible, experienced, and detailed wedding planner, she is also a true friend and wonderful human being! We are so lucky to have worked with Shannon all of the days leading up to our wedding and the entire wedding weekend. Shannon took care of every single detail, worked seamlessly with our vendors and brought our vision to life. Shannon truly goes above and beyond for her clients, always available for a call, zoom or email catch up, with so much care in everything she does. I already miss working with Shannon, so happy to call her a friend for life! XO
Photos by: Katherine Marchand Weddings
author: Liz Walker

body: Hiring Shannon as our wedding planner was an awesome decision! She was extremely professional, well organized, and very responsive to any and all of our questions. She has a wealth of knowledge when it comes to all things wedding related, and took the time to really understand our vision and help bring it to life. She was incredibly helpful when it came to selecting vendors, coordinating different meetings and site visits, and managing all wedding weekend details. On our wedding day, Shannon and her team made sure everything ran as expected. It was perfect! We truly don't know how we would have been able to pull off the wedding of our dreams without Shannon!
author: Morgan Vesce

body:
Shannon was simply the best. She was the second best decision we made, after choosing to get married!

She adds value every step of the way. Organization and clear communication throughout the entire process. She knows all the best vendors and will help guide your decision making.

We loved all the extra effort she put in for us and would use her again in a heartbeat
author: matthew storti

body: As our day-of coordinator, Shannon was the glue that held our wedding together! From our first consultation with her right up until our big day, she brought structure and experience that allowed us to feel prepared to enjoy every moment of our wedding. During our first meeting, we told Shannon that we had two main goals: 1. We wanted all of the different parts of our day to feel manageable so that we could be fully "present" for the entirety of our wedding, and 2. We wanted to build in time to *actually* eat our meals and take in the experience that we worked so hard for. Shannon really listened and she delivered on all of these goals and so much more. Hiring Shannon was absolutely the best decision we made for our wedding day! We will forever recommend her to any engaged couple. We truly can't express enough how much you need to have Shannon involved in your wedding - whether it be for full wedding planning, or as a day of coordinator (like we did)! Shannon makes it her mission to make sure you ENJOY your wedding.
author: Carolyn

body: We hired Green Valley Floral Design to do our wedding and they did a fantastic job! We met with Allison over zoom and she helped make our vision come to life. She helped us figure out the style we wanted and the color scheme. We ordered bouquets, centerpieces, and statement aisle pieces. The pricing was completely reasonable and the quality the day of was amazing. Everything turned out perfect. The day of the wedding Allison and her team showed up on time, set everything up beautifully, and were super professional. We enjoyed working with them and highly recommend them!
author: Chloe Dakers

body: Allison was amazing, better than I could’ve hoped for. I had went through three different florists before finding Allison at Garden Gate and she is by far the best choice! I showed her pictures of what I wanted and she immediately knew what to do and executed it perfectly on the wedding day. She was incredibly accommodating to my needs and even allowed me to use my own vases and add a piece of my wedding dress to my bouquet. On the wedding day she was on time and prompt, and decorated the space exactly how I wanted it based on the pictures I showed her. Thank you so much!
author: Sabrina Rogers

body:
If I could give more than 5 stars I would!!  ALLISON you are a genius!  Everything that you did for my daughter's wedding was above and beyond our expectations!  The floral arrangements were gorgeous and we have received a lot of compliments on the flowers! You incorporated all of the fairy lights beautifully so that they looked like a part of the arrangements and not just laid on top.

You are such a wonderful person. You are sweet, helpful, and fun to work with. You were patient with our many changes and willing to meet with us numerous times till we knew exactly what we wanted.

Thank you very much for making the wedding day so gorgeous and special. We are grateful!
author: Laurie Thies

body: Allison from Garden Gate did my wedding flowers and they were absolutely beautiful! From the bouquet to the arbor and everything in between, these flowers were everything I wanted and more. She is so sweet, personable, easy to work with and has great attention to detail. She took my inspiration and made it even better. So happy I chose Garden Gate to make my wedding day so beautiful!
author: Kelly Thies

body: Couples - take note… Garden Gate Florist is THE BEST. Allison was the florist for clients of mine at Stonehurst earlier this year (I’m a photographer) and the floral arrangements she created were STUNNING. Between the bridal bouquet, which I’ll post below, the ceremony pieces, and drumroll please… the extra flowers and foliage that she provided for the flat lays, each part of the day that she touched with her green thumb was 10/10. I strongly recommend Garden Gate Florist!
author: Catherine Dunlavey

body: An absolute must have!!!   Birdie Booth is by far the best addition to every party, wedding, school event, and community function large or small!!! The booth added an incredible personalized energy to our outdoor party.  It allowed guests to have fun and be creative, and every guest walked away with a keepsake photo to cherish the memory!  A brilliant way to capture all the laughs and smiles of the day and provide a party favor!!   The Birdie team was really great to work with!   Looking forward to our next event and making more creative memories in the Birdie Booth!
author: Chris W

body: The Birdie Booth is adorable-perfect little photo camper experience! Courtney & team were professional & polite-looking forward to working with them again. Would definitely recommend their service.
author: Cassidie Corwin

body:
Ariana and her team were one of the highlights of our wedding! Having them play during our ceremony and cocktail hour brought a touch of class and an elegance that everyone enjoyed. Our guests were very impressed. They did a fabulous job playing each song, very skilled artists. Not only were they great musicians, they were super friendly, very professional, and organized.

Ariana was very helpful during the planning process with questionnaires/forms, meetings, etc. There’s a plethora of music to choose from, a large array from different genres and eras. She and her team make sure everything goes smoothly! Highly recommend Ariana strings llc for weddings and events.
author: Joshua Levesque

body: * Ariana and her team were an absolute joy to work with. Communication was so clear and well handled. As the big day approached I felt confident she understood what we were looking for and how her team would execute it and boy did they deliver. Ariana was even able to take a special request from me, the bride, to create a perfect mashup song to walk down the aisle to, and surprise my now husband! Our guests had nothing but amazing things to say about them as they played during cocktail hour, and were so surprised with all the fun songs they are able to play. This really added something special and unique to our wedding day and I couldn’t imagine not having it now that we did! Thank you Ariana & team!!!
author: morgan preiss

body: Ariana was absolutely incredible at our wedding! Her violin performance brought so much elegance and beauty to our special day. Every piece she played was flawless and moving, and she was professional, kind, and easy to work with. We couldn’t have been happier with her performance—highly recommend!
author: Bryan Purificato

body: Ariana Strings LLC was an absolute pleasure to work with for our wedding. From the very first interaction, they were open, responsive, and incredibly kind. The musicians were wonderful, providing beautiful and perfect music for our ceremony and cocktail hour. They were so easy to work with, allowing us to pick the perfect music that set the tone for our special day. Ariana Strings' amazing organization and guidance ensured everything flowed seamlessly. We couldn't have asked for a better musical experience - they truly helped make our wedding day unforgettable.
author: Victoria Bairos

body: When my husband and I were planning our wedding we knew we wanted to incorporate live music. Ariana Strings was highly recommended by our wedding planner and for a good reason. The moment we heard the demos we knew we needed to book with them. They created a fairytale atmosphere and walking down the aisle to their music honestly gave me goose bumps. They also played during our cocktail hour and our guests were so impressed with all the modern songs they were able to play on the strings. Now my husband and I are so obsessed that we are wishing we another event just so we can work with them again. What an amazingly talented and sweet group of people. If you want to take your wedding to the next level then book ASAP….what are you waiting for?!!?
author: Jessica Mooney

body: Lyndsey is not only the sweetest, most genuine person you’ll ever meet, but she is extremely talented and professional as well! You can just feel her passion for making brides look beautiful on their big day. She took the time to consult with me and did a dry run of my hairstyle well before my wedding. On my wedding day, I actually threw a curveball last minute and changed my hairstyle from one side braid to two, she rolled with the punches and DELIVERED! She did a beautiful job, worked quickly to do my whole bridal party’s hair, and was such a pleasure to have around as we were all getting ready. She is the best, don’t think a moment longer, book her now!
author: Courtney Crowley

body: Where to start? Well firstly, I could not recommend Esteban more highly as a person, and photographer, to capture any and all moments of your life. We hired Esteban to capture our June 2023 wedding and we could not be happier, both with our experience and the results. Not only was he an absolute pleasure to work with from the moment we met him, but he also captured our wedding so perfectly. His creativity, compassion and the thought he puts into the day is second to none, providing a seamless experience for all involved. At no point during the process or the day, did it ever feel like it was all about him and his team, they effortlessly blended into the background ensuring a smooth experience for all and they still managed to capture all the moments. There was even a shot we had mentioned briefly on our first call we would like him to capture, and we forgot about it but he reminded us on the day which we were so grateful for. I'd also like to praise his second photographer who was also a delight to work with capturing all the moments with the same great quality. Esteban went above and beyond for us with his content, service and turnaround time of the photos. If you're looking for a photographer to capture any day, moment, event, look no further, you will not be disappointed!
author: Matthew Brewer

body:
I second another reviewer here-- Esteban is a true artist. When we received our wedding photos back, we were truly stunned.
His work struck the perfect balance between authentic shots of the day, and otherworldly portraiture and landscape shots that remind me of an Annie Leibovitz shoot in Vogue.
We had a classic old mansion wedding on a stormy day in March, and Esteban and his assistant Nicole created breathtaking work despite the outside being virtually unusable. He took advantage of the weather, capturing humorous moments of us trying to travel in the rain as well as moody shots indoors. Our portrait session also overlapped the venue being set up, which you could never tell. We went into the day with virtually no specific requests, and we were happy that they both just dove in and found key moments and details to capture. We are so happy that our wedding was captured in such an authentic and artful way.
author: Katie Melland Proctor

body: Esteban has been amazing to work with. He has joined our family on our journey from capturing our engagement and wedding to now capturing our beautiful family moments. He is professional and so down to earth, our photo shoots are always a lot of fun. I would highly recommend Esteban for your photography needs!
author: Ashley Schaefer

body: Esteban is EXTREMELY talented, and we are beyond thrilled with our wedding photos. He is very professional and easy to communicate with. We had a great experience from booking, our wedding day, and with receiving our gallery. His work is incredibly stunning, and he did such a great job capturing the vibe of our day. It is obvious in all aspects that he knows what he is doing. He listened to what was important to us and created beautiful art from that. I 1000% recommend him.
author: Kailyn Haynes

body: Esteban is a true artist. My daughter's wedding could not have been more perfectly preserved. He crafted elegant, unique vignettes that were absolutely beautiful. The vintage mood was captured flawlessly. Candid pictures were fun and included virtually all of the guests and events. He and his assistant were professional at all times, and completely unobtrusive. As you can imagine, my daughter's wedding could not have been more important to me. I wouldn't change one thing about Esteban's portrayal of our special event. Esteban is extraordinary, exceptional and uniquely artistic.
author: Cynthia Dunne

body: Mandy is the sweetest and was a pleasure to work with. We very much appreciated her attention to detail and her coaching abilities during both engagement and wedding sessions. Her creative eye helped capture all the right moments and her editing style brought the photos to life. All the photos turned out amazing and we could not have asked for a better photographer to share our special moments with. She really goes an extra mile to make sure you feel comfortable and get the best photos!
author: Veronika Lev

body:
Mandy made the process of working together very easy and it felt like a true collaboration. She was as invested as we were .
Every communication reminded us that she cared. She was also a great team player, collaborating extensively with our videographer to bring our wedding dreams to life’.  Her eye for detail is astounding, and beyond her technical expertise, she is a joy to work with.We  had no idea our small, low-key wedding could look so incredibly beautiful.We will treasure these photos forever. Thank you so much Mandy!!!!
author: Amandeep Kaur Sidhu

body:
Mandy was the perfect photographer for our wedding in Mexico! She was not only professional and detailed but also so much fun to work with. Having previously shot at our resort, we knew we were in great hands. She took the time to get to know our group, which really added a personal touch to the experience. Her photography skills are out of this world—her aesthetic is incredible, and she has such a great eye for capturing every moment perfectly.

Mandy’s editing skills are also outstanding. She got some sneak peek photos to us super quickly, which only made us more excited to see the rest. Now that we’ve received the full set, we’re absolutely blown away by how much she captured and how amazing every shot looks. It might sound silly, but my husband and I have never liked so many photos of ourselves before! I’ve been recommending her to everyone I know because her work is truly that wonderful. Highly recommend Mandy for any event!
author: Stefanie Isabella

body: The absolute best decision we made for our wedding was hiring Mandy. She was professional from start to finish. We had our destination wedding in Costa Mujeres, Mexico and all of our guests assumed she was a friend of ours because she got along so well with everyone. No one could believe we had only just met in Mexico. Her pictures were stunning. She even captured our bachelor and bachelorette parties.  We could not be happier with our photos and would highly recommend Mandy over and over again.
author: Dr. Meighan Valero

body: Absolutely love and recommend Mandy! She did our engagement shoot in 2020, and our wedding in 2022 (after being postponed due to COVID restrictions). We love all our photos so much! She is fun and super easy to work with. She also helps with guiding you through poses. The engagement shoot definitely helped so we were more comfortable in front of the camera when it came to the wedding. We had a long full day of wedding festivities; from getting ready, the church, lunch, portraits, tea ceremony, & reception -- and I don't know how she did it! She captured it all with a great turn around time too! We will definitely use her again to capture future milestones. 😊
author: Angelica

body: Kaydee is literally THE BEST!!! She's super professional, kind, clean and very talented at doing hair. I have pretty curly/thick hair and she did a PHENOMENAL job. Two of my bridesmaids are actually planning to hire her for their wedding next year!
author: Amy Pierce

body: Kaydee and her team did an amazing job, not only with their hair/makeup service but in making sure we were all comfortable and relaxed the morning of the wedding. My trial was amazing and the only thing I needed to adjust was adding more volume to my hair and the morning of, Kaydee delivered. My hair was perfect, secure and did not fall even during our pre-ceremony photos. My makeup was more than beautiful and did not even need to be touched up at any point throughout the night! I was amazed. I have never felt more beautiful, thank you Kaydee!!
author: Megan Scrivani

body: Kaydee made our experience amazing! I was honored to be a model for Kaydee. From start to finish I felt like a bride! Her salon is inviting and has a modern touch to it that makes you feel comfortable and welcomed. She took time and learned all about my skin to make sure her final product was perfect; it was! I highly recommend Kaydee for bridal makeup & hair!
author: Shy Jackson

body: While shopping for hair and makeup services for my wedding, I really wanted to be confident in whoever I chose. From when I first reached out to Kaydee to inquire about packages, I was immediately impressed with the details she provided, and I could tell I could trust her to make me look perfect on wedding day - and she did! She has a level of experience that allowed me to sit back on wedding day and not worry about the details. She was already familiar with the hotel where we got ready, and she set the schedule in advance for everyone who was having their hair and makeup done. I did a makeup trial with Holly, and she was able to perfectly take my feedback from the trial and I absolutely loved how it turned out on wedding day. Aside from how beautiful all of our hair and makeup looked, Kaydee was communicative and responsive, and she and Holly were just a great presence to have in the room that day.
author: Lauren Granata Carollo

body: Kaydee and her team were my hair and makeup professionals on 10/5/2024 in Eastern CT and they were absolutely amazing. Kaydee was a pleasure to work with before and during the wedding. She responded quickly to any questions and changes I had during the planning phase and was very helpful. On the wedding day she and her team were timely and well prepared. Everything went to plan and on schedule. All of the ladies were very happy with both hair and makeup. We did not have a single issue or complaint. I would definitely recommend Kaydee and her team for your wedding!
author: darbey

body:
Having Cait as our wedding photographer was one of the BEST decisions we made! From our very first conversation, it was clear our visions collided, as we both have such similar tastes—this made the whole experience feel so effortless and perfectly aligned. She has a unique gift for capturing the beauty, emotion, and little moments that made our day so special. From the first look to the last dance, Cait’s warmth, professionalism, and creativity put us at ease and allowed us to simply enjoy each moment.

The photos are STUNNING—each one tells a story and brings us right back to that magical day. Cait was not only a joy to work with but also truly invested in making sure our vision came to life in every shot. We couldn’t have asked for a more talented photographer to capture our wedding. WE HAD THE BEST TIME WITH YOU THAT DAY! Thank you, Cait, for creating memories we will cherish forever!
author: Sabrina Rocha

body:
I first met Cait Fletcher at a styled shoot for Connecticut Bride Magazine, and I was absolutely floored when I saw how she captured our violin and guitar duet. Her talent is beyond words—she has this innate ability to create and capture the true feeling of the moment in a way that’s both artistic and authentic.

Since then, I’ve had the privilege of working with Cait at many weddings, and she is a true professional in every sense. She’s collaborative, takes the time to deeply understand her clients' vision, and consistently goes above and beyond their wildest dreams. Viewing her galleries and working alongside her is always such a pleasure!

Cait is a highly decorated photographer—her work has been featured in Vogue and graced the covers of countless bridal magazines—yet she remains totally down-to-earth and she's a refreshingly honest creative. She’s an absolute gem, and I can’t recommend her highly enough!
author: Ariana Strings

body:
Hiring Cait for our wedding was one of the best decisions that we made. We are in love with our photos.

One of the reasons I chose her is that I wanted more than just photos of people smiling. It feels like each one of her photos has a story, a real-life moment that you are transported to. I probably looked at my photos every day for a month after.

Our (non local!) friend was so impressed with our wedding photos that booked Cait for her event.

She is so professional, organized, and yet calming. She will send you a long questionnaire to get organized before the day. She talked to me for a long time to find out what was important to me (in my case, candids of my friends and family) and made sure that she got a lot of those types of photos beyond the portraits. She has a rapid-fire turnaround and is generous with her sneak peaks.

I can also tell that she is “in” the event and loves her work. I saw her crying at several points during our wedding. She must have seen a hundred weddings, but she still arrives with her heart bare.

I will admit that her price point was a reach for us. She is expensive, but not overpriced. I must have looked at and rejected a dozen other photographers before I called Cait up and booked her. It is rare that quality increases **linearly** with price, but her photos are above and beyond anyone else's I could find and it was worth it for our  once and a lifetime event. So worth it - I can't express how lovely our photos are. I will be a walking advertisement for her, and she will be my first choice for other milestone events.
author: Loralee & Michael W

body: Cait was amazing. Easy to book with and super well priced! I shared my Pinterest board and she came prepared. Neither my fiance nor I had ever had photos taken and we werent sure what to do but she walked us through it all. I can't praise her enough, the photos turned out STUNNING and we have gotten so many compliments. I can't wait to work with her again in the future.
author: Elizabeth Rachel

body:
Working with Cait Fletcher was hands down one of the best decisions we made for our wedding. From the very beginning, Cait took the time to understand our vision and truly brought it to life in ways we couldn’t have imagined. She went above and beyond in every aspect—capturing not just the big moments but all the candid, emotional details that made our day so special.

Her professionalism and passion shine through in her work, and it’s clear she genuinely cares about her clients. Cait’s ability to make us feel comfortable and natural in front of the camera was unmatched, and she has such an incredible eye for detail.

The final photos exceeded all our expectations—they’re stunning, heartfelt, and perfectly encapsulate our love story. We’ll treasure these memories forever, thanks to Cait’s talent. If you’re looking for a photographer who will go the extra mile to make your day unforgettable, Cait Fletcher is the one!
author: Bryananthony77

body: Margarita has taken photos for our business several times. We typically need project photos for promotional use, our website, and updates headshots. She is personable, always makes us feel relaxed during headshots, and is always willing to chat about the exact shots we want so no time is wasted on unneeded photos. We love working with Margarita and will continue to work with her on future projects.
author: Tiffanni Reidy

body: Margarita has been my business photographer for three years. We are proud and pleased to offer this review. Margarita knows how to work a space and an object to be viewed at its highest potential. Our website and our shop signage are beautiful thanks to Margarita's work. She's always friendly, communicative, and goes above and beyond for her clients. I would also call her extremely easy to work with. I'm adding a sampling of the product photography work Margarita has done for us over the past few years.
author: STROB Collective

body: just got my photos back and they are ahhmazzing!!! I'm gonna cry!!!  So freaking good!! Margarita was so professional and walked me through everything on how she would break down the day. We hired two photographers ( a must imo) to capture our memories. I can't say enough on how beautiful our photos turned out.  We did all the poses i wanted and they were able to get "in the moment" pictures too. What a special night!! Thank you Margarita!!
author: Sarra Lewis

body: Margarita is phenomenal, and her work is absolutely stunning! I know Margarita from college, and watching her work grow and how thorough she is, I knew I wanted her to photograph my wedding. Walking around downtown Pittsburgh, while she photographed my husband and I, was so much fun, and I love her creativity! I highly recommend her, and can't say enough good things about her!
author: Christy Filkins

body:
Margarita is absolutely incredible! My husband and I met Margarita back in February in a coffee shop (after we read glowing recommendations) to meet and discuss our upcoming engagement session. We were unsure of where we wanted our session, and asked Margarita for some of her recommendations. She found the most beautiful farm, and carried out more than we had ever expected. Our engagement photos were not only beautiful, but we had such a great time during the shoot. She was also great with our pup! A month after our engagement session, the pandemic hit, and our wedding plans were turned upside down. Margarita was there every step of the way, her flexibility was so appreciated! Through this difficult time, her support and positivity was just what we needed. As we struggled trying to replan a wedding in a month, Margarita offered to create a timeline of our day, which was so appreciated, taking something off our plate. She quickly responded to all emails with thorough answers and valuable support. On our wedding day, Margarita captured the most beautiful moments.. she was so professional, kept us on schedule, and made sure she shot everything we had asked for… and much more! My husband and I could not be more thankful and happy with her services. Her turn around time for the photos were so quick, with each picture being more incredible than the last. Our friends and family were in awe of her creative vision. If you are looking for beautiful photography, an incredible person to work with, and an overall amazing experience, Margarita is definitely the one to call. We will definitely be using Margarita for all of our “future” big moments.

Fast forward 5 years… Margarita will be taking pictures for our daughters “one year old” photos!!
author: Stephanie Shilan

body: Sam is an AMAZING photographer!!! He took the time to get to know us before our wedding, which made us feel so comfortable in front of the camera (my husband and I are usually quite camera shy). The photos are simply stunning, and his ability to capture more candid moments is unreal. Will definitely use Sam again to capture future life events!
author: Mac Tonascia

body:
My organization has had the privilege to hire Creation4Use on multiple occasions, and time and time again we return. Sam comes complete with some incredible qualities we just can’t do without.

His eye is incredibly sharp, always capturing the moments that were most important, from it being a crowd of people hugging with joy to simple, relaxed portraits to subtle, unconscious expressions of love that would have been easily missed if you blink, but Sam seems to never miss that shot.

His guidance is always top notch. He lead us to several excellent decisions with both photo and video needs. He is also generous with his time and always goes the extra mile with professionalism and knowledge.

Our testimony is that we just keep hiring him for every photo and video project and will continue to do so for a long time to come.
author: Liv MacMillan

body: Samuel is amazing! We have him our vision and he turned it into a reality. He answered all of our questions and met us at our venue a month before our event to sort out the details. If you are looking for capture perfection, Samuel is your photographer!
author: Carlina Smith

body: This awesome guy KILLED our wedding photos! He created forever memories for us to tangibly have on our special day, if you are even remotely thinking about choosing him ... DO IT! You will not regret having one of the best upcoming photographers around shoot your special day!
author: Thomas Lee

body: Friendly, inspired, knowledgeable, and committed to offering the BEST photography experience. From the shots to the editing, simply one of the best photographers I know and have worked with.
author: Eliezer Wagner

body: Where do I even start?! From the very beginning of us working with Kelsey she was very professional and accommodating. Not only is she an amazing photographer, she’s an even sweeter person. The day before the wedding for our rehearsal dinner, she came and took photos, she was so great and really was just a great fit for the numerous personalities. For THE BIG DAY, Kelsey was the calming presence I needed. Whenever she picked up on me becoming overwhelmed she was got me back to a place of peace. She took charge in such a graceful way. At the end of this experience with Kelsey and her husband I consider them family and people I will always have a special place in my heart. My wedding day wouldn’t have been the same without her there. This will absolutely not be the last time we work with Kelsey. So Kelsey, thank you for being an amazing photographer but most importantly thank you for being such a beautiful person with an even more beautiful soul and presence.
author: Nikki Blake

body:
Working with Kelsey for our engagement photos was an absolute delight! Despite the rainy weather, Kelsey's positive energy and expertise turned the day around for us. Not only did she manage to capture such beautiful shots when the sun broke through the clouds, but she also made the entire experience incredibly enjoyable.

We couldn't be happier with the results and are grateful for Kelsey's talent and professionalism. She turned what could have been a gloomy day into a memorable and magical experience. We highly recommend Kelsey to anyone seeking a photographer who not only captures those special moments, but also brings warmth and positivity to every shoot. Thank you, Kelsey, for being the sunshine to our rainy day!
author: Camille S

body: We chose Kelsey to capture our wedding day, and we are so glad we did. Kelsey was so professional and knew what to do from the moment she got to my house until the night was wrapping up. She came prepared with everything and then some. Our engagement and wedding photos genuinely capture the love we all felt that day, and we are so lucky to have these photographs to look back on for the rest of our lives. From getting to my house early to set up and photograph the details and rings, to capturing all the private and big moments during our ceremony, to the best candid pictures of us smiling and laughing with our closest friends and family at our reception, Kelsey truly delivered the most magical wedding album. We have so many pictures of every moment of our special day. I cannot recommend Kelsey enough. She is a calming presence, especially when the day can be so hectic and emotional! Kelsey, we truly cannot say how grateful we are.
author: Sam Hoyt

body: Kelsey was absolutely amazing to work with. I am still in awe at even just the sneak peek of of wedding photos I have from our wedding just recently and looking forward to seeing the remaining. Connecting with Kelsey and making sure we were a good match for the type of photos we were seeking was just the start of the amazing process. We did our engagement photos also with her and her support and guidance along the way was unmatched. She truly understands the many concerns and questions and she was so quick to ease the stress and panic that one might have over probably the silliest of things that seem so major to the bride in the moment. I felt so guided to make sure everything I dreamed of came true. I am so glad and thankful we worked with Kelsey!
author: Kirsten Genthner

body: My husband and I hired Kelsey as our wedding photographer. I absolutely love Kelsey. From the moment I saw her portfolio, I knew I wanted her to capture the best day of my husband and I's life. She's such a sweetheart and a calming presence on a day that can be so chaotic. She did amazing with our engagement photos and we just got our sneak peeks from our wedding and I was screaming in the middle of a Sephora because I was so blown away with how amazing the photos turned out. Kelsey also helped create a timeline for our wedding day, helped keep us on time, kept offering help with all the wedding planning process, and she kept the day running so smoothly. Everyone at my wedding absolutely loved her, my bridal party couldn't stop talking about how amazing she was at the wedding and they're still absolutely blown away by the sneak peek pictures! Kelsey will forever be our photographer for every event and important moment in my husband and I's life!! 5/5 stars!! More like 10/5 stars if that were possible 😂
author: Heather Broderick

body: Bridget went above and beyond for our wedding! She is truly a fantastic and talented individual and also the best personality to work with. We really enjoyed working with her and cannot wait to cherish the special memories she beautifully captured on our wedding day. Thank you so much, Bridget!
author: Alexa LaBaw

body: Bridget was a joy to work with for our engagement shoot and wedding photos - we can't recommend her enough! She took the time to get to know us and the important details of our wedding, managed to corral the many different combinations of family members that we needed for each shot, and pulled us out of our shells so that we felt comfortable and had a lot of fun. The wedding day itself flew by in a blur and we feel so lucky to have Bridget's beautiful photos that capture our special day so well.
author: Annie Streetman

body: Bridget is such a talented photographer!  She was everywhere during my daughter's wedding weekend - beach volleyball at 8 am, bridal party hair and makeup, getting ready, first look and then on to the ceremony, and receptioon.  Throughout her long day she was smiling, encouraging and snapping photo after photo!  Candids, structured, color and black and white - she got it all and they are all gorgeous!  Can't say enough good things about her!
author: Sharon Kinney

body: Bridget was excellent. Not only did she take great pictures, but she helped facilitate logistics for each part of the day and made the ceremony flow smoothly. Bridget’s attention to detail and hustle is exactly what you want in a wedding photographer.
author: Lindsay Hayden

body: Hiring Bridget was a no-brainer. She is communicative, easy to work with and brings such an incredible energy. I was worried the whole day would feel like a photoshoot but she made it so easy and fun, while making sure I had all the photos we'd want. Guests asked me afterwards "how was your photographer everywhere?" She really captured every moment and I am over the moon with the results. She's seriously the best!!
author: Brooke Kinney

body: Kyle filmed our wedding on September 14, 2024, and we couldn’t be happier with the experience! From the very beginning, he was incredibly easy to work with and maintained excellent communication throughout the entire process. On the wedding day, he went above and beyond by showing us some of the shots he had already captured, and they all looked amazing! It got us so excited to see the finished product. His attention to detail was outstanding, and he truly captured the essence of our special day. We were honored to have him as part of such an important moment in our lives. If you’re looking for a professional, talented, and thoughtful videographer, we highly recommend Kyle.
author: Katie Perkins

body: Kyle took beautiful pictures at our Walk to End Alzheimer's event on October 19th, 2024. Kyle also took a beautiful video that captured the event perfectly. I would recommend OWL Audio Visual for any event that you've got going on. It was so helpful to not have to stress about getting images on such a busy day. Thank you, OWL Audio Visual!! You are amazing!
author: Jess Tessman

body: I hired Kyle from Owl AV to do an interview to promote my business, and he did an amazing job. His creativity and attention to detail were outstanding. I’m excited to work with him again in the future. Highly recommend!
author: Chaz DeVito

body: Kyle and his team are amazing! They are passionate, professional, and understanding. All qualities that lead to exceptional work. Every time someone mentions needing a videographer Kyle and OWL Audio/Visual are hands down my first recommendation.
author: DeJeahn Brown

body: I loved Kyle's work because he helped me get professional photos for my business, which added more value.
author: Astrid MATTHIAS

body: Erica and her team were INCREDIBLE! I cannot say enough about the amazing qualities about her as a person and her work. She is thoughtful and delightful to work with. She was with us every step of the way from our engagement pictures to our wedding day! We asked her to do a unique engagement shoot at our favorite pizza place and she was nothing but encouraging to find "our look." As a couple who doesn't like PDA, she made the entire process easy and smooth and it didn't feel like that at all! When it came to the wedding day, Erica and her team were seamless. They got EVERY shot which was so important to our families. Her team made a process that could be exhausting and made it so enjoyable. I am a lifelong customer and I am so happy she is in my life. I will use her again and again and cannot recommend her enough. She is so passionate about what she does and her bubbly personality makes everything so much better!
author: AllyandJon Bowers

body: Erica is amazing! She customized a package for our tiny ceremony one day and reception the next day wedding and made an effort to get to know us before the wedding. My husband and I are very awkward in pictures and Erica was able to make us comfortable and pose us so we looked great! She was so enthusiastic about lighting and getting tons of pictures that we had to tell her we were pictured out! And best of all, she gave us a small package of pictures THAT NIGHT so we had some for wedding announcements and Instagram posts. My husband keeps bragging that our wedding photos look better than all the other wedding photos he's seen. Cannot recommend Erica enough!
author: Meghan Mooring

body: I have worked with Erica on several weddings over the years and every time I am always excited! She strives at not only connecting with our clients but also really capturing the real feel of our floral designs along with the magic of the day. As a floral designer I am very picky about colors and Erica nails it every time!
author: Melissa Beard

body: Erica did such a phenomenal job photographing our wedding and engagement shoot. She helped us to feel completely comfortable in front of the camera and we had such a wonderful time working with her. She is so fun and funny and made us feel at ease.  She has such a great eye and works beautifully with light. Erica was so accommodating and we felt with could totally trust her artistic vision. We could not have asked for a better experience!l
author: Grace O'Connor

body: Erica is a dream to work with and such a genuine, kind person. She did our branding photos for our wedding music company and the entire album is perfection. Not only is she an artist when it comes to the camera, but she really wanted to get to know us, our story, and our brand before the shoot and made us feel really comfortable. The results were phenomenal and we can’t wait to do it again in the future! If you are considering her for your wedding, engagement photos, branding, newborn etc. this is your person.
author: Celine Dean

body: Ron did an amazing job with our engagement photos! He spent so much time with us capturing so many beautiful and creative shots. We loved all the pictures! It’s evident in his work that he’s passionate about capturing the perfect memories. We will cherish these photos for many years to come and are excited to work with Ron again to capture our wedding.
author: Jessica DeMaio

body: 100/10 would recommend Ron for your next photo needs! Ron was such a pleasure to work with. He made our engagement session so much fun! Everything felt so effortless and natural! We didn't have long to wait for our photos either. They came in a nice gallery where it is easy to download your favorites and send a link to family. And I mean, the photos speak for themselves! His work is truly magic! We can't wait to work with Ron again!
author: Cassie Forsman

body: If I could give more than 5 stars I would. We ran into a few hiccups the day of that shifted our timeline and caused a TON of stress but Ron made sure that we got as many photos as possible given the circumstances. He was funny and kind and the photos we got were absolutely stunning. If you’re reading these reviews to help make your decision about hiring Lemelin Photography let me be clear. If you want beautiful photos and a perfect professional who goes above and beyond then you’ve found your photographer. Thank you again Ron you’re the best!
author: Michael and Ariel Lucas

body:
Update: We just got our wedding photos back! And they are also amazing! He was so fun to work with for our engagement and wedding photos. He is incredibly talented and professional, we are obsessed with our photos. I can’t stop looking at them! Hire Ron, you won’t regret it!

We just had our engagement photos done with Ron and they came out AMAZING! We had such a fun morning walking around Forest Park, and Ron knew all the perfect spots. Great communicator and was really flexible when I couldn’t decide on a location to take our photos 🤣 We can’t wait for our wedding photos! Highly recommend ☺️
author: Stephanie Cloutier

body: Ron was absolutely incredible. He wrangled my almost 4 year old, he made it a fun experience for everyone. We had a couple unconventional requests, the location was also pretty unconventional- he made it work absolutely spectacularly. I am so thrilled with how the photos came out. Turnaround on editing was SO fast!!! He made it comfortable, he guided us and captured us perfectly. I am so grateful and I HIGHLY recommend Ron!
author: Kathleen Morgan

body: I am beyond grateful we hired Chris as our wedding photographer. From our first time talking I knew he was the right fit. He went above and beyond to make this the best experience. From meeting us in advance and even scouting photo spots at the venue when we visited, to preparing an iron clad schedule with room for flexibility, to making me an electrolyte drink so I'd stay hydrated during the morning prep, and making us laugh and stay present throughout the day, we couldn't have been happier with our experience. Chris has an innate ability to connect with anyone and he made all of us feel at ease, which helped our authentic emotions shine through in the photos. We knew we wanted a photographer that could capture all the feelings in a unique, artistic and fun way, and Chris did all that and more. Our wedding photos are beautiful, precious memories that truly allow us to relive each moment, and I am so grateful for that gift. Chris was one of the best investments we made for our wedding, and he truly made the day even more special for us and our families. 1,000 out of 10 recommend!
author: Ali Fine

body:
Chris was such a joy to work with! From our very first meeting before even hiring him, he really spent the time to talk through what our vision was and how we wanted our day to be captured. He was a great support every step of the way for planning as well as on the big day! In addition to being a great listener, Chris has great suggestions on how to plan for photos based on his extensive experience (angles, timing, group shots). Our wedding was a large one, so Chris hired a fantastic second lead photographer and several other photographers throughout the day so our event was seamlessly captured!
Another important note - all of our family and other vendors (makeup artists, planners, etc) commented on how great it was to work with Chris, and were excited to work with him on future events - I think this is such an important quality for a photographer, and definitely appreciated how professional and friendly Chris was with EVERYONE! He kept the day moving as it should and captured some unbelievable shots that I revisit on probably a daily basis :)

I honestly cannot recommend Chris enough - from his genuine care and support for you through the planning and important day, to the absolutely stunning product he delivers. Thank you Chris for everything!!
author: Kat Chrisafides

body: I cannot express enough how grateful we are to have found Chris to capture our special day. However, it goes beyond just that singular day. We had first met with Chris in person for a meet and greet, which I would have never thought to play such an integral role in the process. He demonstrated so much passion for the trade and was already so invested in making sure he was exactly the photographer we were looking for so we could truly get the most out of our day. He also took the time to visit the venue after our meeting to get an idea of what he'd be working with. Chris went above and beyond, every step of the way. He even made it a point to come during the rehearsal as well to be even further prepared. Everything flowed organically with his direction which took away so much stress from the day. Professionalism aside, Chris is just a good dude all around. We're so happy to come away from this experience with not only an amazing portfolio of memories, but a passionate and charismatic friend.
author: Steph W

body: Chris is a truly phenomenal photographer and amazing human. He really knows how to get uncomfortable people to relax and be themselves in front of a camera. He took our engagement and wedding photos. Both days turned out to be windy, cloudy and raining. Chris found a way to use the lighting and drama to his advantage. He got the most incredible shots that we will cherish forever. Having someone so well versed in the wedding game around on your wedding day is a huge gift. He helped us all keep our calm. He helped the coordinator get people where they were supposed to be. And topped that with catching the most amazing moments of our wedding day. I cannot recommend Chris highly enough. A true professional with beautiful art captured. Thank you Chris for finding the light in our gloomy days! Haha!
author: Alysha Worrell

body: My husband and I don’t even know where to start this review.  Simply put, Chris is incredible. He is a precise, detail oriented, artist who captures amazing moments and memories in his photography. Trust us, you’re going to want him as your photographer. We were SO blessed to have him capture our wedding. 10/10, he has our highest recommendation!
author: Amy Whitcraft

body: Kayla was the best wedding photographer we could ask for! Our photos came out beautiful, and she was so professional and easy to work with. We always felt like we were in good hands. On top of that she was personable, fun, and had some great photo ideas! Highly recommend her!
author: Lauren Holmes

body: Kayla is wonderful to work with. We were looking for someone who could be a "fly on the wall" with a stellar photographic eye for detail, and she delivered. She met with us during the planning stage to learn more about our story and what we were hoping to capture on our big day. Her approach to capturing authentic moments throughout our wedding was intuitive and exactly what we were hoping for. She is a fast responder, adaptable in the moment, and a wonderful guide for those who aren't used to posing/modelling. Thank you, Kayla!
author: Nicole-Anne Keyton

body: Kayla was our photographer for our September 2024 wedding and she was amazing! From the first meeting, she was thoughtful and well organized. She talked to us about her style and what to expect.  Kayla helped us get organized and figure out what photos we wanted and how we wanted to approach it all. On the day of our wedding, Kayla was calm, cool, and collected. She made sure we got all of our the photos we requested and she captured our day flawlessly. She put us at ease (we are not super comfortable in front of the camera) and made the whole process fun. I highly recommend Kayla!!!
author: Toby Chaiken

body: We can’t recommend Kayla enough! She took our newborn photos and they turned out wonderfully! She was professional and communicative while making arrangements beforehand, friendly and easy to work with, giving us straightforward suggestions and open to our ideas during, and a fast turnaround afterwards. She even managed to incorporate our pup (who was insistent on not being left out!). Hope to have another shoot with her in the future!
author: Ben Hubbell-Engler

body: Kayla is absolutely the best! We’ve had the honor of working with her as our family photographer for the past several years. From an engagement shoot to newborn photos, Kayla always captures beautiful moments that are authentic and creative. When she came to our home to photograph our three-week old baby, she was a calming presence and made us feel comfortable and at ease. Kayla is a dream to work with - patient, kind, and the upmost professional - photos are easy to view and always shared quickly. We wish she still lived in New York! If you’re in the Greater Boston area, you’re very lucky to have such a gem nearby.
author: Lela McElfresh

body: My husband and I cannot be happier with our choice to use TJ for our wedding. We were nervous about choosing a photographer because neither of us like to get our photos taken but from the beginning, TJ made us feel comfortable and relaxed. The photos came out amazing and so did our wedding album. Would highly recommend!!!!!
author: Nicole Vaillancourt

body: TJ and his team are the most professional, fun, timely, and easy going group of photographers we've ever had the pleasure of working with. As soon as we booked Ladman Studios for our engagement photoshoot (which was a blast to say the least), we knew we would contact them again to shoot our wedding. From the initial interview, we realized TJ was an excellent communicator, caring, thoughtful, and always emitted great vibes. This eased us into each event knowing confidently that we would have an awesome time during our special day. We never had to think about what was next as TJ and his team paved the way through each shot with guidance, humor, and really fun prompts to capture the most candid photos. The final results are absolutely stunning and truly depict our natural aura throughout each day. Our photos are truly the icing on the cake! We hired a photographer, and came out with a friend who provided us with amazing service, and photos to last a lifetime! Don't hesitate, contact Ladman Studios today!
author: Curtis Simoneau

body:
As a fellow photographer who has had the absolute pleasure of working with TJ at Ladman Studios, I cannot praise his talent and personality enough. Working alongside him as wedding photographers has been an incredibly enjoyable and rewarding experience, and I have nothing but admiration for his dedication to capturing authentic moments for the couples we've served.

First and foremost, TJ is a bundle of joy to be around. His infectious energy and positive attitude make every shoot feel like a delightful adventure. Even during the most hectic moments of a wedding, TJ manages to keep spirits high and the atmosphere light, creating an enjoyable environment for everyone involved. His sense of humor and easygoing nature instantly put clients at ease, allowing him to capture genuine emotions and candid moments effortlessly.

When it comes to documenting weddings, TJ's passion for his craft truly shines through. He doesn't just take pictures; he weaves stories with his camera. TJ has an uncanny ability to capture the essence of a couple's love and the emotions of their special day. His dedication to portraying authentic moments ensures that the photographs he produces are not just pictures but cherished memories that will be treasured for a lifetime.

Beyond his exceptional photography skills, TJ's personal touch and approachable nature make him an absolute joy to work with. He takes the time to connect with the couples, making them feel valued and understood. This genuine connection allows TJ to understand the unique aspects of each couple's love story, enabling him to create personalized and meaningful images that truly reflect their journey together.

In the fast-paced and sometimes high-stress world of wedding photography, TJ's calm and personable demeanor is a breath of fresh air. He effortlessly collaborates with other photographers and vendors, creating a harmonious team dynamic that ensures the best possible outcome for the couples we serve.

TJ at Ladman Studios is not only a remarkably talented photographer but also a warm and personable individual. His dedication to capturing authentic moments and creating a joyful atmosphere is evident in every project he undertakes.
author: James Nix

body:
TJ is the man! We had such an incredible experience working with him for our wedding! His professionalism, organization, photography skill set/knowledge and attention to detail are second to none.

TJ genuinely cares about his clients and will do everything he can to make your day special and your photos amazing! He takes the time to get to know you and what you want to remember from the big day years down the road. Then he delivers on that!  Our photos are absolutely stunning. He captured so many happy memories of ours and our guests that we are very lucky to have.

If you're looking for a stellar photographer, look no further!
author: Andrew Noonan

body: We had an amazing time at our photoshoot with Thaddeus! We planned to go to the beach for sunset. Turns out it hailed in May! Thaddeus and his brother (helping with lighting) made the best of it with us, and we still had some amazing photos and an amazing time! We even got a few "sunset" pictures even though there was no sunset with the clouds; his lighting and editing were great!
author: Shaun Mateus

body:
My fiancé and I hired Katie for our wedding (10.23.20) after our friends hired her for theirs and had a fantastic experience! We scheduled our engagement pictures this past October and had an awesome time! Katie made us feel incredibly comfortable in front of the camera, listened to what types of pictures we were looking for, and really got to know us as a couple. To say the least, I cannot wait for our wedding day to see her beautiful work!

Updating this after having Katie take photos at both our intimate ceremony in October 2020 and our larger wedding celebration in October 2021. Katie captures every.single.moment. She does such a great job of staying behind the scenes, yet at the same time getting fantastic shots that feel like you're right there with us. Our group shots came out fantastic - she even got my 2.5 year old niece to smile in all of the pictures! Beyond that, her candid photos are why we picked her - she captures all of the best moments on and off the dance floor! She's incredible.
author: Ali Hennessey

body: Katie was the photographer for my recent wedding! From planning to the day of, Katie was professional, talented, and so easy to work with. During the wedding, Katie captured the day so perfectly and blended in to capture all the important moments. When I received my photos, Katie's work retold the day so we will have the memories forever. She has been prompt with her communication especially with helping order the pictures. I highly recommend Katie for any occasion especially a wedding!
author: Erin Cogan

body: Katie was our wedding photographer in August 2018. She did a wonderful job of capturing each part of the afternoon/evening. She gave direction but didn’t make us feel like we were being photographed, it felt very natural and that came across beautifully in our photos. I look at them often because I just can’t get enough.
author: Leah Norris

body: We loved working with Katie for a very special family photo session at our favorite annual vacation spot on the Cape! Katie was quick to respond to our questions when setting up our plan for the shoot and gave some great ideas and recommendations based on what we wanted. She arrived on time, ready to go, and remained professional and fun for the shoot. She worked well with all of us, especially our 1 year old twins! The photos came out beautiful and will be such a special memory for our family at our favorite place.
author: Michaela Devoe

body: Katie did an amazing job capturing so many special moments of our wedding day on 7/30/20. We couldn't have a big wedding due to COVID so great pictures were so important to share with family and friends. Katie was on point with every interaction from start to finish. We love our photos.
author: Eileen Cavanagh

body:
We recently had Gio and his beautiful wife capture our wedding day, and we couldn't be more thrilled with the experience and the photos. From the initial consultation to the final delivery of our photos, Gio was professional, attentive, and incredibly talented, not to mention just a good human being and fun to be around.

On the day of the wedding, they blended seamlessly into the event, capturing candid moments and beautiful portraits without ever feeling intrusive. They have an amazing ability to capture the emotions and essence of the day, from the joyful tears during the ceremony to the laughter on the dance floor.

The final photos are nothing short of breathtaking. I cannot tell you how many people have reached out to me telling me my wedding photos are the best they have ever seen. Each image tells a story and brings back the emotions of our special day.

We highly recommend Gio to any couple looking for a wedding photographer (or just any sort of photographer),  who will not only provide stunning photos but also enhance the joy and memories of their wedding day. Thank you, Gio, for giving us beautiful memories to cherish forever. We absolutely adore them AND YOU!
author: Madyson Cohrs

body: Giovanni was amazing to work with! Our favorite vendor at our wedding by far. Photos turned out absolutely beautiful. His style is the perfect mix of natural, not too heavy of editing, yet still with some drama. He captured our wedding perfectly. (As well as our engagement shoot and rehearsal dinner!!!!) On top of this, he was great to work with - kind, personable, truly cares about getting the best shots, easy to communicate with. The albums are also so so beautiful! We will cherish the album and all our wedding photos forever. He is truly the best, if you're considering hiring Gio, do yourself a favor and book him!
author: Sami Kohlbeck

body: Gio of Giovanni Logrono Photography went above and beyond the call of duty for a recent event. His photographs were beautiful and naturally captured individuals at the two events.  He had a quick turnaround on the photographs.  I highly recommend Gio for any wedding or event you may have coming up.
author: Heather Bostick

body: Gio was amazing! He was so professional and my wedding pictures turned out so beautiful. He also was very quick to respond and got our wedding photos back so fast! I would highly recommend him to anyone in the Houston area looking for a photographer!
author: Meagan Carter

body: It all started when I was browsing on Facebook! I saw this photo of this wedding couple and the style I just fell in love. He captured such a loving moment that I felt through the photo. It was like pure art. I knew I wanted someone to to capture those moments and looks for my wedding day. I can’t say enough on how pleased we are about the whole experience when we hired Giovanni! It was the best experience all the way around. I’m so glad I was not victim of regrets or disappointment. Giovanni and his team has made us feel like family. His expertise goes way beyond! So very helpful! I told him I was struggling for hair and make up person and gave me some referrals. I loved that! Others helping others to promote small business and local. I loved the packages offered. Some might say wow that’s a lot but for all the top notch service and care and beyond. It was worth every penny. Plus do your research. Really reasonable prices and plans. I love that he wanted to know us to figure out how to capture the best of us. I told him after life’s crazy adventure and our plans out of wack since Covid. Now we can enjoy not only us but want our daughter to be a big part of everything too. Which also we threw in. We are little different than what we seen on your portfolio…. We are down to earth, blue collar, love to hunt, rednecks.lol. Let me tell you. He took the challenge and excelled it. He even helped us create our vision for our wedding invitations. From engagement, bridal, wedding photos, videography , wedding album, wedding invitation, and life time once year photo sessions. You couldn’t get any better deal than this. I mean even down to the memory stick of our photos. He captured our style. Rustic in a box on a bed of moss. Than the surprises of our first updated family portrait canvas and more. Did I say the turn around time is very reasonable! No need waiting months! It was a couple of weeks or less.I can’t find or say anything bad about the whole experience. I can’t wait to see more of his work and what he can capture in next sessions.
author: Katherine Davis

body: Erin was fantastic! She was so easy to work with and the photos of our elopement are absolutely incredible.  Even when staged photos can be slightly awkward, Erin made us so comfortable and we had fun with every photo. Erin went above and beyond to get great photos and she captured some truly amazing moments of our elopement and we will treasure the photos forever!
author: Stephanie Crane

body: We hired Erin for our wedding on 12/8/2024, and from the very beginning of the planning process to the big day, she was nothing short of amazing. Erin’s attention to detail and reassuring nature made all the difference. Even though I was feeling overwhelmed surrounded by so many loved ones, Erin’s reassurance and calming presence helped me stay at ease. She went above and beyond, even braving the cold to capture the perfect shots. If that wasn't enough, due to the wind she fixed my hair countless times and made me feel truly beautiful. I wholeheartedly recommend her for any photography needs. She’s a beautiful person both inside and out.
author: Jenna Levere

body: Without a doubt, our wedding experience wouldn't have been the same without Erin as our photographer. We first met Erin for our engagement photos in Newport, RI. Neither of us had ever had professional photos taken, and we were extremely nervous we would feel awkward and look uncomfortable in front of the camera. Erin not only gave us great wardrobe advice, but she gave such natural direction that we felt so comfortable and got beautiful photos that truly represented us as a couple. As the wedding approached, she kept in close contact with us and made sure that our timeline was perfect and that we had a list of all the "must-have" photos and combinations of people. And on wedding day, she kept things rolling smoothly and got ALL of the shots, all while bringing such a positive energy and managing family dynamics. She delivered INCREDIBLE photos that we feel captured the emotion of our day perfectly, along with all of the special and candid moments. We loved how she did a Premiere in her studio once our photos were ready, it made everything feel so special and is something so unique that we haven’t heard of before! Every step of the way was so enjoyable, and she always went above and beyond for us. Erin is fantastic, we just can’t recommend her enough.
author: Cassandra Pelletier

body:
Erin and Mark were both fantastic! They both are amazing people with phenomenal talent. We got a sneak peek of our beautiful pictures within 5 days! They were both attentive to us and all of our family, and extremely easy to work with. Besides the photos, Erin went above and beyond with the timeline and making sure every special moment was captured. There ended up being a delay waiting on some of my party, but Erin handled it gracefully. She was very in touch with all our other vendors throughout the whole process. We knew we could count on her! We can't say enough great things about the work you two did and we hope that you both had as much fun as we did! 5 stars isn't enough to give them!

Thank you so much!!!
author: JohnBritt Sullivan

body:
An amazing person and photographer.
We worked with Erin for our engagement shoot and wedding day and words cannot express how awesome she is. From the moment we met her at our first shoot, we all clicked. She is such a fun and down to earth person, it was so easy to work with her. Fast forward to wedding day, we had the best day doing all our photos with her. We consider her a friend and look forward to using her again for all our other life photographs!
author: Cassie Gaudio

body:
Elyse was nothing short of amazing. She was highly communicative about her process ahead of the wedding and on the day itself she produced exceptional photos with a really fun attitude.

Couldn't recommended her enough.
author: Max Howes

body: Elyse did an amazing job with our wedding photos! Her documentary style and rich color photos were exactly what I wanted when I first saw her portfolio. She makes sure she fulfills all the photos you've requested for on your big day, and she does it all without breaking the bank. For those who love her work I highly reccomend!
author: Bri Bri

body: We hired Elyse for our elopement photoshoot. She has exceptional skills and she captured our special day unbelievably beautifully. In addition to being highly professional, she is attentive to detail and very thorough. I highly recommend her
author: Navpreet Kaur

body: Elyse photographed a family event and she was amazing! The photos are beautiful and she was great to work with. Will definitely use her the next time we need a photographer!
author: Naomi Shatz

body: We hired Elyse for our wedding in June 2023 and we are so happy with the photos! She got such beautiful candids and captured our special day just the way we wanted. She made us feel comfortable throughout the photoshop.
author: Shraddha Surve

body: Veronica was extremely pleasant to work with! She was very responsive to emails and texts and made the whole process very easy. She was early to show up at the wedding and was on top of it from when she first walked in. She was very professional but also fun and made people naturally smile for all their pictures! My husband and I are in awe of how absolutely beautiful all of our pictures are. If you are looking for a quality photographer for your big day, look no further!
author: Chelsea Pascoe

body: Veronica has done two extraordinary photo shoots for me. One was a Holiday shoot when my son was about 6 months, the second was a big formal first birthday. Veronica captures all the nuances that create the best memories! I am doing a third shoot with her as well. She is professional, calm, artisitc and an expert with the camera- she will not disappoint and will be my go to photographer forever!
author: Olivia Kopchik

body: Veronica is amazing at what she does! We absolutely love our engagement shoot and our wedding album. Everything came out beautiful and we’ve received amazing compliments. Definitely recommend her photography!
author: Gabriella Ferri

body:
James was an absolute joy to work with for our wedding! He was incredibly easy-going, super responsive to our needs, and made the whole experience feel seamless and relaxed. The photos turned out perfectly, capturing every moment beautifully - he got amazing shots of everything we wanted and more.Also we got them back so quickly and efficiently— highly recommended!

Thanks again, man!
author: PJ Yeomans

body: Where do we even begin?! It is hard to put into words the experience that James created for us on our wedding day. From the moment I contacted James about shooting our wedding I knew he was going to be the perfect fit for what we were looking for. He portrayed how important it is to him to capture all of our moments in the most natural, authentic form. That is exactly what he did. He took the time to reach out to our individual vendors and made sure to be on the same page as them - a noteable action that goes a far way in the cohesiveness of the wedding day. Most importantly, James made us feel comfortable- he gave us sound advice about taking in the joys of the day, letting loose and embracing in one another. (I can’t forget to mention he even willingly GOT IN THE POOL to capture the most unique - once in a lifetime photos at our venue!!! That is dedication!!) We had the opportunity to look at the photos together and relive the magic of the day. The photos that James and his partner TJ captured allow us to savor the memories and tap back into the emotion we felt and the emotion of all of our guests. We would recommend James with Nix Photography in a heartbeat!!!!
author: Olivia Murphy

body: James did an amazing job capturing our special day, both the beauty of the surroundings and the people at our June '22 wedding in Beverly, MA. He knew what shots he wanted to get and did a great job directing the group and couple shots with the beautiful background. I can't get over how many amazing photos James got of the dance floor.
