He didn't get in the way at all when he was taking them, which is why I couldn't believe how much he got on camera. Overall, James was absolutely wonderful to work with and I love our photos so much!! Will cherish them forever!
author: Bridget Manning

body:
James was AMAZING! He and his assistant were always friendly, professional, and accommodating.

He was able to execute our vision perfectly. We weren’t big on posed photos. Each picture depicted character, action, or emotion. He captured  all the important moments - even ones that we didn’t think would be! He took breathtaking shots that memorialized our ceremony and after party.

We would highly recommend him to anyone and without hesitation avail of his services again!
author: Athena Dacanay

body: James is the best photographer out there. He didn't just capture moments in his photographs, he captured the actual feelings. His experience in sports photography sets him apart from other wedding photographers because he can get those in-the-moment shots. We are thrilled with the professionalism, but most importantly the photos we got back. Highly recommend!!
author: Kimberly Hammond Pattillo

body:
TLDR: I would give this place 10/10 stars if I could. This lovely b&b is gorgeous, the food is delicious, and the staff are unbelievably kind and helpful. You couldn’t ask for more ❤️

We found the Mansion at Bald Hill by chance, I am so incredibly happy that we did. From the moment we drove up, we were in love with the grounds and the overall look of the house. After seeing the beautiful outside, we had high expectations for what our room would be like. And it certainly delivered! We had the Mrs. Bowen room, which was jaw-droppingly spacious and grand. Even the bathroom felt fancy!

On top of that, the food was to die for. Breakfast is included with the room, and that is a STEAL because it felt like we were at a 5 star restaurant. Our breakfast featured homemade cinnamon French toast, fresh berries, and a tasty little parfait. We were also lucky enough to arrive in time for dinner, which was amazing as well. It was nearly impossible to pick from the menu- so make sure you come hungry to take full advantage! Especially since the meal comes with bread and delicious homemade butter. You’ll need as much room in your stomach as possible!

But the best part of our stay was the staff. Just saying they were kind is an understatement. Every single person who we encountered was like experiencing a master class in hospitality. I don’t think I have ever met a group of people as courteous and genuine as the staff here! And we have to give a special shout out to Joel, who, when we had an issue in the middle of the night, was over in less than 10 minutes to help.

This is truly a spectacular place and a must stay if you are in the area ❤️
author: Casie Ropski

body: Our family has come to celebrate every big milestone at the Mansion.  There is just no where better in the area.  The food is amazing, the atmosphere is impeccable (especially if you have a big function in the function area), the staff are friendly and hard working and the owner goes out of his way to make sure guests are happy and enjoying themselves.  I can't say enough about the establishment, people who work, manage and own the mansion and the food! Do not hesitate to book your big family functions here.  You will not regret it!
author: Katherine Jean Palladino

body: First time dinner. Good food, good service. No rushing you out. We were able to visit with dinner companions as long as we wanted
author: Pauline Audet

body: We celebrated my Mother's 90th birthday at the restaurant and were extremely pleased.   Janet, the Event Coordinator, was friendly and very helpful leading up to the event.  The waitstaff was excellent and the food was delicious.   There were 23 of us from four generations and everyone talked about how much they enjoyed the experience.  Thank you!  Thank you!  Thank you!
author: Kathryn Jensen

body: We had a small baby shower here. The service was okay. At the end when we paid we were tipping and the server came over and tried to dictate what she should be tipped when we were already tipping her. I understand letting us know that since it was a big party the tip wasn’t included but when she said we just leave it blank and she will just run a 20% tip I have never felt so disrespected. I pride myself on being a good tipper but to have someone request what they think they deserve didn’t feel right to me. I’ve worked in the service industry as well and I’ve never once asked someone for the tip I want. We won’t be back.
author: Alicia Allen

body:
Shane was the DJ for my wedding at regatta place in Newport RI and if you’re looking for a DJ then look no further!! As soon we my wife and I met him we knew he was our guy - he’s charismatic, funny and a true professional which is perfect for someone who will be speaking to and entertaining your guests! His energy set the tone for our dance floor and it was packed all night right up until the last song. He was responsive and provided us some great recommendations and ideas leading up until the wedding and on our big day he made it so stress free for us! Shane we are grateful for you and we are still riding the high of our wedding because you helped make it so much fun!

Photo credits: lanecarolinephotography
author: Ray M

body: Shane was the best DJ we could have imagined. He was so easy to work with, organized, and personable! He made our wedding exactly what we had envisioned by playing the perfect mix of music from start to finish. The dance floor was full the ENTIRE night. The way he chose songs and mixed them was incredible. Even weeks after our wedding our friends and family are still raving about him saying he is the best DJ they have ever heard. We are SO thankful to have found Shane and would recommend him a thousand times.
author: Casey Bowen

body:
Shane recently DJ'd my wedding in October and I can't get over how much fun he made it! He was actually the first vendor I sought about because my maid of honor went to another wedding that he DJ'd and she was texting me the entire time telling me how awesome he was and that I HAD to book him for mine!  She couldn't have been more right!! From the very first conversation with him, we knew we were going to have a hell of a night. His personality is so fun, he talks to you like hes known you for years but also is still professional and never once made me nervous that something was going to go wrong or some
thing would be missed on our big day. All of our family and friends are still raving about how awesome he was. He kept everyone on the dance floor until the very last song, the energy was just through the roof the entire night!! He had so many cool ideas and fun transitions from song to song, everyone loved it!  We also did our videography with him and his assistant which was also awesome. It went so smoothly, it was so fun to take different shots with him. He definitely didn't miss a thing and made it so stress free for us the entire day from start to finish.  We did the photo booth with him as well which everyone loved too! He had a cool blow up booth with lights that people could pop in and out of, you could text all the pics to your phone and my husband and I loved getting a copy of all of them at the end of the night! Bundling all 3 services with him honestly made the planning process so much less stressful, even fun to plan, and his pricing was totally fair.  Everyone at the wedding is saying how awesome he was and that they'll definitely use him for future events, as will we!  We just can't say enough good things about Shane, everything was just incredible, we can't recommend him enough!
author: Meghan McClure

body: Shane was the first vendor we secured for our wedding because there was a never question about who was going to DJ! His reviews are outstanding and he lives up to the hype. He was literally the blood of our entire wedding!! We hired him all day for the ceremony and reception, and we added on his videography services as well! He showed up on time and got right to work! Our guests were raving about the music ALL NIGHT! It was jam after jam and everything we envisioned for our wedding! Guests I never expected to dance were dancing and it was a night we’ll never forget! Trust me, hire him!!
author: Kelsey Haggas

body: When it came time to select a DJ for our big day, it was no question that Shane was the one for the job! Shane was extremely helpful during our phone calls to help us set up a night that would never be forgotten by us and all of our guests. He made it very simple to help us select songs we absolutely wanted to hear and the ones that we didn't. When it came time for our big day, Shane was extremely well organized, came with well-performing equipment, worked greatly with our officiant and other vendors, and absolutely rocked the reception! We were surprised to see everyone, and we mean everyone, on the dance floor the entire night! He effortlessly blended various genres of music to keep the party going and played songs that all age groups could enjoy! During the reception and following our wedding, countless guests complimented how great Shane was! When we all thought he couldn't top the song he was playing, Shane shocked the crowd and played one even better! If you are looking for a DJ, look no further. Words cannot express how awesome Shane was! He is a super easy professional to get along with, and you can rest assured that he will make your night exactly the way you dreamed it to be! It was an honor to have Shane DJ our wedding and to support a fellow firefighter!
author: Alyssa Raia

body: We can't say enough amazing things about Nicole.  She was so fun and made us feel so comfortable during our engagement shoot.  The photos turned out incredible and we cannot wait for her to shoot our wedding next year!! She's the best - highly recommend for anything you need!
author: Katherine & Joe

body: Nicole and her team were such a pleasure to work with. She captured all the little details leading up to the wedding and was spot on when it came to capturing every single moment. I was so impressed with how she was able to perfectly photograph every couple in the bridal party walking down the aisle... with their eyes open! Every shot from getting ready in the bridal suite to the big kiss to toasts and the first dances–her and her team were easy going and blended in with the party. She provided an abundance of photos to choose from upon final delivery and her warm color editing is gorgeous. Would definitely recommend Nicole!
author: Nicole Raccuia

body: Nicole is an absolute dream to work with, and such an intuitive director!! She helped my boyfriend and I feel so much more comfortable in front of the camera, and helped us make our cozy poses look nice🥰
author: Hale Rose Hagen

body: We loved our session with Nicole! My kids are pretty shy, but she was able to get them to open up and captured some beautiful photos of them. She was willing to try some shots I really wanted to document my family and pregnancy. Her photos are beautiful and she selected beautiful shots to include in our gallery.
author: Katelyn Audet

body: Highly highly recommend! Working with Nicole was truly the best experience ever. My fiancé and I recently worked with Nicole for our engagement photos and Nicole was wonderful! She helped us decide a location and gave us suggestions for our outfits, which we really appreciated. We're not super comfortable around a camera but she made us feel so relaxed and at ease, and we had a great time during the shoot. And when we got our photos back, we were stunned at how beautifully she captured them! We loved the experience so much and hope to get to work with her in the future!
author: Chisato Kimura

body:
The Tyler Jordan Soucy Photography company was our first choice when we were looking for a wedding photographer. We love their/his eye and aesthetic. Tyler is very professional and fun and made the process before our wedding stress free. He did exactly what we asked. But his photos speak for themselves. Would hire again for my next wedding ; )
We have already referred him to many people.
author: Accounting Dept

body:
I’ve worked with Tyler for a couple of years now, both for my work as a musician and for family portraits, and I can’t recommend him highly enough!

He’s an incredible photographer and videographer who combines professionalism with a down-to-earth, easygoing attitude. Tyler is truly committed to bringing your vision to life—whether it’s a dynamic music shoot or a memorable family session, he listens carefully and adapts to exactly what you’re looking for. His work is consistently high-quality, and he always goes the extra mile to make sure the project turns out exactly how you hoped.

If you’re looking for someone talented, reliable, and easy to work with, Tyler is your guy!
author: Alex Bordonaro

body: Tyler was so great to work with! He made our family feel comfortable, and really captured the essence of our stage of life. The images he captured are so timeless and real. And the turnaround time was so fast. Truly a hassle free experience!
author: Tessa Harris

body: Ryan was so easy to work with and we felt very confident that he would capture our special day. He did that and so much more! I'm so grateful we have these memories to watch back on over & over again. Couldn't recommend this company enough!
author: Jana Ross

body: Ryan from Lighthouse Video Productions was amazing to work with!! Wearing the mics & having the cameras around can be intimidating for people who are not used to it, but Ryan talked through everything with my husband &I and it brought us so much ease! Easy to work with, professional, friendly, awesome overall!!!
author: Paige Benshemer

body: Ryan and lighthouse video productions were absolutely amazing!! We went with them for both pictures and videos and I was just blown out of the water. The turnaround time on the pictures was so fast, we got them on our honeymoon! And the for the quality of the video and amount of video we got, it was also incredibly fast. But even though it was quick, the quality was astounding. He was also such a pleasure to work with! He very kind, really wants to give you what you're looking for with a video and in pictures, and has such a passion for his craft and it really comes out in the way he speaks about creating videos and taking pictures. His passion shows in the quality of his work too. He has such a talent for capturing beauty and life. The types of pictures and shots he captured allowed me to see my wedding in a whole new way and I cry every time I see the pictures and videos. My wedding was the absolute best day of my life and now I have it captured beautifully forever. I could not be happier. I would 100% pick Ryan and Lighthouse video productions again. VERY HIGHLY recommend.
author: Michaila Parent

body: Ryan was amazing to work with! He listened to how we wanted things and incorporate our must haves. He was so communicative about how things were going to go and just overall a great person. Our video is absolutely beautiful, something we will cherish forever.
author: Grace Fantoni

body: I've had the opportunity to work with Ryan on multiple projects, including personal video/photography for my wife and I, as well as professional shots for myself. He's a great director with a vision and an incredible eye for what the end product should look like, and captures those moments during the session. I highly recommend Ryan and Lighthouse Video Productions.
author: Seth Morgan

body: Danielle is simply wonderful, there is no other way to put it! From the day I submitted an inquiry to our wedding day (and beyond), she was incredibly responsive, kind, and professional. My husband and I weren't super comfortable in front of a camera and she immediately put us at ease during our engagement shoot. She went above and beyond on our wedding day and was a huge part in making the day run so smoothly. We LOVE our stunning wedding photos -- timeless and classic. The beauty and emotions of the day really shined through. We will enjoy them for a lifetime!
author: Christina Hart

body: We had the pleasure of meeting Danielle at the Wilmington, MA Wedding show. The moment we met her, we knew she would be the perfect match for us and our wedding vision. Danielle was so wonderful to work with during our engagement photos and for our gorgeous fall wedding in the NH Lakes Region. She captured the beauty of the venue and foliage, as well as captured our intimate day perfectly! She was so easy to work with throughout the wedding planning process and very responsive. As an included bonus, we received 50 sneak peek photos the next day after our wedding. If you're looking for an easy going, genuine and talented photographer for your wedding day or any other special event, you would not be disappointed with choosing Danielle!
author: Katy Pinkham

body: Danielle was AMAZING! She is the photographer you want on your big day! Communication between her and I was phenomenal as she was quick to reply, answered all my questions, and super collaborative as she was super easy to talk to! Our engagement photos came out wonderful and really captured our personalities. During the big day, not only did she capture our big day, but she also provided a lending hand, which shows how above and beyond she goes when working with couples. Lastly, her turn around time for photos was very quick, as we had our engagement photos within a few weeks, our sneak  peak photos from our wedding within 24 hours, and our entire wedding gallery under 1 month. When we received our wedding gallery, my husband and I were beyond happy with the quality of the photos as it felt like we were reliving our wedding day all over again. I highly encourage that you pick Danielle as your photographer as she was awesome to work with. I can confidently say that I will be choosing her to capture my big moments in the future.
author: Simone Arent

body: We chose Danielle to be our photographer for both our engagement photos and our wedding this past fall. Danielle was so easy to work with, incredibly organized throughout the whole process, and very accommodating for any requests we had. From the first time we met her, she did a great job making us feel comfortable in front of the camera and helping to direct and pose us to make sure we got all of the pictures we wanted. Our pictures came out incredible, we couldn’t be happier with them! She even got all of them to us within a few weeks after our wedding. We would highly recommend Danielle to anyone looking for a quality photographer!
author: Arianne & George

body: If you are on the hunt for a photographer, look no further! I had the pleasure of working with Danielle on a wedding recently as another vendor. She was so personable, fun, felt so comfortable to work with and was a true professional! She captured the heart and soul of the day so beautifully and was able to focus in on the sweet, in-between moments that I know are so important to couples. I'm looking forward to working with her again in the future!
author: Chelsea Shea

body: I don’t even know where to begin when it comes to Jessica and the work she does! Incredibly patient, talented and makes you feel extremely comfortable. I wanted a very natural look, and this is her specialty! Making you look and feel like yourself, she has a true gift. I did my first trial, and even though it was great, it wasn’t the tone I wanted for my wedding. She was more than understanding and listened to my needs, even though I had a horrible way of describing it. She’s an expert at her craft and still could tell what I wanted. I did another trial, which was phenomenal and spot on. Come the day of the wedding, she absolutely nailed it. The bridesmaids and mothers loved her work. I was very confident in Jessica and just knew that she had an eye for what was needed. I trusted her completely, and she delivered. Highly recommend Jessica for your next event! You will be so happy that you did!
author: Tayla D'Avolio

body: I can't say enough good things about Jessica! I’ve never been thrilled about getting my makeup done before, but she completely changed that experience for me. From the moment I met her for the trial to the final touch-ups on my wedding day, Jessica made me feel completely at ease. She not only listened to what I wanted but also gave amazing advice to make sure my look was perfect. The skincare prep she did beforehand was a total game-changer and made my skin glow all day. And honestly, it was her calming presence that made the whole experience so enjoyable—she truly has a gift for making you feel relaxed and beautiful. I’m so grateful for everything she did to help me feel my best on my wedding day! Highly recommend Jessica to any bride!
author: Shannon Folan

body: Jessica is a SUPERSTAR! Jessica was my MUA for my wedding, and I could not have dreamed of a better makeup look or artist! EVERY one of my ladies (4 bridesmaids, Mom, and MIL) felt incredibly beautiful on my wedding day. Jessica made everyone feel comfortable (hugely important during the chaos of a wedding morning) and she truly listened to, and delivered, each girl's wants and needs for their makeup. A huge plus was her skill when working with mature skin for my Mom and MIL - they were both over the moon with their looks and felt very natural and confident. Jessica's expertise is top tier, she is immensely talented and it was always clear that she cares deeply about everyone in her chair. My bridal trial was in depth, detail oriented, and left me with zero worries leading into our wedding day. Her looks were stunning, classic, natural yet elevated, and we could not have been happier with the results! Picking Jessica to be my MUA was the best decision I made for my wedding! She was a true joy to work with and I cannot recommend her enough!
author: Allison O'Mara

body: I had the most amazing experience with Jess as my makeup artist for my wedding! From the very beginning, she went above and beyond, offering me skincare recommendations at the trial to ensure my skin was prepped for the big day. On the day itself, she even treated me to a little facial and shoulder massage, which was such a thoughtful touch and helped me relax before the ceremony. My makeup was flawless and stayed perfect from morning until night. My bridal party couldn’t stop raving about her work—they all said it was the best makeup experience they’ve ever had! I would absolutely recommend Jess to anyone looking for a professional, talented, and incredibly kind makeup artist. Thank you so much, Jess!
author: Michelle Cincunegui

body: Jessica did the makeup for my brother’s wedding and she did an amazing job! I’m not a person who wears much makeup but she made the process easy and comfortable and I was so happy with how I looked. I felt amazing all night long. She was along incredibly kind and easy to talk to, it helped make a stressful day that much better!
author: Sarah Burrell

body: She did a great job on both my hair and my makeup! Exactly what I asked for! Very professional and was able to book quickly and did the job within the time limit that I had. I was in a rush and didn’t have much time but she pulled it off with no problem!
author: Audrey Desharnais

body:
Deb was our day of coordinator for our October 2024 wedding and we met almost 2 years before in October 2022. Prior to the wedding, Deb had already gone above and beyond her expectations- zoomed us whenever we needed her,
she went with us to various vendor meetings while we were in town, suggested vendors to us, helped our officiant out, told us certain red flags and we so appreciate her guidance through our whole wedding process. Day of, Deb was always there from helping us chorale family members to setting up spaces and Deb was truly the “fairy godmother” of our wedding. If you want someone who is extremely personable and will go to the ends of the earth for you and your event, I highly recommend Deb. Deb, you will always be such a special person to us and we will always be grateful!
author: Miranda Shao-Davis

body: We cannot recommend DWP enough! We used DWP for our 10/19/2024 wedding at Falls Creek Farm, both Debbie & one her coordinators Kristen were a crucial part in our big day! From helping me plan and make decisions on final arrangements leading up to our big day to making sure everything ran as smoothly as possible, and being a major source of help to keep everything running smoothly, Debbie & Kristin went above and beyond for us. If you are looking for a day of coordinator for your wedding or event who are attentive, caring, kind, have your best interest in mind and truly want to make your event as perfect this is your team! I truly don’t think I could have enjoyed my day as much as I did if it had not been for Debbie & Kristen!
author: Michaela Gamache

body:
Debbie was fantastic to work with! Extremely responsive throughout my planning if I had any questions.

On the day of our wedding she ran around ensuring everything came together and made sure we didn’t have to worry about a thing. We cannot recommend her enough. If you’re looking for a planner/day of coordinator for your day, look no further. Debbie is the ONLY choice.

Debbie was also our officiant and it was such a beautiful ceremony.

We cant thank you enough for all your care, attention to detail  and overall kindness. We hope to work with you on any future events we may plan! ❤️
author: Katie Rogers

body: Deb and her team did a fantastic job with our wedding at Evergreen Farms as a day of coordinator! She helped plan multiple visits to the venue, coordinated everything with our vendors, and asked all the questions we forgot about. Would absolutely recommend her.
author: Elena Kleinhenz

body:
We held our June 2024 wedding at a private residence, which required significantly more logistical planning (needed to bring in items like bathrooms, generators, etc.) than a traditional venue. Debbie, our wedding planner, was absolutely fantastic in thinking through all the additional details and needs leading up to the wedding to ensure we had everything covered.

On the day of the wedding, Debbie handled everything like a complete pro. We had the best time and so much fun because everything was seamlessly managed. Debbie even took care of a few issues that popped up that we didn't even find out about until weeks later! Honestly, as the bride, I had practically no stress on my wedding day - it was glorious!

We have had many friends talk about how stressful their wedding planning / wedding day was. I can say confidently that for us, while there was a little stress of course, the entire process was so much more fun and enjoyable in large part because of Debbie.

If you are planning a wedding, you should definitely hire Debbie!
author: Lydia Bowers

body:
Great hotel with an excellent location of you are going to a show at the DCU Center. The 110 Grill is attached to the hotel, which makes it convenient for dining.
There are lots of bars and restaurants within walking distance of the hotel.
I chose the parking package with my reservation. With the pass, you can come and go as often as you like, and it is good until midnight on the day you check out.
author: Jim Savage

body: Great hotel, really helpful staff and good location with plenty of car parking. Be aware that the air con and fridge systems have got to be the loudest systems known to man... They managed to wake me up at least 3-4 times a night seemingly having a very long conversation about something. I mentioned it to reception and they said that it was working fine. I moved rooms and unfortunately it was the same there too🤦
author: Jonathan Moore

body: Exactly as you would expect. Reliable and friendly. Standard business class hotel. The bartender was above average but the food was average for a quick service bistro. Walkable to other good choices.  This is our go to place and will remain so while our kid progresses through college.
author: Rick Froh

body:
I cannot recommend the AC Hotel by Marriott enough—my stay was everything I hoped for and more. From the moment I arrived, I was met with exceptional service and a warm, personal touch, thanks to the incredible staff who truly made my experience unforgettable.

Zach exemplifies the best of the hospitality industry. Despite my disheveled appearance, he treated me with such kindness and respect that I immediately felt valued and welcomed. His professionalism, gentlemanly demeanor, and genuine care set the tone for my stay. He ensured that I felt pampered and cared for, adding a personal touch to the luxury experience I was seeking. Zach's remarkable manners and professionalism, particularly considering his youth, exemplify his character and the elevated standards Marriott maintains. Because of him, I know I’ll be returning to Marriott properties again and again—whether for relaxation or in times of personal difficulty.

Boa is simply the best bartender I have ever encountered. His warmth, soulfulness, and kindhearted approach made a significant impact on me. After an emotional day, I wasn’t in the mood for conversation, but Boa gently lightened the mood with a kind-hearted joke that softened me up and made me feel at ease. What followed was a meaningful and memorable conversation that left me inspired and rejuvenated.

Boa’s passion for nonprofit work, including his trips to my mother’s country to serve local communities, was incredible to hear about. From distributing reusable sanitary pads to building infrastructure, his dedication to making a difference was deeply moving. Even while juggling other guests at the bar, some of whom were less than kind, Boa treated everyone with respect and genuine kindness. His exceptional character and skill make him stand out as a bartender and as a person.

The room was exactly what I needed—luxurious and comfortable. The bed was cozy, the bathroom was exquisite (glass doors, endless hot water, luxurious-smelling toiletries), and the view was lovely. The location was perfect, allowing me to explore easily on foot or via a short Uber ride.

The hotel’s interior design deserves its own praise. The fireplace by the entrance is long and elegant, adding a refined warmth to the atmosphere. The beautifully decorated Christmas tree was a festive and tasteful touch that enhanced the hotel’s sophisticated yet inviting ambiance.

One of the highlights of my stay was waking up in the morning to find lavender pouches available for guests to carry in their pockets. This small yet thoughtful touch added to the hotel’s charm and attention to detail. I took two pouches—one for myself and another to give to someone I was meeting later that day. This simple gesture brought a sense of calm and joy, perfectly complementing the overall luxurious and healing experience.

I came to AC Hotel by Marriott to decompress and heal, and I left feeling genuinely renewed. Every detail—from the warm and attentive staff to the luxurious accommodations—was thoughtfully executed, creating an experience that exceeded my expectations. I cannot thank Zach, Boa, and the rest of the team enough for making my stay so memorable. The healing effects of this visit linger with me even now, and I look forward to returning soon.
author: Anya R

body: This is an amazing hotel! Would stay here again for sure! Rooms are beautiful, and super clean! Nice beautiful bathroom, with awesome shower! Beds are super comfy! Beautiful view of the city, especially at night! The building is really nice and beautiful! Very nicely decorated! Nice size TV in room with HBO, Showtime, TMC, Netflix, and Amazon Prime Video! The staff at the front desk are very nice, and very polite! Affordable prices too! I highly recommend this hotel!
author: Manuel Marval

body: We hired Gretchen to be our photographer for our October 2024 wedding, and we simply cannot recommend her enough. Gretchen is professional, knowledgeable, kind, and helped my husband and I feel comfortable while taking photos with her. She was always reachable, responsive and reliable, especially in the months leading up to our wedding. Not to mention her photography style is gorgeous. We loved our experience with Gretchen so much!
author: Elizabeth Seyer

body: Gretchen is extremely talented at her craft! You can tell that she has such a passion for not only photography but for her clients as well. Along with this She, she made us feel extremely comfortable in front of the camera and was very professional. She helped us with our gender reveal photos and we couldn't be more thankful that she captured such an incredible moment in our lives! She was quick to return the edits and will be helping us in the process of printing a few once we decided which ones we want on our walls! 5 stars and 100% recommend!
author: Casey O'Connor

body: We would recommend Gretchen to anyone looking for photos, weddings or otherwise. Gretchen was thorough, communicative, flexible, and affordable. She and her second photographer, Sam, were so friendly it just felt like they were part of the wedding party. But most of all, her photos are gorgeous! My wife and I don't take a lot of photos, so the thought of posing for hundreds of shots was daunting. Gretchen and Sam made us comfortable enough that we did not feel awkward or forced during any of the pictures throughout the night and it shows. She even said we "could be models" at one point, which I know was a lie, but she said it with conviction and that's what matters.
author: Kyle Guertin

body: Gretchen is SO super professional! and the photos come out GORGEOUS! She is so incredibly organized and you can just feel that she truly cares about getting quality photos for your special moments. Book her if you're considering! So worth it!
author: Krystiana Estiler

body: Gretchen is an incredible photographer! I hired her recently for a branding photoshoot for my small business. I needed headshots for myself as well as group shots for the community I run. Gretchen was professional, easy to work and communicate with and made everyone feel comfortable in front of the camera. The photos came out beautiful and I was able to put together my dream website. Thank you so much Gretchen!!
author: Abby Valletta

body: Trailing Twine was great to work with. Ling was super responsive, and she met with us beforehand on Zoom to get to know us and what we were looking for as far as our wedding photographer. At our engagement shoot, she gave us direction as neither of us love having our picture taken and felt uncomfortable in front of the camera at first. We were amazed to see the photos from that shoot and how natural we looked in them thanks to her guidance. Our wedding photos are also gorgeous, and she and Emily were a great team.
author: Jessie Marchant

body: Wow wow wow – words cannot describe how incredibly amazing Ling and her team are, including Jacqueline, Sarah, Kevin and Brenden! From our engagement shoot to the rehearsal dinner, and of course our wedding day, Ling and her team made our wedding vision come to life. Every single photo and video they took was sheer perfection, and they took the time to truly make sure that every element of our wedding was captured. Look no further than Ling and the Trailing Twine team if you are looking to have a picture-perfect event or wedding!!
author: Meaghan and Jeremy Gauvain

body: We LOVED working with Ling! She was personable and kind. She honestly felt like part of our family. She wasn't one of those crazy photographers who runs around and tries to get the perfect shot, but is really in the way. Ling communicates well with her clients and does her best to make you feel at ease leading up to your special day. My husband and I loved Ling's style - more moving shots versus the typical point and shoot. I would absolutely recommend contacting Ling for your wedding photos. She is one in a million! Worth every penny. I can't wait to see her photos from that day.
author: Mariah Glory

body: Ling and her team at Trailing Twine are exceptional to work with! Ling has been so attentive and responsive from the moment I made an inquiry all the way up until the big day. My husband and I had a small non-traditional wedding at a beautiful outdoor venue and it was so nice to work with a team who understood that even though our wedding was small it was just as much a celebration! They understood the type of photos we wanted, made us feel so comfortable, and really must’ve taken thousands of photos. I honestly cannot recommend Trailing Twine Photography LLC enough, they captured our day perfectly!
author: Rachel Frye

body:
My husband and I stumbled upon Trailing Twine Photography through our venue’s list of recommended vendors. Choosing to work with Ling was one of the best decisions we made during our wedding planning process.

We were unsure of where to have our engagement photos taken - wanting both an ocean and more rustic setting. Ling took the time do scope out Colt State Park in Rhode Island and found us the best of both worlds! She found gorgeous stone walls and stunning ocean views all in the same area.

Ling took time to sit down with us after our engagement session to find out what we liked and what we didn’t like. She noted every detail to ensure we got our favorite shots on our wedding day.

On the day of our wedding Ling was absolutely phenomenal. She made sure we got all of the important shots and managed time so we were still able to enjoy our wedding with family and friends. We cannot say enough great things about working with Ling! Thank you!!
author: Mallori Morrison

body:
Ben was an absolute dream to work with for our wedding day. He was so easy going and easy to communicate with throughout the entire process. The quality of his work is simply stunning, beautiful, and creative.
Ben had so many different poses ready and took some truly breathtaking rooftop photos of us. He even gave us a photo right after the reception and a sneak peek set two days later! Ben is so kind and easy to get along with, and he kept us on track and was very knowledgeable. His photos are absolutely stunning and I would recommend him a million times over.
author: Andi

body:
We had such a wonderful experience with Ben and his 2nd photographer, Zee. Ben was very on-the-ball and reliable during the whole wedding process; he communicates clearly and made us feel so comfortable and relaxed taking all the photos. He has incredible talent and our wedding album was more beautiful than we could have ever imagined or hoped for.

Photography is such an important wedding aspect, and there's no one else I would've felt so comfortable holding that responsibility than Ben. Ben and Zee captured every little moment and emotion felt on our wedding day and I'm grateful we will be able to relive the day through their photos. I will definitely be recommending Ben to my friends and family for their weddings and any photoshoot needs!
author: Mihoko S.

body:
Our wedding day was made even more magical thanks to our incredible photographer. From the moment he arrived, his high spirits and warm demeanor put us at ease. He was more than just a photographer; he was a friend who helped with the little details and even joined our celebration, making the day feel even more special.

The photos he captured were beyond our wildest dreams—artistic, unique, and absolutely stunning. We were thrilled to receive our sneak peeks just two days after the wedding, and they took our breath away. We already knew we were in good hands from his previous work and the beautiful engagement shoot he did for us, but the wedding photos truly blew us away. Our friends and family couldn't stop raving about him and his second shooter, Zee.

If we could, we'd give him a 1000/10. His talent and kindness made our day unforgettable, and we can't wait to see the rest of the photos. Thank you for capturing our love story so perfectly.
author: Amber Parker

body: Ben was our photographer for our wedding in June this year & he went above and beyond. Day of he was there on time, did such a fantastic job of hearding the bridal party around and making sure he got the perfect shots. His partner that day was also very sweet and diligent. Ben was incredibly helpful with planning out the day, and got all of the pictures that we wanted. The album came out better than I ever could have hoped for. He also got the full edited album to us within a month of our wedding date, which is impressive. The photos were gorgeous and captured the best moments of all parts of the day. I highly recommend Ben for whatever kind of photoshoot you’re looking for because he will not disappoint!
author: Morrisa

body: Ben was great to work with; he was always easy to get ahold of leading up to the wedding. Was very accommodating with different ideas we had for our wedding. Ben was brilliant to work with and calmed me down with all the madness around me. He helped keep us on track throughout the day. He talked with us prior to the wedding helping create a timeline to keep us on track throughout the day. Ben and Z were a great team and captured our wedding perfectly. We have so many amazing pictures and the quality is incredible. I cannot believe that it is us in the photos. Thank you for creating these beautiful memories for us, I will never stop looking at these photographs. Ben is professional, creative, talented, passionate, and punctual. He gives you an easy link to share your pictures with friends and family. Again thank you for everything and the amazing work!
author: Jacqueline Reynolds

body: Having Formal Indulgence be part of my wedding day was one of the best decisions I made! The espresso, cappuccino, and lattes were delicious! The service was amazing and my guests loved learning about the beautiful espresso machine. Formal Indulgence kept us energized and dancing all night long! This was definitely a crowd pleaser and I would highly recommend including this service in any event you have!
author: Rachel Tedstone

body: Formal Indulgence was an incredible addition to our wedding, and their full espresso bar was an absolute hit with our guests! Guy was fantastic to work with—he was professional, friendly, and made the entire process seamless. The espresso bar added such a fun and unique touch to the day, and our guests couldn't stop raving about it. Highly recommend Formal Indulgence for anyone looking to elevate their event with a special, memorable experience!
author: Malena Zanjani

body: 10/10 recommend!!! The owners, Guy & Marco are amazing… and legit! Formal Indulgence is a fantastic business. It was extremely important to me to have a high quality coffee bar at our wedding, and when I reached out to inquire from Formal Indulgence, I looked no further. These guys made the process seamless and for a great price. On top of that, the coffee and service all around was top notch. These guys are reliable, authentic, kind, organized, hardworking, and respectful as a service and as individuals. Four months later, everyone is still raving about the coffee bar at the wedding, haha! Thank you for everything gentlemen— you were a huge part of our PERFECT day!
author: Wesley Paulsen

body: We have used this company twice in the last year for large corporate events, and they never disappoint. Not only is it the best coffee/ espresso / etc we have ever tasted, but the service and friendliness of the men are unmatched. Top quality in every way and highly recommended for any large or small event!
author: Danielle Braca

body: Marco and Guy are wonderful to work with. They setup beautifully and arrived early. Highly recommend the bronze machine. It was a beautiful addition to our dessert table. I’m a big coffee lover so this was a must!
author: Danielle Mihai

body: I met Alyssa back in 2023 at my friend Emily’s gender reveal where she was the photographer. Before even seeing her incredible photo quality, I just knew I would want her to capture my wedding day in the future due to her sweet and caring personality. Once I saw how beautiful Emily’s pictures turned out, it was just the cherry on top. I hired Alyssa for my wedding this past September 2024 and I cannot even begin to explain how breathtaking our photos turned out (not to mention the photos from our engagement session!!). Alyssa made my husband, I, and all of our friends and family feel extremely comfortable and made sure to capture everything I had asked for and MiORE! Alyssa’s professionalism is unmatched and I cannot recommend her enough. Thank you again Alyssa for the most gorgeous photos and I cannot wait to have you shoot for my family again in the future.
author: Nia Tofel

body: She is truly amazing at what she does and she is such a fun person to work with. She is very communicative throughout the booking process, and makes you feel comfortable and instructs you how to pose during your shoot. We have worked with Alyssa for holiday photos, pet portraits, and weddings. I cannot recommend Alyssa enough for all of your photography needs!
author: Chelsea Nelsen

body: We have used Alyssa for all different kinds of photo shoots and she is just simply amazing! She is personable and makes your session with her comfortable and enjoyable. She is creative in her work, very attentive to detail, communicates thoroughly before, during and after a session and is prompt in her delivery! Alyssa was also a photographer at our wedding and was very helpful. She jumped right in to anything we needed whether it was photo related or not. We were so happy and grateful to have her be a part of our special day! She is passionate about her work and I would highly recommend her for any and all of your photo needs!
author: Angela Caputo

body: Working with Alyssa was a wonderful experience! We chose a photoshoot at the beach and the weather ended up being windier than we expected. She knew exactly how and where to pose us with the wind to get the best shots. Alyssa is not only very professional, but is also incredibly kind, has an amazing sense of humor, and was willing to go with the flow.  Our daughter had some ideas of her own for pictures, and Alyssa went right along with them. Editing time did not take long at all, and the pictures came out beautiful! I highly recommend Alyssa if you need a photographer, and I will definitely use her again!
author: Jen Mastrianni

body: I originally met Alyssa while she was the photographer for a wedding I was in. I instantly connected to the energy she brought. She made getting photos done, fun! Since then I’ve used her for family photos and she never disappoints! She is wonderful to work with, very attentive and patient. She listens to what your vision is and brings it to the next level!! Her work speaks for itself and I recommend her every chance I get.
author: jamie pelletier

body:
Courtney photographed our wedding in June 2024 and I couldn't be happier.

The sneak peak photos so far have been absolutely unreal and stunning. I feel so beautiful in every single one. Courtney truly did an incredible job and captured the vibe of the venue and entire day. We will cherish these photos for a lifetime to come.

I couldn't recommend Courtney enough. From our very first meeting, to our engagement photos to our wedding day, Courtney made the process so seamless and made us feel so comfortable in front of the camera.
author: Jackie Cortina

body: Courtney is an absolute pleasure to work with. She has a great creative style and gives direction when needed in order to get the perfect shot. She is fun and you can really tell she loves what she is doing. Also she has a quick turnaround time for photos!! I will be using her again in the future for all and any event!
author: Alyse Van Liew

body: Courtney was absolutely marvelous! She is incredibly talented and super easy to work with. We were looking to get very candid and in the moment photos of our engagement party and she did exactly that. We look back and it feels like we are inside the day again. Thank you!!!
author: Ally Giarratana

body:
courtney is amazing.

she made the process flawless- from booking the studio space to offering different creative ideas for the session. i did my bridal portraits with her and was able to bring all of my details. we danced to music and had the best time. i loved being able to celebrate my “bride” stage and capture all of my emotions about getting married.

she was about to make me feel so beautiful and really, ive never been more obsessed with photos of myself.

if you are on the fence about booking a session for any reason, just do it. i know my future child will love + appreciate these photos for years to come.
author: Tiffany Aronne

body: Courtney captured our engagement photos this past April and we love every single one!!! We were so unsure to take engagement photos because of how awkward we are but she made us feel so comfortable the entire time. Courtney was so sweet and she was extremely responsive. I would recommend her to anyone!!!!
author: Justice Jones

body:
Grand View was the perfect venue for our wedding! The outdoor architecture and lakeside views were absolutely unmatched, creating the most breathtaking backdrop for our day. The venue had plenty of space for our guests, and the food was absolutely amazing - our guests could not stop talking about it!

The staff made everything seamless and stress-free. Our coordinator, Erin, went above and beyond to ensure every detail was perfect. If you are looking for a venue that combines stunning views and exceptional service, and incredible food, Grand View is it! It truly made our day unforgettable!
author: Erin Deacon

body: Our wedding at Grand View was absolutely incredible and an amazing experience. The venue itself is stunning and the wedding package a great deal. From the elegant interior and the picturesque outdoor space by the water, it was everything we had hoped for and more despite the light rain showers during the ceremony and cocktail hour. Our venue coordinator Tatiana and the staff were fantastic and helped really make our day special. Tatiana was thoughtful, super resourceful, and always on top of things. From our first meeting to the big day she made everything run as smoothly as possible, helped us navigate through the planning with ease and offered creative solutions to challenges we had. Tatiana and the team genuine care and attentiveness made us feel completely at ease and allowed us to truly enjoy the moment even with all the unexpected hurdles and time delay we faced that day. I highly recommend Grand View and even more with Tatiana in your team. It was a truly unforgettable beautiful experience. I also highly recommend planner @flawlessevents_designs and decorator @premium_events_decor they were also truly amazing and helped make the day incredibly special and beautiful as well.
author: Lynn Colon

body:
The first thing I want to say is Grand View is a well-oiled machine. Excellent communication with the staff from the beginning of our journey through the end of our reception. Erin Dean is phenomenal at what she does as an Event Specialist with Grand View. Our ceremony went perfectly as planned. The food, drinks, and service was excellent and everyone had a great time. Several of our guests went out of their way to express that this was the best wedding they have ever been to. Cudos to all at Grand View. Keep up the fine work.

Love,
Jillian & Tim
author: Tim Matheson

body: You don't get better than the Grand View! I love photographing weddings here, it's a photographer's dream. The team there truly care about their couples and are some of the friendliest event pros you'll meet. There are multiple options for the ceremony, including indoor and outdoors and the view of the lake is amazing. I also really love the cocktail hour spaces. The guests are always floored when they walk outside and see the view.
author: Whiting Photography

body: Grand View is a top-notch wedding venue with a very inclusive package that made planning so much easier. Kelly was always SUPER responsive, accommodating, and amazing to work with despite our many, many questions. The venue's cocktail lounge and ballroom with fireplace are beautiful, even the bridal suite and bathrooms are beautifully decorated, and of course the outdoor space on the lake with the terrazza are the show-stoppers and there are so many areas around the property for photos. They accommodated our signature cocktails and their food was really good with many creative and seasonal options to pick from - in fact, their food tasting event was our favorite part of planning and they gifted each couple artwork! Their package included our cake, a full dining set-up, linens with many fabric and color options, printed name cards, votive candles, table numbers, sign stands, and more, and they were completely flexible to arrange the spaces and decorate how we wanted. They hosted a great rehearsal, and our coordinator even came to our dinner when I forgot something at the venue! They decorated everything perfectly and were very attentive to us during the wedding - they even made sure to come up to our sweetheart table to wish us a wonderful first dinner as newlyweds! The only slight con was that they've had some recent turnover, so our day-of coordinator changed 4 times. For us, it was early in our planning so it didn't have much of an impact when it really mattered towards the end. But does make me wonder what's going on and whether the timing was more impactful for other couples.
author: Catherine Mielnik

body: Kayti captured both our engagement and wedding so beautifully. We loved working with her. She is so kind, supportive, perfectly “instructive” (we needed it!), and the best hype gal to have around during such a special day. It felt like we were spending the day with a friend who just happened to capture the most incredible photos of us. We were very adamant that we wanted to be fully present for our day and not distracted by pictures, Kayti helped us do this with her unique documentary style approach. The photos feel so “real” and so “us”. I love every sneak peak picture we received and I can’t wait to see the rest.
author: Molly Volk-Britton

body: Kayti was amazing. Not only did she donate her time but she was a complete angel and was so patient with our family. Kayti will forever be apart of some of the last good memories we have with our mom as she captured some stunning Christmas photos for us to hold dear to our hearts once our mom passes in the next few weeks to months. We cannot say enough kind works or enough Thank you's to show our gratitude.
author: Cassandra Ball

body: Having Luna + Lion Photo Co at our wedding was one of the best wedding decisions we had made. Kayti put in the time to get to know us and make us feel comfortable during our engagement shoot and wedding day shoot. We were nervous for the sessions as we tend to freeze up and become shy in front of a camera, however Kayti made the whole experience so intimate and fun! Our favorite and most memorable part of the wedding ended up being the photo sessions with Kayti! Kayti's vision is out of this world and if we had to pick again, we would choose her a million times again!
author: Alicia Kim

body: Luna + Lion Photo Co was amazing to work with! Kayti made the engagement photo experience feel natural to us, when we aren't ones to get our photos taken often! She had great ideas of poses, locations of the property we went to, and always had us genuinely smiling. I couldn't be happier of the photos that we received.
author: Jaynie Woodard

body: Kayti with Luna+Lion is such a skilled photographer and editor, a great communicator, and she made us feel so comfortable in front of the camera! She has excellent suggestions for posing, knew how to make us laugh, delivered THEE MOST GORGEOUS photos in record time! When my husband and I opened our gallery we cried! She captured our love on a smoky September day in the mountains! We can’t wait to print these and hang them in our home. Thank you thank you thank you Kayti!
author: Ellie V

body: I had SUCH a positive experience with this business!! Lauren and Vika made sure my bridal hair looked STUNNING and were so personable during the process and made sure my concerns were heard! If there’s one thing I’m going to do, it’s support a woman owned business and I would recommend LA Page Makeup to anyone whether it be for bridal purposes or any occasion you deem special! I’ve seen Lauren in action doing makeup and hair for a client that wasn’t myself and she’s extremely efficient and I would trust her to do my makeup any day!🫶🏻
author: Noelle Esposito

body: I am a woman in my late 60s and I just felt like I looked dull and needed some help. I had a wonderful experience. I wanted something that looked natural but brightened my face. Lauren suggested I use a different color blush, brow color and lipstick, and sparkle up my eyes a bit while still looking natural. She was on target. I did the 1 on 1 where she did half my face and I repeated the steps on the other side so I would know how to use the makeup. Very pleased with the results. She was patient about my taking notes and writing down the names and colors of some of the products she used.  It was worth every penny and it was fun.
author: Sydney Rowland

body:
There are not enough words to express my gratitude and describe how incredible Lauren is. Your make up artist is with you for the majority of your wedding morning and I feel so lucky to have had the privilege of having Lauren there. She is kind, communicative, makes you feel special, and all around brings the best energy. We chose our vendor team very carefully and it was hands down one of the best decisions to have LA Page there. Lauren and Vanessa were absolutely phenomenal. Everyone in my bridal party felt SO beautiful and at home with them it was so much fun. The entire day still feels like a dream and they made everything feel so seamless.

Lauren truly has a special gift and is so very talented. Thank you for everything, you are simply the best!
author: Nicole Green

body: Lauren and her team are top notch! From the first email, Lauren was always responsive and answered all questions. Lauren and her team went above and beyond to make sure I was happy with my hair/makeup during and after the trial. Day of the wedding everything went seamlessly! I highly recommend LA Page Makeup!
author: Margaret Bradley

body: This was a new experience for me as I prepare for my wedding and Lauren was AMAZING! Without knowing when I booked, she has done make up for a photoshoot for me previously. She makes you feel comfortable and welcome and explains the whole process while she does the service. I cannot wait to book again :)
author: Jenni D

body: DJ El Sid was hands down the best wedding DJ EVER! Fusion Function Entertainment is the way to go for your big day. From our initial meeting to our wedding reception, Sidney was professional and down to earth. The platform to upload music was so easy to use and exactly what we needed. From the cocktail hour to our old Indian wedding traditions to tearing up the dance floor, DJ El Sid didn’t miss a beat. Everyone was on the dance floor having the time of their lives. We received SO many compliments about our DJ; people had the time of their lives at our wedding, which just makes us so happy. DJ El Sid emceed perfectly. He was engaging, professional, courteous, and did everything we asked of him. The entire Fusion Function team was so professional, from early set up at the venue to ending the night on a high note with our last dance to Frank Sinatra. We cannot recommend Fusion Function and DJ El Sid enough. If I had to re-do the whole thing over and over again, every time I’d pick Fusion Function for our wedding DJ needs.
author: Sam Hoyt

body: We hired Dj El Sid before he went live with his company Fusion Function. We chose Sid because we knew we wanted a club scene/vibe for our wedding but incorporate Vietnamese and Caribbean music as well as other cultural music during the wedding. Sid KILLED IT. We had a blast at our wedding and know who we will be hiring for all events from now on. All of my guests loved Sid and asked me to pass along his information so they can book him for their events. You cannot go wrong when booking DJ El Sid! He created a great vibe for sure!
author: Jennifer Mai

body: DJ El Sid is the best! He DJ'd my cousin's wedding two years ago, and after that night, I knew I wanted Sid to DJ my wedding. Sid and his team truly exceeded all our expectations! The music selection was perfect, and the uplighting transformed our venue into a magical space. Also, the photo booth was a huge hit with our guests! Thank you for making our wedding day unforgettable!
author: Stefany Araujo

body:
Sid did my wedding a month ago!  And I have to say he’s the best around! I’ve been to and in a lot of weddings and he did the most amazing job! Guests were happy and are still telling me how much fun and what an amazing job he did!

You can really tell he passionate and really cares about each couples special day!

His prices are reasonable but he could charge double and it still be worth every penny
author: Michelle Burns

body:
I cannot say enough good things about DJ El Sid. First, he's an excellent DJ. He got the crowd going (and we didn't have a big crowd), he read the room well, and he was an expert at engaging with our party. His website is also very user friendly and he checked in with us a few times before the big day. He was also a phenomenal MC. He ran an excellent hora (and one side of the family had never done the hora). Everyone had a blast!

But we saw him go from great to excellent in how thoroughly prepared he was. Only two hours into our reception, the entire town lost power! We were cooked. It was possible that the wedding was over. But if you can believe it, DJ El Sid brought a generator with him. He saved our reception. He also brought a few tower lights that kept the dance floor illuminated so that we could still dance.

Hire him! You will not be disappointed!
author: Ben Gawlik

body: With a Splash provided bar (cocktail and mocktail) services for my recent photography studio launch event. The team was timely, set up quickly, dressed professionally and served all attendees with a smile. Their drinks were delicious and on theme with the season and event overall. Guests continually commented on how delicious the beverages were and how kind the staff was. So grateful for with a splash and all they did to help make my event a success! THANK YOU! I can’t wait to use your services again in the future!
author: Jennifer Denton

body: Super easy to coordinate our event with quick communication and creative suggestions/ideas. The event was fantastic and all of the attendees of our employee party were so impressed with the drinks & mocktails as well as the customer service of Alex and her staff. Thank you!
author: Michelle Coster

body:
This business pays attention to detail.
The drinks here are phenomenal and bartenders are so knowledgeable and so nice.
author: kate glendon

body: Had an amazing experience with this mobile bar! The drinks were fantastic, and the service was exceptional. The team was professional, friendly, and really added a special touch to our event. Highly recommend!
author: Ybelka Ortiz

body: I had the pleasure of enjoying some amazing mocktails at a networking event courtesy of With a Splash Mobile Bar. There was a fruity sangria and colorful lemonade and both were awesome; a refreshing change to have non-alcoholic drinks at a social event, beyond water or seltzer. Beautifully crafted and indistinguishable from the real thing by sight, non drinkers can socialize comfortably without questions or judgement. As an event professional myself, I look forward to seeing them at another event and would highly recommend!
author: Kathy V

body:
We recently had the pleasure of working with Dawson Entertainment for our wedding at Shepherd's Run in South Kingstown, RI, this November, and they truly exceeded our expectations beyond belief. From start to finish, their exceptional service made our wedding night unforgettable.

The DJ was absolutely phenomenal, perfectly enhancing the most memorable moments of our wedding with spot-on song selections. They even went the extra mile to help us cut down our first dance song, which avoided a potentially long and awkward moment and made it feel seamless and romantic. Their expertise and attention to detail truly shined throughout the evening.

The photo booth attendant was equally outstanding. They made everyone feel at home and created such a fun and welcoming atmosphere. Guests of all ages couldn’t stop talking about how much they enjoyed the experience. The service they provided was the best we could have asked for!

The lighting, LOVE sign, and name projection were absolutely perfect, adding a magical touch to the venue. These details elevated the ambiance and made our wedding beyond anything we could have ever dreamed of.

We cannot recommend Dawson Entertainment highly enough. If you're looking for a team that goes above and beyond to deliver exceptional results, they’re the ones to choose. We look forward to working with them again in the future! Thank you for helping make our wedding day absolutely perfect.
author: Jayson matias

body:
Cheeehooo~ JD was always my top choice for our DJ & lighting for our wedding!
He brought such the perfect vibes throughout our entire day!
From a soft opening for the ceremony, to a little more upbeat for the social hour, with the perfect 1st dance and exciting reception! Jason is exceptionally talented, he takes consideration for all the details & treats you like family!
Jason, helped create lasting memories for our special day!
He is the guy for the job!
Happy Wedding
author: Malari McMurtery

body: John did a fantastic job as our wedding DJ! He really took into account our music preferences and made sure to smoothly execute all the small details of the night. We had a blast on the dance floor all night and so did our guests (we got many compliments from guests on how good our DJ was!) Thank you to Jason as well for his coordination with our ceremony musicians on the equipment prior to the wedding. All in all, Dawson entertainment is a great team to work with, and we'd highly recommend!
author: Alexa LaBaw

body: We’re SO happy we went with Dawson Entertainment for our wedding day. John was so cool and easy to work with as well as a fantastic, talented DJ! He went with the flow of things and created the perfect vibe we were looking for on our special day. Dawson Entertainment framed the lyrics from our first dance as a wedding gift which really meant a lot to Ryan and me and was such a nice personal touch. Also really appreciated the photo booth and the scrapbook they constructed with photos of our guests as a memorabilia. Highly recommend Dawson Entertainment for your big day!
author: Melissa Baranowski

body: Having Dawson Entertainment as our DJ for our wedding was one of the best decisions we could have ever made! It was great getting to know and work with Jason. He truly was able to capture the vibe and vision of what we wanted for the wedding. They are very organized and detailed oriented when picking what music you want played for each part of the wedding and trust me you won’t forget all the tiny details that go into picking your music. Jason was so kind and truly listens to how you want the day to go.  He kept the dance floor going all night long and nobody wanted it to end!
author: Kate Barry

body: We hired Mark and his crew for our corporate event in January with literally a few weeks notice. He was very communicative from the get go and understood what we needed and wanted for the event. Mark brought the house down!!! From emcee to song selections to crowd interaction and the photo booth was awesome! I highly recommend hiring Mark for your DJ needs! We have him on speed dial for all our corporate events!
author: terri-lynn hart

body: Mark is absolutely the best DJ we have encountered. His personality radiates in the room and his experience shows in his craft. The biggest compliment we received from guests at our wedding was the DJ and the music he played. This is a DJ that truly cares about his job and goes above and beyond for his couples. The uplighting was perfect for our theme. The Photo Booth was an absolute hit. 10/10 recommend Mark, book him ASAP!
author: Rachael Lesperance

body:
We hired Mark from JAM Events DJs for our New Years Eve wedding and we thought working with Mark and his team was fabulous. Right from when we hired Mark he was easy to work with, communicated well and was flexible during our wedding. We loved how he asked what songs we definitely wanted played, if we were dedicating songs to anyone and he was very hands on with helping us decide on song and song length. We had a meeting with Mark a few weeks before the wedding and he was very organized. During the day of our wedding I missed a few things and Mark  worked with us on being flexible and adding a few things in. We really appreciated how easy going Mark was on those little last minute details.
During our wedding Mark even had a special detail for my husband and I on his DJ screen and he made our wedding extra special with the New Years Count down! My husband and I and our guests are still talking about the music and how the dance floor was packed the whole night!!  Mark was a great DJ and I would recommend him to anyone getting married! Thank you for making our Wedding so Special and Fun!!
author: Maggi Nicolett

body: This DJ was so kind, understanding, and above all a great DJ! He made sure everything was in check for my shoe game at the wedding my first dance everything! Would totally recommend him for future events to my friends and family!
author: Korrie Tucker

body:
Mark was the DJ for my wedding and my wife and I couldn't be more pleased. He was meticulous to make sure all of the details were correct and that the day would go off without a hitch. When I wanted to change the order of events and suggest new songs on the day of the wedding, he adjusted on the fly perfectly, and he brought a great, consistent energy throughout the night. Afterwards, many guests raved about how great of a job he did.

If you're looking for a DJ, you search ends here - pick Mark Senior Jr / Jam Event DJs!
author: Steve

body: A friend referred us. We had a positive experience selecting a suit, shirt, and tie for my teenage son for school events. Since he is still growing the alterations were made to allow for more length and width of the fabric to be used in the future. The custom alterations really do look sharp - and very noticeable when compared to more generically sized suits. Will return for our other sons. Thank you!
author: Lynn Pantuosco-Hensch

body:
If you’re looking for a high quality suit that feels like it was made just for you, L&A Fine Men’s Shop is THE place to go. I found myself in a pinch, needing a suit on short notice, and Audrin delivered in every way possible. From the moment I walked in, he exuded professionalism, warmth, and expertise.

Audrin doesn’t really need measurements—he eyed me up with an almost magical precision and somehow tailored a suit that fits like a glove. The craftsmanship was spot-on, and the turnaround time? Just one day. ONE DAY.

What’s more, he worked with me on price, ensuring the whole experience stayed affordable without sacrificing quality. Every interaction was seamless, and it was clear he genuinely cared about getting it right.

I’ll be back for all my future suiting needs, without a doubt. Thank you, Audrin, for making me feel confident, sharp, and ready for the occasion. L&A deserves more than five stars—it deserves your business.
author: AJ Malloy

body:
I recently had the pleasure of shopping for a high-quality men's suit at L & A Fine Men's Shop. From the moment I stepped into the store, I was impressed by the owner, Audrin Desardouin's expertise and confidence. He not only recommended several excellent suit options but also offered tailored suggestions for complete outfits, including shirts, ties, and shoes.

The quality of the suits was exceptional, and Audrin's tailoring skills were equally impressive. The alterations he made to my chosen suit were flawless, ensuring a perfect fit that exceeded my expectations. I was pleasantly surprised when he insisted I skip trying on the altered suit before picking it up. Audrin's confidence in his work was well-founded, as the suit fit me like a glove.

Beyond the product and service, Audrin's charming personality and confident demeanor made the shopping experience enjoyable and stress-free. His ability to put me at ease and provide expert guidance was invaluable. I would highly recommend L & A Fine Men's Shop to anyone seeking a high-quality men's suit and exceptional customer service.
author: Ivan PopStefanija

body:
Exceptional Style, Unmatched Service

I cannot speak highly enough of this shop and its incredible owner. I was preparing to be the keynote speaker at a major event, pressed for time, and still traveling when I reached out.

Despite my late arrival, the owner graciously kept the doors open just for me.

From the moment I walked in, he delivered impeccable, personalized service without rushing me. His attention to detail, expertise in men's fashion, and genuine care for making sure I looked my absolute best for the event were truly impressive.

If you're seeking high-quality, expertly selected men's clothing, I HIGHLY recommend paying a visit. This shop is a standout destination for anyone who values style and top-tier service.
author: Bob Manning

body: I went in for one or two sport coats but left with two full suits, another sport coat, and three dress shirts along with some sound advice and a greatly improved mood. The owner was super helpful, his alterations were perfect, and it was a great experience overall. Also, the prices were completely reasonable. I'll be going back for sure.
author: Lee Spector

body: RI Best kept secret! During the off-season this hidden gem continues to provide an amazing atmosphere beside the ocean waves with excellent cuisine and exceptional service! I recently attended a Valentine’s Day dinner that made me feel like I was  in a romantic movie. 🌹 What a fantastic place to propose, celebrate a wedding, anniversary, shower, family reunion or other special event!  Most people don’t know that you don’t have to be a member to experience this beautiful venue.  If you’re lucky enough to be a member you get to enjoy this piece of paradise all summer as well! 🏖️
author: joni hodges

body:
To say Emily made our dreams come true is an understatement.  From the moment we met, we were immediately impressed with her positive attitude, attention to detail, and organization.  We fell in love with the venue initially, but now upon reflecting, it was the collective efforts of the staff of Galilee Beach Club that we will forever cherish and appreciate for the rest of our lives.

Emily patiently listened and worked hard throughout the entire process, answering endless emails from me, while collaborating with Chris, the manager, Chef Rob, and the rest of her event staff to make all of our ideas come to life.  Emily’s planning meetings along the way were focused, thorough, and super informative.  She made time (even during her hectic season) for us, always.  We trusted her completely with our vision and she knocked it out of the park.

For me, I was in awe of her attention to the little things… the plate of hors douerves delivered to the bridal suite for us right after the ceremony, the signature drinks in our toasting flutes during dinner, the floating candles she suggested for the sweet heart table, right down to Emily locating our missing marriage license! She did it all with grace and ease.  On top of the beautiful set up, Emily and her team packed up everything (and I mean everything!) into my car that night which truly was an unbelievable service.

Chris, the General Manager, was our officiant and he was incredible.  We had only met Chris a handful of times before we got married, but we felt as if he was one of our good friends.  He knew exactly what we were looking for and we couldn’t have asked for a better ceremony.  And the food!  Everything was out of this world.  Multiple guests claimed the short rib was the best they ever had.  Chef Rob’s seared tuna steaks were prepared to perfection, even impressing a room full of tuna fishermen, which is certainly not an easy feat!

The Galilee Beach Club is a warm, welcoming, highly professional, full service, simply spectacular place to get married.  Our wedding surpassed our wildest dreams, which was undoubtedly the result of the hard work and long hours put in by Emily, Chris, Rob and the rest of the event staff at GBC.  As two native Rhode Islanders and Galilee locals, we could not have had a more perfect setting for one of the most memorable days of our lives. We are forever grateful to have worked with such a remarkable team.
author: Molly Tierney

body: The Galilee Beach Club was an amazing venue for our wedding. From the beginning, they were incredibly communicative and responsive, making the planning process smooth and stress-free. The location itself was absolutely beautiful. The staff was also incredibly attentive and organized, ensuring that everything ran seamlessly on the day of the wedding. And the food? Absolutely delicious! Our guests raved about the quality and variety of the menu. Overall, the Galilee Beach Club exceeded our expectations and contributed greatly to making our wedding day truly unforgettable.
author: Kennedy Phillips

body: Just had my son's wedding here this past weekend. Unbelievable venue! Emily and her crew were incredible! They thought of everything and were on top of it all the whole time! Anything we needed, they had it. The bartenders were so fast and friendly and the food was OUTSTANDING. From the ceremony, the appetizers, the meal, the pastries, the after food, all the way to the firepits on the beach it was the kind of wedding people dream about :)
author: James McLaughlin

body: My husband and I got married in June 2023 at Galilee Beach Club. Emily and the staff made our day absolutely wonderful! Emily was fantastic to work with. She's very organized, and made the planning process so easy. The day of, everyone at the club was on board working to make everything perfect. We had to go with the flow a little due to the weather and no one missed a beat despite switching up the schedule to work with the rain. The food was delicious, drinks were great, and the night went off without a hitch thanks to the amazing team at Galilee Beach Club!!
author: Ashlee Van Deusen

body:
Dawn is amazing!!! Her work is incredible and is very particular to color matching.
I kept adding stuff as we got closer, and she had zero problem adapting.
The wooden flowers MADE our wedding and I could not be happier ! Such an amazing experience with someone so talented.
author: Hannah

body: Wood flowers are the way to go! The flowers were perfect for my wedding and all my bridesmaids and groomsmen were able to keep their bouquets and boutonnieres. My bouquet is now a permanent decor piece in the house as I don't have to worry about flowers wilting. Sunrise Creations is very affordable, especially for a large wedding party.
