Also, Dawn was wonderful to work with. She kept me up to date with the entire process, even when it came to dying the flowers, she checked with me on the color to make sure it was right. It was the right decision for my day and I can't recommend Sunrise Creations and Dawn enough! Thank you for helping make my day so special!
author: Monica Trotochaud

body: Dawn was super friendly and accommodating!!! She sent pictures throughout the whole process to make sure I loved the colors and was happy. When I received the flowers, I was in awe how beautiful they are. My bridesmaids are also in love with them. She did an AMAZING job!!!! great quality and great colors! ❤️
author: Rachel Hubeny

body:
Oh my goodness! What a wonderful experience I have had with Dawn and Sunrise Floral Creations. I met her at the Mohegan Bridal Show and just knew I had to incorporate her beautiful hand crafted wood flowers into my wedding! I could not believe how realistic they look! So much better than silk flowers and SOO much much more budget friendly than real flowers,  that will only end up ultimately dying!!

Dawn created a magnificent custom floral arrangement for my wedding, nearly matching my bouquet! We intend to use her creation at our welcome table. They will be first thing my guests see when they walk into the the venue.  They absolutely deserve the spotlight!

Dawn also included multiple single flowers on toothpicks that we will use as decorations for our cake!

Dawn was accommodating, friendly, and went above and beyond my expectations. She was a great communicator and showed me her progress along the way and even finished way ahead of schedule! Dawn was even so kind as to find AND buy the antique vases and fairy lights for the arrangement! As a bonus, she met me half way to drop off the finished project!

I wish all wedding planning was as easy as Dawn had made this experience for me. with her help, I can actually keep a beautiful part of my wedding forever.

Highly recommended!!

(P.S — More pictures to follow after the wedding!!!)
author: Melissa Norman

body: Absolutely amazing!!!!! Dawn went over and beyond for us and it made the aesthetic of our wedding come to life. She helped us so much with a creative direction and gave us such unique artwork. I would recommend for everyone to use Dawn for your wedding florist. She even made my sister a beautiful hair comb she wore at the wedding
author: Jennifer Trantalis

body: When I met Morayo at a bridal show what struck me about her body of work was how vivid, happy and RELAXED everyone was in their pictures. After working with her, I now know why. She was a blast to work with!! As someone who doesn't like having their picture taken I felt completely at ease with Mo. From our engagement session and our wedding we have two sets of amazing photos that completely capture how my husband and I feel about each other and the mood of the day. I couldn't be happier with how our wedding photos turned out. She even ran across a parking lot covered in a trash bag in the pouring rain to capture the one image I truly wanted from my day. All that effort was worth it because the image she captured was spectacular. My only problem is there are so many great photos I have trouble picking which ones are my favorite!!!
author: Julie Pytel

body:
I never knew how much I needed someone like Mo in my life. I had my engagement photoshoot and wedding photography done with Piper Brown Photography.  Shear talent alone- 5 out of 5, but Mo has much more to bring to the table. Her personality, quality of care, and love of what she does shines through on your wedding day- and the photography that you get to keep for your life. She was one of the most valuable players to have on my wedding team- and I recommend adding her to yours.

Also to note- I only danced with 3 people at my wedding. One of them was Mo.
author: Kimberly Haskins

body: If you’re anything like me, photographs are what you consider most important when thinking about your big day…but look no further, Piper Brown Photography is the top choice! Morayo is an absolute gem; she has great communication and time management skills, she is prompt, personable, fun, and (of course) she takes amazing pictures! During our wedding we had an unexpected schedule change and Morayo was extremely flexible and accommodating. We were absolutely thrilled when we received our wedding pictures back, and we can’t thank her enough.
author: Serena Macari

body:
Mo was an absolute pleasure to work with from the pre-wedding planning through the actual day of and review of our photos. We had initially booked a different photographer for a May 2020 wedding but when we had to postpone our wedding to October 2021 due to COVID, we also had to find a new photographer. We loved Mo’s style and she was extremely responsive as soon as we reached out to her. She was very straightforward and simple with her explanation of pricing/services offered and it never felt like she was trying to sell us anything we didn’t need or want. She made sure she understood our vision for the day and the photos and then helped develop a photographer bundle that worked within our budget. She was very organized and we felt very comfortable with the photography plan leading up to the wedding. She made sure to keep track of what photos we wanted/who we wanted photos with so she could create a schedule. On the day of the wedding, she was an absolute hit! My husband and I had already grown to love her, but all of the wedding party, family and friends remarked on how fun and energetic she was. She made us all feel very comfortable during the photos and made sure we were enjoying ourselves as well. She did a really nice job with organizing the types and timing of photos to minimize the time we and our wedding party spent away from the cocktail hour and the party. The pictures themselves turned out fantastic - we absolutely love them and will cherish them forever. There are also A TON of them, which allows us to relive the day through photos!

My only critique was the timing of receiving the photos after the wedding. I know it was a busy fall/winter wedding season for Mo, so much of this may have been out of her control. We had an initial meeting set up to review our photos about 4 weeks after the wedding. We unfortunately had to reschedule and weren’t able to get another meeting with her until about 10 weeks after the wedding. We were just so anxious to see the photos!

Overall it was a phenomenal experience working with Mo and she really did help make our celebration so so special. I would highly recommend her to any family member or loved one looking for a photographer!
author: Alyssa Pradarelli

body: Sean and I cannot recommend Morayo enough for your engagement session! Neither of us are naturally comfortable posing for photos, but Morayo has a remarkable ability to make the experience feel effortless, natural, and even enjoyable—and the stunning pictures speak for themselves! It wasn’t just a photo session; it was a fun and memorable experience. A glowing 5-star review from both of us!
author: Sarah Roman

body: We hired WT Rental & Services LLC for our wedding on Friday, May 17th, 2024.  Once we decided to host the wedding ourselves, we knew finding the right rental company was the most important step before anything else.  I found WT Rental and Services LLC online, and we saw their booth at the Hartford Wedding Expo which helped seal the deal.  Through WT Rental & Services LLC, we rented the tent, tables, chairs, tablecloths, benches, lighting, dance floor, and glassware.  William Taylor and his team were extremely insightful, and helped in ensuring that our vision for our wedding came to fruition.  We were able to comfortably host 87 people on our property, and everyone was impressed with the set-up that WT Rental & Services LLC provided for our special day.  We'll certainly utilize WT Rental & Services LLC for any future events we plan.
author: Linda Fogarty

body:
If you're searching for an event rental company that can turn your special occasion into an unforgettable moment that lasts a lifetime, look no further than WT Rental and Services LLC. I recently had the pleasure of witnessing their exceptional work at Olivia and Chip's wedding in Old Saybrook, and I can honestly say that Taylor and his team are the epitome of dedication and excellence.

From the moment I met Taylor, it was evident that he and his team were passionate about what they do. Their hard work and commitment were truly on full display at the wedding. Despite the unpredictable weather with pockets of rain, Taylor rose to the occasion and ensured that the wedding went on flawlessly. Their ability to adapt and overcome challenges seamlessly left a lasting impression on everyone present.

One aspect that stood out to me was their attention to detail when it came to setting up the tent. The way they fit the tent perfectly to the space was nothing short of remarkable. It created an enchanting atmosphere, blending seamlessly with the surroundings and providing a beautiful and comfortable space for the wedding celebration.

The dedication and professionalism demonstrated by WT Rental and Services LLC were second to none. Taylor's team worked tirelessly, going above and beyond to ensure that every aspect of the event was executed to perfection. Their unwavering commitment to customer satisfaction truly sets them apart as a premier company in the event rental industry.

The wedding reception space that WT Rentals created was a sight to behold. Elegance and charm enveloped the area, leaving guests in awe of the ambiance. The couple's joy and happiness were palpable, and that was undoubtedly a result of the thought and effort put into the setup by Taylor and his team.

It is without a doubt that I wholeheartedly recommend WT Rental and Services LLC for any event you may be planning. Whether it's a wedding or any special occasion, Taylor and his team will work their magic to ensure your event is a resounding success. Their commitment to delivering high-quality event rentals and creating magical moments is unmatched, and I am confident they will continue to exceed expectations for many events to come.
author: James Nix

body: Mr. Rand made my wedding day incredible! After my fiancé proposed, Mr. Rand met with us right away to determine our needs. He was prepared, professional, and gave us many different options that were all in our price range. We quickly decided on white garden chairs, a trellis, a pole tent, wooden tables, and a dance floor for our outside wedding and ceremony. He was very familiar with local vendors and provided recommendations for reliable and cost-effective alcohol, catering, and DJ services. He even sent me an email that same night with a design scheme for the reception already created and a detailed budget plan for my review. In the months that led up to the wedding, he was easily reachable by phone, text, or email. We had a few changes to the type of tent and arrangement of the ceremony aisle, and Mr. Rand was so flexible he adjusted everything as soon as I requested it.  He offered us discounts and multiple options whenever possible. There were no surprises and he never tried to talk us into anything expensive. In fact, he pointed out cost-saving alternatives to some of our ideas. He went above and beyond in facilitating our wedding planning. He even came to our rehearsal to give tips on the entrance and exit of the wedding party as well as the best spots for pictures. He arrived promptly a few days before the wedding and spent hours setting up the tent with his team. My husband called me and said Mr. Rand was a "machine" and a "perfectionist" and that I would absolutely love the care he put into arranging the reception area. The morning of my wedding he again arrived promptly to assist my husband and the bridal party in setting up the chairs, tables, displays, bar, catering area, dance floor, and DJ booth. He thought of everything, including outdoor heaters in case it the temperature dropped and fancy outdoor bathroom so as not to overwork the indoor plumbing. I spent my wedding morning relaxing and free of worry because I knew Mr. Rand would be diligent, responsible, and detail-oriented. Everything looked absolutely incredible, and he didn’t leave the wedding until the bride gave her stamp of approval. If you book him for your event, you will be delighted with his services. I offer him my highest recommendation. Hire this man!
author: S F

body: I cannot say enough good things about Taylor and the rest of the WT team. Taylor was so helpful throughout my entire wedding planning process, and he and his team helped to make it the tented wedding of our dreams. For reference, we had a 200-person outdoor wedding under a large sailcloth tent and Taylor's team also did the installation of lighting, dancefloor, stage, reception tables, chairs, cocktail tables, ceremony setup, and a beautiful handmade white outdoor bar. He also set up an adjoining cook tent for our caterer and provided generators and other power sources for our band. Not only was Taylor incredibly helpful and supportive with all my questions, requests, and updates (including countless phone calls, emails, and an in-person site visit for us to go through everything), my caterer also complimented on how accommodating & easy to work with Taylor and his team were on the day of our wedding. Finally, Taylor was very knowledgeable and provided great recommendations as we were planning our wedding and he was very fair with his pricing and helped work within our budget the best he could. I am so glad that we chose to work with WT Rentals and would highly recommend them!
author: Kristen Pingree

body:
I’ve been a wedding planner for eight years and never in my career have I met someone like Taylor goes above and beyond for their clients.

All the boys on the team are very respectful and ready to lend a helping hand. When I had a wedding day crisis and called Taylor for help, he moved mountains! It was incredible.

When my client was so concerned about her outdoor wedding ceremony, Taylor made sure that the rain plan could happen at any moment. He took extra care and was so flexible.

My favorite rental company on the East Coast!
author: Irene Katzias

body: We met Jessica at a family member’s wedding in 2022 where she got awesome pictures of us with our newborn daughter! We got her card and reached out to do pictures and every year since we meet up and get pictures done! Jessica picks amazing locations and her work is amazing! She takes the time to get great shots and work with little ones (we have a 2 year old and 2 month old)! We love her work and her love for photography!
author: Mandee Dobrosky

body: Jessica was absolutely wonderful at both our wedding and engagement shoot! She put us instantly at ease, and I couldn't have imagined our photos coming out this nice. She has such an incredible eye, and she got us our galleries very quickly. I don't usually like photos of myself, but I loved every picture Jessica took. I cannot recommend her highly enough!
author: Amanda Schoen

body: Jess did my branding photos and did an absolute amazing job! She made me feel comfortable for the whole shoot! She got my pictures back quickly and communicated with me the entire process about what was going on. I can’t say enough about Jess. My photos are amazing!!!
author: Rebecca Stewart

body: AMAZING. Jessica is an incredible photographer and works hard to get all the shots you want and then some you didn't even know you wanted! She is extremely professional and knows what she is doing. Even with the little hiccups and frustrations that are bound to happen on a wedding day with so many moving parts, she was proactive and quick to problem solve. She was happy to travel to us where we wanted our engagement shots and she was on time and ready to take photos for our wedding. I can't get over how beautiful the photos came out. Thank you for everything!
author: Caitlin Contaras

body: Jessica was absolutely amazing not only with our wedding photos but our engagement session as well. My husband and I felt so comfortable with her from the get go and made our special day that much more memorable. She captured some of the most intimate moments at our wedding between my first look with my father and my husbands reaction to seeing me walk down the aisle. This will not be the last time we use Jessica for photos! Truly amazing work!
author: Heather Chistolini

body: Becky is wonderful! She has stellar communication and checked in on me frequently. She is professional, organized and  handled our event with such ease and Grace. Becky and her assistant Madison were a pleasure to work with and made my wedding day exactly what I wished for. Thank you RJ Stewart Events for allowing me to enjoy the craziness of a wedding day!
author: Marisa Drpich

body: If I can rate her higher, I would! From the very start, Becky’s professionalism, creativity, and attention to detail made my wedding planning process incredibly smooth and enjoyable. Her organizational skills kept everything on track, and her calming presence was invaluable on the big day. Becky’s dedication ensured that every detail was perfect, allowing us to fully enjoy our special day without a hitch. I highly recommend Becky to anyone looking for a talented and passionate wedding planner!
author: Jackie Murcko

body: Becky is the G.O.A.T: She organized meetings with my fiancee and capturing all the details and building a very practical, easy-to-follow timeline. She sent the timeline to all involved in the ceremony and vendors so people would know what to do and when. She had all the things on the top of her mind and brought important insights for us all the time, she thought about details and logistics and also has great partnerships that facilitate the Bride/ Groom's life a lot! I 100% recommend Becky if you want a wedding coordinator and organizer who loves her work and does everything as if it was for herself.
author: Natália M. Silva

body: Becky was great to work with and a huge asset leading up to our big day! From the very beginning to the end, she was organized, detail oriented, and asked all of the questions that I may have not even thought about at the time. She attended in person venue meetings, my last fitting to learn the bustle and also came to our hotel the night before to run through a quick rehearsal. We had some issues with the venue communication and if we didn't have Becky, I'm not sure things would have turned out as perfectly as they did. I even mentioned preserving my flowers the day of and shortly after, Becky had several options/pricing for me to take a look at. She took my flowers that night and dropped them off the next day for me. The day was everything we could have imagined and we are thankful for Becky's assistance!
author: Marybeth Wallander

body:
Becky is Awesome! I recently had the opportunity to work with her on a Styled Shoot at the Hope Lodge in Mooseup, CT. She was super organized, very professional, and approachable. She made herself available to answer any and all questions. As a Live Wedding Painter, I cannot wait to work with her again.

Photo by Erin Deleon Photography
author: Virginia Bruce

body: Nicole is amazing. Our wedding was delayed for almost two years, and she stayed the course with us. She was easy to work with, and captured the perfect memories of our big day. Highly recommend her.
author: Robin Edmonds

body: Nicole was AMAZING to work with. When planning our reception we had spoken to a few photographers. But once we spoke to Nicole, we knew we had to book with her. She was precise with every detail and even had back up plans pending a storm that was supposed to crash our day. We received our photos back earlier than expected, just in time for the holidays, and they were stunning. At our reception, all of our guests said how personable and approachable Nicole was. She captured some wonderful candid moments of guests as well as all of the ones I requested. My husband and I will definitely be booking with her for future life events :)
author: Julia Perry

body: Nicole was the perfect photographer for our wedding! She was professional and organized but also down to earth and so easy to relate to. She got all of the shots we wanted and some wonderful candid photos (even in unexpected 90 degree heat!). We absolutely adore our photos and couldn't have asked for anything more! I highly recommend her!
author: Cara Keifer

body: Nicole was AWESOME to work with! She made it very easy to schedule a time and place that worked for our photo shoot. During the shoot, she made us feel super comfortable and took all the hard work out of posing. Neither my husband and I feel super comfortable in front of a camera, and she did an awesome job telling us how best to pose and making it feel really easy. Then, of course, the most important part -- the pictures came out beautifully! The lighting is just perfect and she captured some really nice pictures of us and my baby bump. We'll cherish these pictures for years to come and we're really happy having worked with Nicole. We got all of our pictures back very quickly, and we got every single picture in both color and black and white. Unlike some other photographers, we have digital copies of all the pictures. So we can download them and print as many as we want and share them with anyone we want. Couldn't be happier with the experience from start to finish. Thanks, Nicole!
author: Caroline Monroe

body: I never write reviews, but Nicole was exceptional! We recently received our wedding photos and were blown away with how many precious moments she was able to catch. She has just the right timing, creativity, knowledge, and calmness a photographer should have. She was so easy-going during our event that it made it feel easy to pose for pictures (I can sometimes feel a little shy). I would recommend Nicole to anyone, you will not regret your decision!
author: Julia Hecht

body:
Choosing Terrence as our wedding photographer was one of the best decisions we made for our wedding. Being a professional photographer myself, I had an incredibly high bar when searching for someone to photograph our wedding—Terrence did a phenomenal job. From our first meeting, he took the time to understand exactly what we wanted and asked thoughtful questions about our vision.

On the wedding day itself, Terrence was fantastic. He arrived early with his assistants to scout perfect locations for our photos and worked seamlessly with our other vendors. The final photos exceeded our highest expectations. Terrence has an incredible eye for composition and lighting, and his editing style is timeless - nothing trendy (like dutch angles) that will look dated in a few years. He delivered our full gallery earlier than we expected and the website to view them made it easy to share with family and friends.

I especially appreciate how he captured the genuine emotions and spontaneous moments that truly tell the story of our wedding day. Looking through our photos brings back all the joy and love we felt, which is exactly what we hoped for in our wedding photography.

If you're looking for a photographer who combines technical expertise with genuine passion for their craft, I cannot recommend Terrence highly enough. His work is worth his price, and you'll treasure the memories he captures for years to come.
author: Domenic Allegra

body: We found Terrence very early on in our wedding process. His gallery had some of the most beautiful photos we had ever seen; some were dramatic, which is what my husband loves, others were soft, warm, and candid, which were my favorites. To find a photographer that could fit both of our styles was so exciting. Terrence’s package was over our budget, in part because we were marrying in NY, so would have to pay a travel fee. I was convinced I could find someone within budget. I searched and agonized for an additional two months. Finally, my now-husband convinced me that the photos would be the one thing from the day we would get to keep forever and we sprang for Terrence and let me tell you, both of us have agreed the extra cost was more then justified. In high heat and humidity and looming storms, Terrence did everything he could to keep us on-schedule and to get incredible photos at a venue he had never even been to. We just received our sneak peak gallery and all of us are in awe of the photos he captured. We look forward to working with Terrence in the future for other big life moments, and you should absolutely book him too - engagement shoot or wedding, Terrence will capture your moment perfectly!
author: Amanda

body: Terrence was incredible to work with! His photographs are beautiful and captured our personality so well. He’s reliable and was extremely helpful through our entire wedding planning process. I 100000% recommend!
author: Erica Paul

body: We have used Terrence for multiple events and he is AMAZING! He always makes snapping the photos you want so easy and fun, which can be a challenge considering we often bring our wild Husky and toddler nowadays! We have used Terrence for family shots and family event and he never disappoints.
author: Nick Vitale

body:
I wanted the opportunity to share how pleasant and enjoyable it has been to work alongside Terrence. I am a fellow wedding vendor and have had the chance to work with Terrence at a wedding this past year (September 3rd, 2023) at Eolia Mansion in Waterford.

Terrence was nothing short of professional and flexible. I witnessed him capture some incredible photos from unique perspectives. I will say, from my vantage point as a wedding vendor, I get the opportunity to see a number of photographers capture wedding couple's most intimate moments. Terrence took it in stride and kept the couple smiling that day. He was very candid in his approach and worked well alongside the team that was assembled that day.

I would be happy to recommend Terrence in the future to couples who connect with his personality and art. I look forward to working with him again and wish him the very best.

Jeff Erhart
Mystic River Entertainment
author: Jeffrey Erhart

body: All I can say is that this team was incredible!!! We had a photo shoot for family and engagement photos. They made our day an extremely enjoyable experience. They are creative, knowledgeable, prompt, patient and affordable!!! Highly recommended
author: Laura Champagne

body:
We couldn’t be happier with who we chose to photograph our November wedding. We received so many beautiful pictures that we will cherish for years to come Bill was great to work with and we even got positive feedback from guests that said “he was so light on his feet” and “seemed to be everywhere”! Bill and Tracy were very accommodating and took care of all our needs. They also worked very well with our JP and DJ.
I would recommend Bill to anyone who needs to capture a special occasion.
author: Dawn Spenard

body: Big thanks to William Russell for capturing some amazing photos at a recent hockey game I played in! The shots were incredible, so good that they made me look like a better player than I actually am, which was a nice bonus. The action, energy, and key moments were all perfectly captured, and it’s clear he has an eye for detail. If you’re looking for a photographer to cover your next event, I’d definitely recommend hiring him. His work speaks for itself!
author: William Jara

body: We have used numerous other photographers for family pictures who I thought were very good, but these are just impressive! By far the best family photos to date. William is professional and really has an eye for where to take great pictures. I can not say enough about how great William captured these moments with my family, while keeping my 3 children engaged the whole time. Highly recommend and I will be returning for our next family photo shoot. I also plan to use him for my children’s sports pictures. Thank you William!
author: Bryan M

body: If you are looking for a photographer that is very enthusiastic about his work, Bill is your guy!!  Him and his wife Tracy clearly enjoy what they do, they are creative, professional and very friendly to work with.  They went above and beyond our expectations capturing our son’s senior pics and we highly recommend them for your portrait needs.
author: Martin Persaud

body:
Absolutely Incredible Experience at A’Dor Couture!

From the moment I stepped into the shop, I knew I was in the right place to find my dream wedding dress. The selection was stunning, with something to fit every personality and vision. Dorita was so welcoming and knowledgeable, taking the time to listen to my preferences and help me narrow down options that truly suited my style.

I never felt rushed, and she made sure every fitting was personalized to my exact needs. She helped me bring the perfect dress vision to life. The attention to detail and customer care was exceptional—from the first consultation to the final fitting. I can’t recommend Dorita and A’Dor Coture enough to any bride-to-be!

Thank you for making my wedding dress shopping experience unforgettable. I felt like a queen on my special day, and it was all thanks to you!
author: McKenzie Baker

body: If you are looking for a custom job and an excellent tailor for your bridal gown - Dorota is wonderful. She listened and worked with me to create the perfect dress - elegant with clean lines. I visited several places before deciding to work with her & I loved my dress.
author: Christine Yasaitis Ford

body: Overall a wonderful experience with Dorota!! She is incredibly talented and makes sure you feel confident and beautiful in your dress. I told all my friends to go see her when they dress shop!!!! She did an amazing job and I couldn't than her more for creating my dream dress!
author: Sophia Cuozzo

body: Picking up my dress after several months and so excited, I know my soon to be husband will tear up!! The shop and quality of dresses is lovely, paying the same price I would have but this is entirely custom!! One suggestion is to have soft music playing in the background, that would really make the experience!
author: Gaby

body:
I'm writing to express my sincere appreciation for the stunning couture wedding dress I purchased from A'Dor Couture. From the moment I stepped into the boutique, I was greeted with warmth and professionalism. Dorota was incredibly helpful and she went above and beyond to ensure that I found the perfect dress for my special day.

The dress itself was an absolute dream. The intricate lacework were simply breathtaking, and the fit was impeccable. I felt like a princess on my wedding day, and I received countless compliments on my dress.

I would highly recommend A'Dor Couture to any bride looking for a truly unforgettable wedding dress. Their attention to detail and commitment to customer satisfaction is second to none.

Thank you again for making my wedding day so magical.
author: Alanna Broderick

body: Catherine is the best! She was our photographer for our engagement and wedding photos and her work is amazing! When trusting someone with such a huge aspect of your wedding and to capture all of the memories throughout the day it can be really daunting, but Catherine put us at ease immediately and made us feel really comfortable. She has an amazing ability to make everyone feel really comfortable in front of the camera and even blend into the background to capture candid moments flawlessly. My husband hates having his pictures taken, but even he enjoyed himself because Catherine’s energy is infectious. The pictures themselves are also amazing and everyone who has seen them absolutely loves them. She was very detailed and made sure to get photos of everything on my list and even suggested things I wouldn’t have thought of. We can’t recommend Catherine highly enough!
author: Amy Murphy

body: Catherine was AMAZING! Her photos stunning. She knew just how to make us feel at ease and prompt us to take gorgeous photos. I have not stopped looking at my wedding photos and reliving out perfect day. 100% book her for your wedding, family photos, or any other special moments! Thank you so much Catherine!
author: Linnea Kennedy

body: Where do we begin?! Kelly was the absolute best decision we made for our May 2024 wedding. From our first introductory call, Kelly’s passion for her craft was evident and she put us at ease straight away. She is incredibly organized and touched base with us multiple times before our big day, covering all the small details you wouldn't think of. Kelly’s preparation and guidance allowed us to have an incredible day! She is absolutely, positively lovely and we were so happy to have her as part of our wedding celebration. We live abroad and weren’t able to have an engagement session with her, but her friendly, calming personality made us feel comfortable and her prompts allowed us to have such lovely, natural photos. Her pictures truly captured us as we are. The follow up after the wedding has been just as great. Kelly is truly the best and we couldn’t recommend her more highly!
author: J&E Fox

body:
I’m so happy we were able to work with Kelly. From the minute I saw her photos I knew she was the photographer I wanted for our wedding.

When we went to take our engagement photos both myself and my fiancé were nervous. We both don’t like having our pictures taken. Kelly was so nice and friendly and made us instantly feel comfortable. She also went above and beyond to spend a day with us in Newport when our first location was only able to accommodate an afternoon shot. She stayed until the end of the day to make sure we got our sunset pictures!

Leading up to our wedding Kelly kept checking in and giving us great tips. The day of the wedding her and her second shooter arrived on time and got right to work. We were so happy at how easy everything was and how quickly everything went.

We also recieved our photos back quicker then any of our friends recieved theirs and they had weddings months before ours.

Our pictures came out better then we could’ve imagined. I’m so happy that we have the best pictures to be able to look back on.

Thanks Kelly!
author: Nicole

body:
We can’t thank Kelly enough for being such an outstanding photographer and overall amazing person! We knew almost immediately we wanted to work with Kelly when we noticed our mutual love of animals and Disney on her website. And after seeing her light, bright and beautiful work, then having our first consultation with her- we were sold!

We had our engagement photos with Kelly in Newport, and dealt with a cloudy, drizzly day- she made it so much fun, and beautiful, and our photos were outstanding and bright and lovely despite the weather. You could literally not tell it had been a bit gray and bland that day based on the photos we got back. She even mailed us one of our favorite photos printed on canvas as a surprise and we instantly hung it in our living room.

She was a phenomenal help to everything wedding related- coming up with a suggested timeline before we even knew we needed one. She was always quick and ready to answer questions, give helpful advice, or just to listen when I was getting overwhelmed. AND she made sure my dress got fluffed once I walked to the altar during the ceremony.

The venue we chose in Windham, NH was a location she had never been to before- but from the amazing shots she and her 2nd photographer, Gwen took, you’d think she’d been photographing there forever. And her attention to details is fantastic! Every moment, every detail of decorations, no matter how small, was captured.

Her fun, caring, outgoing, creative personality shows through every time we interact and I can’t say how thankful we are that we had the chance to work with her.

Not that you needed one more nudge in the right direction to hire Kelly for your wedding, but if you did- this is it!
author: Jax L

body: I cannot say enough about how amazing Kelly was to work with! We found her through a Facebook/Instagram ad and immediately loved her energy. From that first zoom call we knew that she was the best photographer for us. My husband and I are both pretty awkward in front of a camera but Kelly made us feel so comfortable and it was easy to relax and just enjoy our day. We got married in July during a massive rain storm and Kelly was so amazing! She kept me from having a full meltdown over the lack of prep from our venue, helped us get our DJ’s cues right, and made sure we had time to just enjoy being married. Our photos are phenomenal, you can’t even tell that it was storming around us. Everyone looks amazing in the photos and a lot of that was due to how personable and funny Kelly is! It was like working with an old friend, we didn’t feel uncomfortable at all and our photos really capture the joy of the day, not the nerves we definitely were feeling. I cannot recommend her enough, she truly goes above and beyond to make your day special! I’ve included some examples from our engagement shoot and our wedding so you can see how excellent she is! Thank you Kelly!!!
author: Tiffinie Alvarez

body: Kelly was amazing for our wedding and engagement shoot! She was professional, kind, was receptive to our ideas, had great ideas of her own, and the communication was great! She was able to help manage our large/crazy families. The photos came out amazing - we couldn't be happier with our experience! We would definitely go back to Kelly whenever we need another photographer.
author: Ryan & Lizi Wedding

body: Meg and I don’t even know where to begin with trying to explain how perfect our wedding day was at Union Station. From the first day we met Neil and toured the venue, straight through the day of the event, everything was absolutely perfect. My mom even looked at me at the end of the night and said, “I can’t believe it, literally nothing went wrong! Not a single thing!” Neil and his team are so efficient and organized. You have so much support from an extremely professional team from the moment you start working with them and the vendors they suggest/include. We had a phenomenal experience with everyone and everything. We need to provide special shout outs to: Colin, for saving the day and helping Meg tie (and re-tie!) her handmade bow tie that no one could get quite right except you! Shay, for bringing the party all night long through 1AM and making sure that Meg and I were taken care of the whole day! The entire Union Station team, for making sure every guest had a blast and enjoyed themselves. And of course, Neil, for being there with us through countless emails with questions and zoom meetings and even the day of at 6AM, with a smile, being the steadfast leader and exceptional planner through the end of the wedding. We would not have had such a beautiful, wonderful, amazing, and stress-free wedding day without you. THANK YOU so much Union Station. If we could do it all over again, we’d choose you every single time.
author: Charlotte Kerwin

body:
We cannot say enough wonderful things about our experience at Union Station! From start to finish, the staff went above and beyond to ensure our holiday party was seamless and stress-free. They were incredibly responsive, accommodating every request with a smile, and took every opportunity to make our event truly special.

On the day of the event, they didn’t just meet expectations, they exceeded them. Their attentiveness and professionalism helped our host relax and enjoy the celebration, stepping in whenever needed to handle any last-minute details or unexpected hiccups. It’s rare to find a team so dedicated to making an event feel effortless, and we are beyond grateful for their support.

If you’re looking for a venue that not only provides a beautiful space but also a team that genuinely cares about your experience, look no further. Thank you, Neil and Union Station Banquets, for making our holiday party unforgettable!
author: AQRS Admin

body:
Words cannot express how grateful we are to Neil and all the staff at Union Station Banquets for completely delivering on our vision of a fairytale wedding. The service was absolutely OUTSTANDING: from making sure we had everything we needed in the beginning of the day to get ready for the ceremony, to the cocktail service around the Union Station grounds as we were taking post-wedding photos, to the perfectly timed presentation of plates to each table (making sure each guest at a table received their plates at the same time). These little details truly set Union Station’s service apart from others. The historic train station venue is absolutely glamorous and feels as if you have been whisked back in time to a beautiful ball. Neil & his team were there for every step of the planning process and many pieces of decoration were included in our package which was highly convenient. Everyone was so flexible and accommodating when our guests arrived late to cocktail hour due to a shuttle bus delay (we used a 3rd party shuttling service), and even though we had to start dinner a little bit later than scheduled, the dishes came out hot and delicious! Union Station only works with the absolute best vendors; we ended up using Durocher’s Florist & Gregory’s Pastry Shop for the flowers & cake which were both fantastic.  We were able to have an after party at the Tunnel Bar Loft, if you haven’t tried Tunnel Bar’s martinis they are out-of-this-world. In summary, I would highly recommend Union Station Banquets for your wedding or special event. We chose this venue because it is such a beautiful and picturesque place to get married. We weren’t expecting to have THE BEST customer service experience that we have ever had! To the entire Union Station team, thank you!

Photo credit to Sadie Elizabeth Photography
author: Amanda Roberts

body: Exceeded Expectations! When we were looking for wedding venues we wanted something unique that would accommodate all of our loved ones. We didn't have a huge budget but we didn't want to have to sacrifice an amazing experience for our guests. This place fit our budget and certainly was unique. We live in Chicago and wanted to host our wedding in Massachusetts as that is where we both are from. As a UMASS graduate I would frequent both the Tunnel Bar and The Deck and always loved my time there. We could not have been happier with our decision from start to finish.  As an out of state bride Neil made me feel so comfortable with how communicative he was. When we visited for our wedding tasting I knew I had made the right decision. Neil made my vision come to life as if he was in my brain! Everything we asked for they said yes to or that they would try and figure it out. My husband and I met at chilis and they made an exception and allowed us to have chilis chips and salsa baskets at the cocktail hour and triple dippers for a late night snack. We hosted our after party above the tunnel bar and they made it a seamless transition. The space allows for lots of space for your guest to explore from the deck, the Roosevelt room, cocktail space and the amazing tunnel bar. Having different rooms was very important to me as I like the versatility. To this day everyone continues to tell us that it was the best wedding they had ever been do. The atmosphere and the service were exceptional. The food was absolutely incredible from sushi, fresh salad, a sorbet course that fulfilled my princess diaries dreams, incredible entree and the the s'more's and cookie bar! The team synchronized their service so all gets were plated at the same time. Neil and his team were incredible. I truly would not have been able to do it without them. They all went above and beyond through every moment from opening the place early for the girls to get ready to Neil even running and picking up our late night snacks when we forgot to designate someone to do so. Book this place if you want a stunning venue that your guests will remember forever and a stress-free day. My only regret is not hosting our rehearsal dinner here even though we had our wedding and breakfast the next day! Thank You Neil and your team for making this day truly the best day of our life!
author: Amanda O'Brien

body:
We can't say enough great things about Neil and his team. Our wedding day exceeded all of our expectations. The room looked beautiful, the food was delicious. Neil made sure that we had everything we needed for our wedding day.

We are so grateful for Neil and his team, you'll be in great hands with them.
author: Chris and Hannah Williams

body: Great place for drinks & sunset. Food is not great, we tried the fish tacos and cocktail shrimp. Will keep it simple and get a burger next time! Friendly service, lively bar, fire pit, plenty of tables and parking, overall good spot.
author: Rodrigo Medeiros

body:
Amazing location for Sunset and drinks. Lots of groups of families and friends.

Better for drinks than food as the food is mediocre at best.

The fish tacos are decent portion, however it’s more batter than fish. Shrimp cocktail has a tasty sauce but it was a bit watered down.
author: Tiffany Knight

body:
Being from the area I rarely visit places in my own backyard; as many people do, one tends to veer a bit farther away.  However, on a beautiful late August evening, I decided to stop by and sauntered in to this very family friendly and unique outdoor place.

Noticing other reviews, there is a chorus about the basic nature of the menu.  The menu is simple and basic, but nonetheless very appetizing.  It is not the culinary mecca, but rather a place to enjoy the fresh salty air, with a vibe of levity, great views and open air dining.  The service is outstanding and my server Erin, was ever so friendly and joyous.  I started out with the Patatas Bravas, which is a fancy way of saying Tater tots.  They were very flavorful with a tasty mix of sautéed onions and roasted peppers.  Being summer and in NE, I could not resist having the quintessential Lobster roll.  It was very hearty and mouth watering, with a very decent amount of Lobster and not overly dripping in sauce.  It was a good complement to the mundane but delicious taters.  It comes with a side of chips.

If you are visiting the area, or local, this is a great venue to enjoy a relaxing meal.  There is a fire pit to warm up with friends and family, while taking in the refreshing salty ocean air and potentially gazing at an amazing sunset as the evening of merriment wears on.
author: Jay D

body: Delicious! I enjoyed a bibimbap sandwich for lunch which was superb.  The seasoned fries were also quite yummy.  Beautiful location, great atmosphere and great food makes this a must return place.  Beer selection is weak BUT everything else was great!
author: Filip Galiza

body:
Stopped here with my husband for our first time and we had a nice experience. Good food and atmosphere for sure! I got a greek meatball type of plate for something different and really enjoyed it. I didn't take many pictures but I'll be back in August and will add to this post then because this place is so cute! There's a boat you can sit in and a lot of cute graphite art everywhere.

Came back here in August with my friends for sunset time, got drinks and I had the smash burger and it was delicious! Beautiful view of the sun going down over the marsh, and a really nice fire pit to sit or stand around.
author: ELOCIN RUZAM

body:
I received a "welcome home" board as a house warming gift from CG Boards & Co. and it was SO cute and delicious! It was the perfect snack to have around while we were moving and had nothing in the house to cook. There was something for everyone - sweet and salty. Cat even included gluten free crackers and chocolate covered pretzels for me! Everything came wrapped so beautifully too.

I am a wedding planner and look forward to recommending CG Boards & Co. to my couples for boards, charcuterie cups and grazing tables while they are getting ready on their wedding day, at their showers, bach parties, welcome parties, wedding days and more!

Thank you for such a delicious treat, Cat!
author: Samantha Sheehy

body: Amazing customer service and such a beautiful board we had! We are so obsessed! They are so yummy, fresh and delicious and you won’t be disappointed at all! Highly recommend!
author: Alexandra Handel

body: CG boards created the most beautiful board for my party this fall. The board was not only beautiful but delicious. The board itself was curated perfectly for the event and felt very special. I definitely could not have put together a board that great myself. The owner, Cat, was very professional and answered all of my questions in a timely manner. I plan to use CG boards for any events I have in the future!!! 5 stars!!!
author: Meredith Fisco

body: Thank you so much for the beautiful board. I needed something last minute and did a google search. Your business came up and I love supporting local businesses. I had no idea the quality of your work but was willing to chance it. The ordering process was simple and easy. The delivery option a bonus! Will definitely order again. Thank you!!
author: april bracetty

body: I was so impressed with the beautiful spread from CG Boards & Co at my friend’s holiday party.  It was incredibly delicious with high quality ingredients and you can tell how much thought and care the owner puts into her work. Would recommend to anyone and I can’t wait to use them for future parties!
author: Cassandra Griffin

body: Having Jenn at our launch party was an absolute delight! Her presence allowed guests to watch her personalize items just for them, adding a truly special touch to the entire experience. Jenn is very talented and was such a joy to work with, she offered creative ideas and applications that made the planning process very pleasant! Can’t recommend her enough!
author: Fabiana Nishioka

body:
We had the absolute pleasure of partnering with
W.inks Modern Calligraphy + Designfor a recent luxury event in Boston, and their expertise truly elevated the experience. From start to finish, their professionalism, attention to detail, and commitment to excellence were evident in every interaction. Their dedication to delivering exceptional service seamlessly aligned with our vision, creating a flawless and memorable event for our clients.

In the world of luxury events, excellence is non-negotiable, and
W.inks Modern Calligraphy + Design exceeded expectations at every turn. Their impeccable craftsmanship, reliability, and passion for their work make them a standout in the industry. We are grateful for their partnership and highly recommend them to anyone looking for top-tier service and execution.
author: Pearl Farquharson (Designed by Delsie)

body: Took a class with Jenn in Goldfinch’s studio in north Billerica. I had the best experience and guidance in her class. She was thorough with explaining the first steps in calligraphy and was hands on. Her passion for calligraphy definitely shows out in her group organizations and events. Highly recommend booking a class or an event with her!
author: Contact

body: I've never done calligraphy before and for sure thought I'd be awful at it, but the instruction, pace, and materials provided by Jenn made it so fun and turns out I'm not too shabby.  Highly recommend taking a class with Jenn!
author: Christina Chen

body: I initially ordered a calligraphy kit from W.Inks Modern Calligraphy which was so much fun to dive into and learn on my own at home. But then I knew I needed the expertise of Jen. I took her class at the Bird and Bear and having her help me hands on was so helpful! I continue to practice and hope that one day I can be even close to the calligrapher that Jen is! Highly recommend!!
author: Meg McCluskey

body: Tony was amazing to work with. From our very first call everything flowed with ease. He knew what he was talking about and had helped us tremendously with planning the order of things. The online planner he provides is truly the best and the song recommendations if you are stuck is priceless. On the wedding day Tony was very professional and had done everything as planned. Most importantly he kept all of us smiling and dancing. We couldn’t recommend Tony enough! Thank you so much Tony.
author: Rachel Grassi

body: We will 100% be recommending DJ Tony to everyone we know. He made the planning process a breeze and always responded quickly whenever we had a question/ a request in the planning process. The online planner he uses is super user-friendly and basically created our whole timeline for us. From planning, the ceremony, the cocktail hour and the reception he kept us on schedule and helped pull together the most amazing day. Once the dance floor opened it stayed full until our send off. If you are looking for a DJ definitely do not hesitate in hiring DJ Tony!
author: Alekxis MacKay

body:
Anthony DJ’d our wedding on 8/10/24! Our guests were moving and grooving all night long. It was difficult to leave the dance floor for any water breaks, though they were definitely necessary! Anthony helped situate everyone being announced into the reception, made the necessary announcements throughout the night to draw guests’ attentions to our  first dances, speeches, and dessert, and kept the party going all night long.

The planning that occurred ahead of the wedding with Anthony was so easy and straightforward, and we could not have been happier with how the day and night went. We greatly appreciate his years of experience and professionalism!
author: Jenn Edmondson

body: We were absolutely blessed to find DJ Tony. I (the bride) thought I had already found our DJ, but my fiance and I were still meeting with others just in case...and BOY am I glad we did! From the beginning Tony was easy,.fun, and truly delightful to work with. He has such a lovely and down to earth personality and he has the whole thing down to a science. Any worries we had were quickly eased. We changed our mind a few times about different things and had some last minute panicking, he helped keep me calm and exhibited nothing but patience and professionalism. We got so many compliments on the music and on the overall vibe. Our wedding was an absolute blast and he played everything we wanted, gauged our guests well, and kept the party going perfectly. I genuinely hope I get to attend an event at which he DJs again!
author: Ashley Cutler

body: We had DJ Dave as our wedding DJ. I would highly recommend working with TCs DJs and DJ Dave. Tony helped set up the entire wedding schedule so the day went off without a hitch. DJ Dave did a great job MCing the event and making sure that everything went smoothly. He also did a great job choosing music and making sure the party kept going.
author: David Triffletti

body: I wish to express my heartfelt appreciation to DJ Carlos Frias Acosta and his wife Carmen for their pivotal role in making my daughter Daniela's Quince an extraordinary experience. She had a wonderful time, and Carmen, your exceptional organizational skills were greatly appreciated, resulting in a seamless and enjoyable celebration. Carmen you did your thang even the stuff that you and Carlos Frias Acosta did that wasnt part of your job,I greatly appreciate the both of you.l, Thank you so much . Also Daniela had a ball and sends her Thank you as well.
author: Minerva Gonzalez

body:
I cannot thank Cumba Entertainment for making my wedding day so special.

Carlos and his wife went above and beyond to make sure that they had every last detail in order for the ceremony and reception. They were even able to play a recording that I had made for my husband to listen to just before I walked down the isle.

The monogram above our sweatheart table looked picture perfect and dont get me started on the photobooth. It was the BIGGEST hit. Every last person that attended had a handful the strips that the machine leaves that were personalized with our names and wedding date.

I will recommend Cumba Entertainment to anyone looking for a wedding DJ!
author: Ashley Norris

body:
Carmen and Carlos were amazing to work with for my Husband and I's wedding this past June 1st! They were so open with communicating throughout the planning process with prompt and quick response always! They dealt with a lot of specific requests from me for our big day as I tried to please a very diverse crowd of age groups from children to elderly and my myself and my friends that wanted to dance to some fun songs! and they did an amazing job balancing that and still playing music that everyone was dancing to! They also dealt with a couple last minute requests form me on the day of that they handled with such grace and it ended up being perfect!

Their attention to detail was really something, as well. When we were eating dinner I remember dancing in my seat and saying wait I love this song! Just to look up at Carlos who was playing a soft listening song that I had in my Spotify likes that he found when I sent him my wedding playlist!
It was a beautiful moment and so thoughtful and sweet to hear my favorite songs and he made sure to pick the easy listening ones which was again super thoughtful!

They offered to help with non DJ related stuff and were just so helpful and accommodating throughout the whole process.
They kept the energy super fun and everyone had a blast. Their pricing was extremely reasonable especially for how much effort and attention they put into their work!
They made our day so much fun and we couldn't be happier!
author: Danielle Collins

body:
As a wedding photographer, I highly recommend Carmen and Carlos! I had the pleasure of working with them this wedding season and they did an excellent job MC'ing and DJ'ing, keeping all of the guests moving and the couple happy. Not only are they experts at their craft, but they are just super pleasant people.

This wedding photographer highly recommends Cumba Entertainment! You won't be sorry for booking them.
author: Terrence Irving

body:
“This was the best night ever!”
That was the comment  from all of our guest, and I owe this all to Carlos and Carmen. When I enlisted their DJ services for my daughter’s Quinceañera, I wasn’t aware that I was also gaining a support system and a guide through all of the preparations (which was a lot!). If it wasn’t for Carmen and Carlos, this event wouldn’t have turned out the way it did. Always available to meet and discuss the event, answer any questions and calm my nerves. On the event day, while Carlos played music,  packed dance floor from beginning to end, Carmen played a role of master of ceremony, she made sure the program ran smoothly and on time. They are truly a dynamic duo.
Close your eyes and book, you will be so grateful you did!
author: Elba Houser

body: Paul was recommended as a preferred vendor by our wedding venue and we immediately knew why. He was prompt in his responses with an amazing portfolio in various locations in upstate New York. His associate photographer, Todd, took both our engagement photos and our wedding photos. He was kind, personable, and somehow managed to be everywhere at our wedding in the most unobtrusive way, capturing everything. We couldn’t be happier with the way our photos came out and we are so looking forward to creating our album and prints.
author: C P

body: Paul was an amazing wedding photographer. We got married in Northampton, MA and he drove in from upstate New York. He was professional with great communication. He listened to all of our ideas and tried to help make the day run smoothly in any way he could. He was friendly and humorous and made us and our wedding party feel comfortable. He has great ideas for poses and made things feel natural. We had many family members and friends comment on how personable he was. He captured so many amazing moments of us and when we were busy, of our guests on our special day that we have enjoyed looking back on. The quality of his work is top notch! We were so impressed by our photos! We highly recommend working with Paul!
author: Megan Bachand

body: We couldn't be happier with Paul!  Throughout the planning process he was very receptive to our needs. He captured every special moment of our wedding day beautifully, from the candid shots to the intimate portraits. His professionalism and calm presence made us feel at ease, and the final photos exceeded all our expectations. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a talented and reliable photographer!
author: Lana Harvey

body: We worked with Paul for our wedding and he was amazing. Everyone was very impressed with his ability to take amazing pictures quickly. He is very funny and charismatic and made everyone feel very comfortable. My husband and I are so happy with how the pictures came out! Derek, who works with Paul, shot our engagement photos and was great as well. He captured some amazing shots of our nervous dog. I would definitely recommend Paul Saunders Photography to anyone looking for a photographer for their next event.
author: Jillian Kowal

body: While searching for photographers we came across Paul and his abundance of amazing photos and excellent reviews. We decided to work with Paul for our engagement shoot and wedding photos. Our engagement photos came back quickly and we absolutely adore these photos. I tend to be very awkward in photos, but Paul made us feel relaxed and happy and we ended up with AMAZING photos! We can't wait to have him again as our photographer during our wedding in October! I would highly recommend having Paul as your photographer!
author: Anna Kuang

body: Jeff is a true rockstar media producer. I serve on a nonprofit board, and we chose Rockstar Cinema Productions to provide photo and video services at a recent fundraiser. He not only captured everything we were hoping for, but more. He helped showcase every aspect of the event, from the offerings to the fun our attendees had. We are so pleased and highly recommend Jeff and Rockstar Cinema Productions!
author: Erica Swallow

body: Jeff and his team at Rockstar Cinema are the BEST in the business. From Real Estate drone footage to wedding footage, his team gets the job done plus more! My wedding video was 110% worth it! My expectations were exceeded! I will forever cherish my video done by Jeff and his team at Rockstar Cinema! I know many people may not think having a videographer is worth it but it truly is. Being able to have a video that covers the beginning to the end of our night and to look back on all the memories during our special day is priceless because really your wedding day is over in a blink…  Definitely get the videographer, you will NOT be disappointed !! 🤗
author: Madison Chmyzinski

body: Jeff and his team exceeded our expectations for a wedding video/s. They were lovely to work with that day; the videos really are spectacular. He essentially created short movies from moments throughout our day! Creative and really captured the feeling of both our Mass and the reception.
author: Gina Mazza

body: Jeff from Rockstar Cinema Productions was amazing! The whole process was seamless. From the beginning, Jeff was super accommodating. After reaching out on short notice, he was able to attend our event where he provided both photo and video coverage. He quickly edited and exported the video and pictures, and the quality and creativeness of the video was incredible! We will be using Rockstar Cinema Productions again, and I highly recommend this production company to anyone!
author: Mia Burgio

body:
I reached out to Jeff with an idea that I wasn’t even sure was possible. He immediately began brainstorming on how to make it happen.
As he worked on the project he kept me informed throughout the entire process and respected my opinions too. Jeff was incredibly easy to work with.
The video he created for me exceeded my expectations and we will treasure it for years to come! I highly recommend Rockstar Cinema Productions!
author: Jennifer Ciollaro

body: It was an absolute pleasure to be able to work with Elyse. From the planning process to the execution, Elyse was pleasant, patient and excited about my vision. She’s is truly talented and we just love having our beautiful painting ! I admire it almost daily !!
author: Aisha Albert

body:
We were absolutely thrilled with Elyse at our wedding! Her incredible talent and attention to detail captured the essence of our special day in a way that photographs simply cannot. Watching her bring our favorite moments to life on canvas was mesmerizing and added such a unique and elegant touch to our celebration.

Our guests couldn’t stop raving about how beautiful and captivating the live painting experience was. The finished piece is now one of our most treasured keepsakes—a stunning work of art that brings us back to the magic of our wedding day every time we look at it.

If you’re looking for a way to make your wedding truly unforgettable, we can’t recommend Elyse enough. They were professional, kind, and so gifted. Thank you for giving us such a priceless memory!
author: Julia Riley

body: WOW! Where do I start with E Stokes Creation?! Let me begin with, you need Elyse for your wedding details. Any detail you need, she will supply you with. Elyse did my custom wedding invite suite, the calligraphy on the baseballs that made up my baseball wall seating chart, and the place cards for my guest's seats. Her art, visions, and designs will take your breath away. She is able to take the vibe of your wedding just with a mood board and bring it to life. She especially did this with my one-of-a-kind wedding invites. They were top notch! Not to mention her design process is so fun, while completely taking everything off your plate. One less thing to worry about as a bride is exactly why you need Elyse. She is prompt, never misses deadlines, and a pleasure to work with. Her signature calligraphy is something else. I absolutely loved the way everything turned out using her literal handwriting. Especially using it on something as hard to write on as baseballs. She's ready to tackle any of your wedding needs, like my place cards I brought to her a month and a half before my wedding date that turned out stunning. Let's just say I adore her, and she was an absolute asset to my wedding.
author: Mallory Lawrence

body: Elyse prepared the MOST AMAZING watercolor invitation for my summer music festival birthday party. I had a vision of what I wanted and she took that vision to the next level. Elyse was patient with my revision request and was easy to work with throughout the process. My friends raved about the beautiful invitation and complimented the artist’s talent.
author: Lisa Anderson

body: Elyse made the beautiful stationery for a Wish Upon a Wedding event that I planned (I'm the wedding planner). Elyse made the full invitation suite plus matching programs for the event. Elyse is not only fast to respond and takes revision suggestions like a true professional (when we decided to go a different route with the design, Elyse promptly moved with us!), but she also saved the day. We had to plan this wedding VERY quickly, and Elyse had to step up at one point to get the programs overnighted to the venue itself. She made it happen, and we were able to get her lovely designs in time, in spite of the turnaround time! She is talented, with a heart of gold. Hiring Elyse for your stationery just makes sense- hire her, you won't regret it! I have already added her to my preferred vendors list! ^_^
author: Katie Sautter

body: Excellent place for a wedding. The venue was beautiful.
author: Marge Midwood

body: Food okay but expensive
author: C&J

body: Great place for events or to watch the skiers and snowboarders.
author: Arthur Dutra III

body: buffalo chicken salad is excellent, jeremy the mountain room kitchen manager has truly outdone himself, quality in the chicken is top tier, overall rating 10/10
author: Annalia _mrz4

body: Great place to watch a band
author: Rachel Hinds

body: We had our October 2024 wedding at 19Main and we are so happy we did. We had only toured 19Main and fell in love. The venue itself is great with a great getting ready space, and truly gorgeous inside. The venue was beautiful but more importantly our coordinator Kylie truly made our wedding day special. Kylie was amazing to work with, she was attentive and organized but also a joy to be around on our wedding day. We felt lucky for the opportunity to work with Kylie. I cannot recommend 19Main enough.
author: Kristen Couture

body:
Just was DJ there for a party. It’s a very cool space. Clean and easy to get to. Thought the bank theme was fun too.
It is definitely one of the better halls I have seen. Great for a party, or even worthy of hosting a wedding.
author: Mike Fernino

body: I rented 19Main for my daughter’s birthday party. The hall was beautiful, the safe was a success with the guest. Kylie is a wonderful person, very helpful answering questions, making the day very easy. Thanks Kylie for your help!
author: Rejane Zarbock

body: I worked with Kylie at 19 Main to plan a high school prom in May 2022. From the very start of the planning process, Kylie was incredibly helpful. The venue was gorgeous and ideal for a small prom (150 students). We set up a cocktail hour in the smaller room, dinner/dancing in the larger room, and a photobooth in the vault. The kids loved that they could take photos outside in front of the historic building or on the green, too. Kylie’s list of preferred vendors was super helpful, and everyone we worked with (Executive Cuisine and OnePlug Entertainment) knew the space well and did a fantastic job. The location was also ideal for a cupcake truck, and Kylie helped me with the parking permit process. If you are considering booking this venue, take the leap!! You won’t regret it!!
author: Kori Rimany

body:
A group of us stopped here for a medicare seminar that was approx. 1.5 hours in length including a choice of chicken leg with rice & veggie or a sort of penne a la vodka. The servers were fantastic! Seminar was filled with great info for those trying to navigate the complexity of insurance choices. Not sure if off street parking was available & street parking was sparse at 6p. This establishment is in a great location. This establishment was evidently a renovated bank, with the vault still in place. It made for some interesting chat! Now for the food…
My chicken seemed bland & dry & cook with thighs frequently; so I am not sure what happened here. It was almost like it was par boiled & then baked (and I am a chicken lover) . Maybe the lack of spices or a rub accounts for this as they were catering to seniors  but  the penne was pretty good!
author: Lisa B

body: I saw Pam for a reiki session and it was exceptional.  I sought out Pam for help with some discomfort I was having and found her to be incredibly effective.  She has a warm, heart centered approach so it was easy to relax and feel at home in her presence.  She also brought in her mediumship gifts and shared messages that were really meaningful to me.  If you're looking for support, I'd highly recommend Pam, she truly is wonderful.
author: Kristin Sitek

body:
I cannot say enough wonderful things about Shirley (hair artist) and Elena (makeup artist)! They were absolutely incredible on my wedding day. From the start, they went above and beyond, working with me through multiple trials to ensure everything was exactly how I envisioned. They truly listened to my preferences and gave thoughtful suggestions to create a look that felt like me, only elevated.

On the big day, their professionalism and calming presence were unmatched. They made the whole process stress-free and fun, and I felt completely confident in their hands.
author: Mischa Dani Goodman

body: I was blown away by my hair/makeup services with Kiss and Makeup. Kely and Vika were INCREDIBLE and I cannot recommend them enough. They brought so much joy and calm on my wedding day morning and everyone was so happy with their hair and makeup. Truly such talented people, I can’t recommend these two artists enough. Pamela, the owner of the company, was also so helpful in accommodating me and answering all of my MANY questions/concerns during this process. I would certainly recommend this company to anyone!
author: Mary Zaborowski

body: My bridesmaids and I had Adrienne as our makeup artist on my wedding day. She was on time and fun to have during our wedding prep. We all looked beautiful. I do not wear much makeup and wanted a more natural look. Kiss and makeup was the second makeup studio I did a trial with. As I was not comfortable with how I looked during my first trial at another studio. Kiss and makeup were very accommodating to my request to look natural looking. They will put on as much or little makeup as you would like! I am glad they were a part of my big day.
author: Tiahna

body: Adrienne and Diamond were amazing!  All of my bridesmaids and I felt so confident and looked incredible. I felt my very best and can not thank them enough for making our day extra special! We had 9 girls receiving services and they were very time conscious and organized while also being careful to ask questions make sure everyone felt confident in their look and provide any touch ups needed. They were also just wonderful to talk to and felt like we knew them for years. Could not recommend KiSSandMaKeUp more and will definitely be reaching out for services for our next big event.
author: Merri Kiefer

body: Virginia was so fun. She gave us all the tools needed to be successful on our painting but still let us play and be creative to go off script. Thx
author: Cheryl Mead

body: It was my first time doing a paint night and Virginia and Amber were great hosts! An incredible time with the cutest kitties.
author: Alina Servetnik

body: Took my little cousin here for our birthdays we had so much fun and painted our cats. The instructor is awesome and walks you through everything so don’t feel bad if you have no art background. The cat cuddles is an extra bonus always
author: Christina Randazzo

body: I wanted to find a present for my brother that was unique. He's very hard to shop for. Virginia worked with me on a design that captured his dog's perfectly set in a background that matched his style exactly. Worth every penny!
author: Jonathan Barboza

body: I visited Marcie's Angels Cat Cafe and not only walked away with a fun cat and coffee experience, but also got a beautiful portrait of my boy! Great communication, fast shipping, and great quality!!!
author: Lexi DeMattia

body: Nicole did such an amazing job turning my wedding dress into something I could only dream of! She had to dismantle my dress and start from scratch! But it was worth it! The removable sleeves were perfect for my May wedding! She is so easy to work with and makes you feel very comfortable! Nicole truly cares about what she does and you see it all through her work! High recommend and will most certainly go back for other alterations!
author: Emily Fecteau

body: Nicole is amazing! She took an idea and turned it into my dream wedding gown. She worked through each step of the process to make sure it was exactly what I wanted and found the perfect materials for my look! Highly recommend Nicole Wzorek Designs!
author: Katherine Kinnin

body: Nicole did an amazing job altering my dress to fit me perfectly. I was amazed at how attentive she was to the little details and she knew exactly how to alter the dress to fit my body. She also was able to finish my dress in three weeks which was absolutely amazing!
author: Rachael Cyrankowski

body: Nicole did an amazing job altering my dress to make it the dress of my dreams! She even custom made my sleeves that I was very set on and could not find anywhere! I loved this dress because of the flow and fabric and but her alterations made the dress MY dress. I wanted sleeves that could be over my shoulders in my church and off at the reception. And I also wanted my neckline completely changed. The before and after is actual insane! So happy with how it turned out!
author: Danielle Collins

body: Nicole completely reconstructed my wedding dress!   She was helpful and insightful throughout the entire process.  She went above and beyond to make me feel confident and beautiful on my wedding day. I highly recommend reaching out to Nicole and her team !
author: Liz Gale

body: If you’re seeing this, hire Danielle as your wedding florist! Booking Little Blooms was one of the best decisions we made for our wedding. From my first consult call, Danielle and I immediately hit it off, despite me saying “I don’t really know much about flowers”. She took the time to explain her approach and process with me, which I didn’t get with other florists I spoke to. The next day, I was sent a slide deck with her floral vision of my wedding vision which made this type-a bride feel so at ease. It made me felt heard and allowed me to truly envision what she was going to create for our wedding day. I knew if we didn’t hire her, I would regret it. I knew whatever she would create would be AMAZING, and I trusted her with such a crucial piece of our wedding. From the first call, to leading up to the wedding day, to the wedding day, she always had prompt responses with any questions I had. At our wedding in South Shore, Massachusetts, she exceeded our expectations! Guests are still talking about our stunning floral arch, bouquets, and centerpieces. We can’t stop looking at pictures of them! Danielle is SO talented at what she does, and she truly cares about her work and making sure her couples are happy. I never had a single worry about our florals leading up to the wedding, and that’s all thanks to her! I will never stop recommending Little Blooms, and if I could give infinite stars, I would!
author: The Haydens

body: Hiring Danielle as our wedding florist was one of the best decisions we made. After an intro phone call, she put together a thoughtful slideshow that reassured us she was listening and understood the essence we were looking for. She answers emails quickly, was super flexible, gave great suggestions, and the final product was absolutely incredible. Months after the wedding, we are still hearing from our guests about how beautiful the flowers were and how great Danielle made the ceremony and reception work.
author: Isabel Anna

body: Danielle’s kindness and authenticity and dedication made her an absolute delight to work with for our wedding. We went to her with a color palette, but left the rest up to her creative freedom. Boy, did she deliver. I had the most stunning bouquet of flowers I’ve ever seen in my life. I cannot express enough how bittersweet it was to have to leave for the honeymoon the next day instead of enjoying those flowers for their full life! You can’t go wrong with Little Blooms Floral.
author: Abbie Lowenstein

body: Daniele is an absolute gem!! She is absolutely incredible and SO talented at what she does. Hiring her as our florist for our wedding was the easiest and best decision we made throughout the wedding planning process. On our initial call, Danielle took the time to explain different flowers (what's in season, why to use/not use them, which look best, etc.), her process, and worked with our budget. She was warm, welcoming, professional, and so knowledgable. We were instantly impressed and knew we had to hire her.
