We also changed up a lot of stuff on our final details call and she was so game for everything. I don't even have words for the florals on the day of the wedding. They were phenomenal. I was literally speechless, on the verge of tears when I saw our reception area - same with my bouquet. We also haven't stopped getting compliments from our guests about them and we're basically a week out from the date of the wedding. Seriously, the floral design Danielle did for our wedding was absolutely magical and we cannot thank her or recommend her enough!!! We were so lucky to have Little Blooms be part of our wedding.
author: Sam Nakhoul

body: Danielle is such an incredibly talented florist and made my wedding day so beautiful! I'm still obsessed with each piece she created for my wedding, from the bouquets and boutonnieres to the centerpieces and arbor florals. She knows how to take your vision and bring it to life. I highly recommend her for your big day!!
author: Julie L

body:
My experience did not live up to the hype I was anticipating. While the spa was wonderful, the hotel itself was a completely different story. My room was located on the first floor for an overnight stay on Saturday night. The staff was kind enough, and check in was very easy. When I first got into my room, I was a little disappointed. The furniture was bumped and banged into countless times with no repairs done (I wish I took pictures). The bed and blankets were also very uncomfortable and the bathroom was mediocre. For $500 a night after taxes, I was really expecting something more than what could be compared to a mediocre motel room.

If you are staying on the first floor, be prepared to be up all night. With all the events and parties scheduled at this resort, it gets very loud. People were walking past my door screaming, talking very loudly, and even banging into my door until 2 am. The staff didn’t seem to care.

Check out was 11 am on Sunday, and while not the hotel’s fault, I was a tad disappointed that the stores in the town were either closed all day or didn’t open until noon! So instead of walking around the town, I had a slow morning. With the sun being out I had a better look at the room. The blinds were disgusting, to say the least. They turned brown from I’m guessing months to years of not being washed. Also, it may be because I work in the industry, the construction was horrible. I could see screws, spackle, and the wallpaper was all damaged and bumpy.

If you are coming from the spa, I highly recommend staying somewhere else. The price was not at all worth it.
author: Bethany Stuart

body: We had a wonderful stay in mid March and practically had the place to ourselves.  Our room was in the Tall Tales Guest house located across the street from the main hotel. Amazing water views from our 2nd floor room with large balcony. The guest house was peaceful and well appointed. The shared spaces included 2 fireplaces, fooz ball and pool tables. We enjoyed a Monday night dinner in the Choo Choo lounge which is popular with locals for trivia night. The food was delicious, especially the lobster🦞🦞roll.  Highly recommend the resort and the restaurant lounge.
author: Susan Davidson

body: Stayed here for a night with friends to have a spa weekend. The spa services were great and we were looking forward to the other amenities (sauna, steam room, pool, hot tub), to find out that these amenities were for the whole hotel to use, not just the spa customers. We were expecting a quiet, relaxing time but the pool/sauna/steam room, were not that, which was disappointing. The room was nice and had a fireplace which we were able to have someone light. We specifically came here for the spa, but the whole experience was underwhelming for the price we paid.
author: Corinn Charlsen

body: I had chosen this inn for a relaxing spa day with friends on my birthday. Upon arrival no one had welcomed us for almost 5 minutes due to only one person at the front desk. Once we were checked in we had decided to soak for a bit in the pool. On our way to the pool we had noticed a lot of splashing in the pool area. Little did we know that during spa hours they have water aerobic classes and children running around. And no where is it posted that the spa facilities were shared with the hotel. I wanted to cancel my entire day at this point but i hoped for a better day. Next was the massage that was mediocre and not relaxing at all. The facial I received shortly after was very good. And I would like to thank Pamela! But my overall experience and cost of this spa ruined my day and chances of ever returning.
author: Christina Deeter

body: We enjoyed our stay very much with our dog. We didn’t get the room we asked for, that they promised, but the alternate room was still very nice. we also ordered room service from the restaurant. If we had realized there were so many fees for having the food delivered, we would’ve went down and picked it up ourselves, a very short walk. There were also some noisy neighbors across the hall, but I guess that’s to be expected at a hotel that offers weddings. But other than these few things, we had a very nice time so I would rate it a four star Overall.
author: Wendy San Juan

body: Great venue for a reception! I didn't get a chance to photograph on the golf course or anything since we did photos before the venue and I wanted my couples to have fun and let loose the rest of the wedding. Food was wonderful -- the chicken francese was soooo delicious! Highly recommend this dish to anyone who's a fan of delicious tender chicken. The decor was beautiful, attention to detail was great and Lauren Beaupre was an excellent Coordinator!  Would love to photograph a wedding here again!
author: Michael Dunn

body: Love this Beautiful Venue I’ve Been Booked Multiple time for My PhotoBooth and 360Booth for Events and the Staff is so Friendly
author: zenaida garcia

body: 12/14/23–We had our Christmas party here . Nice place. It was beautiful decorated for Christmas . They a couple of young servers passing around little things to eat before main dinner . At the bar only one person serving but that was fine , that way people didn’t over drink . All in all, nice place to host a party. We held our second party here this year for 2024 —word of caution —BRINg YOUR OWN CONTAINER for taking food home . We got several different explanations as to why they can’t do it .
author: Marilyn MC

body: At the end of October I had the privilege of having my wedding reception here at Alpine Country Club. To say it was amazing would be an understatement. My husband and I had the time of our lives and that was all thanks to Lauren. The event coordinator Lauren is an amazing person to work with. She is extremely responsive in a timely manner and works with whatever needed and requested. The food was delicious and we've heard nothing but great things about the overall experience from our guests. The staff was on point and all had wonderful and friendly personalities. Highly recommend Alpine Country Club for any of your events!!
author: Adrianna Trotta

body: We had our wedding reception here, and cannot recommend Alpine Country Club enough! It was the perfect venue for a mid-sized wedding, offering a variety of amenities for guests to enjoy themselves - most notably, the outdoor fire pit, which kept people warm on a cool October night. Lauren was spectacular to work with from the planning stages all the way through to the big night!
author: Jonathan Bissonnette

body: We loved working with Kathy and Ever After Ceremonies for our September 2024 wedding! Kathy made the ceremony as stress free as we could have asked for. She made the planning process feel personalized to us as a couple which made for a great ceremony. Our guests raved about her handling of our ceremony and we loved how well she told our story. We also appreciated how open she was about our ideas and took each one to heart. We especially loved her willingness to facilitate the ring warming ceremony!! I would recommend kathy for any of your ceremony needs!!
author: Hannah Gebhard

body:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ An Amazing Officiant – Highly Recommend!

We couldn’t have asked for a better officiant than Kathy for our town hall wedding! From the moment we met her, she was warm, professional, and truly made us feel special. She took the time to personalize our ceremony, making it both meaningful and memorable. Her kind demeanor and heartfelt words made the entire experience feel intimate and special, even in a simple setting.

Kathy guided us through each step with ease, making the process stress-free and enjoyable. Her sincerity and warmth created a beautiful atmosphere that we will remember forever.

If you’re looking for an officiant who genuinely cares and brings joy to your special day, we wholeheartedly recommend Ever After Ceremonies. Thank you, Kathy, for making our wedding so perfect!

E & M
author: Elizabeth Peluso

body: Thanks to Katty we were able to make our marriage reunion possible on time. Since I contacted her, she was very quick to respond, the conversation flowed very well at all times, she was effective, proactive, empathetic and punctual. Our guests were very happy with her participation. Not even the bad weather was an impediment for her to arrive at the ceremony. Thank you very much Katty, without you we would not have done it, it was a pleasure meeting you.
author: Astrid Carpio

body: Would give 6 stars if I could! Kathy was incredibly kind and professional. We did an EXTREMELY last minute wedding and she went absolutely above and beyond to create a wonderful experience for us. She is a true professional and managed to make it incredibly special. She really will tailor the experience to what you are looking for as a couple.
author: Nicolas Gonzalez

body: Kathy Vass is unequivocally the best officiant in the business and you would be foolish to look any further than Ever After Memories for your wedding officiant. Kathy is an absolute joy to work with and achieves a level of familiarity with her clients that made half of our wedding guests think we had known her for years despite only having met her a handful of times during the preparations for the wedding! We had met with Kathy a few times for her to get to know us and learn the story of our relationship which she masterfully crafted into a ceremony that didn’t leave a dry eye in the house and made the groom cry so much he could barely read his own vows! On the day of the ceremony Kathy was professional, funny, charismatic, and expertly ran the ceremony exactly how we wanted. On a personal note we got along with her so well that we got her a meaningful gift that she was so appreciative of she even sent us a picture of it hanging on her wall in her home office. Working with Kathy was like working with an old friend and we recommend anyone who is looking for an officiant for their wedding book her as soon as you can! Thank you so very much for everything Kathy!
author: Nicole Place

body:
I came across ET Events via a Google search and I feel so lucky that I did. My daughter’s quinceañera was a huge hit! I reached out to ET Events via email and Debbie called me right away. She answered my questions and went beyond them to give me more details on things I had not even thought about. It’s truly a one-stop shop for all your event planning needs! And just as importantly, she offered me ideas to stay within my budget. I rented beautiful white lounge furniture — sofas, cool ottoman type seating, low cubes and high tables that light up, a basketball game, a photo booth,  a stage, lighting, and to wrap it all up, the DJ.

Debbie met with me at my event location before I even decided on going with this company. Once I heard her ideas, ET Events experiences,  and prices, I knew it’s who I wanted to go with. As for the DJ, I was a little hesitant to go with one I had no friend or family reco from, however, I put my trust in Debbie and once Erik called me and we spoke, I had a good feeling things would go well… and they sure did! Erik was great. He has great energy and presence. We loved how well he blended music and transitioned ours as we had many genres to work with — like, salsa, merengue, bachata, pop, freestyle, reggaeton, hip hop, you name it. I also loved being able to easily sign in online to specify my song preferences by artist or song titles and hear clips of them to make sure I was choosing the right ones. It helped to be allowed to categorize them as well by “must play”, “dedications”, “do not play”, etc. Erik and I spoke about the music I had specified on their website beforehand. And the day of, he got the party going and we had the best time!

The lounge furniture looked great! It was positioned in a way that complimented this large room with very high ceilings just right. It was all in great condition and our venue looked fabulous! The light-up stage and lighting from the DJ booth and the furniture all worked so well together giving it a beautiful, elegant party vibe which is exactly what we were going for. Couldn’t be happier with the results.

Thank you SO much Debbie, Erik, and ET Events staff for making event planning less stressful and most importantly, making it a night to remember forever! My daughter had the time of her life!
author: Aracely Feighery

body: We hired Erik to be the DJ for our wedding last month, and he was awesome! We had multiple songs that we wanted to have start at certain points and fade out in certain ways, so I was originally really nervous how everything would come out and if it would work. He totally killed it, listened to our vision without any issues or reminders, and everything flowed so nicely! As a bride who loves to dance, I was requesting left and right, and he never got sick of me 🤣 I specifically requested no “wedding playlist music” - like the typical stuff everyone plays that is hard to dance to, and he definitely kept his word. Everyone thought the music was great!
author: Melissa Havican

body: One of the best vendors we hired. Erik was amazing as our Wedding DJ and MC. The night was perfect and went on without a hitch. We also hired a saxophone player to play along with him at the reception (such a big hit). And a violinist for the ceremony and cocktail hour that was extremely impressive and a fun addition as well. Will recommend to all of my friends for their upcoming weddings.
author: Kasey Vigoda

body: Erik and Mike were everything we could have asked for! Erik was our DJ and Mike ran our photo booth.  Absolutely great service not only on the wedding night but everything leading up.  He was able to make our dream wedding come true to every last detail we requested. We even made some game time decisions and he easily went with the flow. Got the entire crowd up and dancing and a part of the games! Nobody else I would want running an event.
author: Samantha Beaudoin-Kibler

body: We booked Erik for my husband’s 40th surprise party and I couldn’t be happier with how everything went! Erik was an absolute pleasure to work with and was so attentive and just wanted to make sure we were happy and enjoying ourselves! He played exactly what I wanted and got everyone up and dancing, it was such an amazing night and Erik played a huge role in that! I couldn’t be happier and can’t recommend enough!
author: Jessica Cohane

body: Excellent service! I am in a different state and wanted to surprise my daughter on her birthday. They delivered the flowers on time despite bad weather conditions and they looked wonderful even better than photos! Thank you!
author: Nirvana Nawar

body:
We worked with Jordan from Flowers by the Station for our wedding florals. She was amazing to work with - her knowledge and kindness made the whole process so easy and fun. She truly went above and beyond to make sure that are wedding florals were everything we dreamed of and more - she even foraged for winter greenery when the order she placed didn't come in on time.

So many guests commented that our florals were beautiful and asked who we worked with. On top of this, Jordan was so conscious of our budget and really went out of her way to make sure that we got everything that we wanted (and more) for the amount that we were able to spend.

We would highly recommend working with Flowers by the Station!
author: Sarah Nordberg

body: The most gorgeous quality flowers and beautifully arranged. My boyfriend has gotten me tons of flowers from here and they are always SPECTACULAR!!!
author: Mary iheartboxing

body: Awesome. Ordered flowers last minute at 10 PM the day before Valentine's Day, and they were here around 2:30 in the afternoon. Gorgeous and fresh and friendly delivery, too!!
author: Val Cabral

body: Our baby shower was simple but elegant! Our flowers were beautiful! We got your fresh flowers and made up our own floral vases. We used the vases as our center pieces. We had 2 large vases. One up on stage near my daughter and the other one for our cake/ cup cake display.  We set aside a hydrangea with eucalyptus for our simple white cake!  Gorgeous!  We used white hydrangeas, white  baby carnations, baby’s breath, white hypericum, and eucalyptus leaves.
author: Luanne Clark

body: Keith was amazing! So patient with everyone and so knowledgeable! He did an amazing job capturing our elopement! Also way to give me Disney ice queen vibes in Narnia!
author: Heather Rego

body: Working with Keith was great! My fiancé and I felt super comfortable with him and enjoyed our engagement photo shoot. Keith made sure to utilize the inspiration pictures I sent him so I had photos I was totally in love with! He also had fantastic turnaround for the final pictures. I’m impressed and so pleased with the whole experience!
author: Allison Meyette

body: Keith was an absolutely amazing photographer!  He actually did both our elopement photos and our wedding celebration photos!!  Not only did all the pictures come out absolutely incredible, but he was easy to communicate with, by email, phone and in person, he was friendly, easy going and did the best job we could have ever hoped for and then some!  You won't be disappointed with him!
author: Andrew Herlihy

body: I had the pleasure of meeting Tyrra of TC Legacies at a regional Business Expo in the fall of 2024 and immediately thought of them for my baby shower event months later. The process is fairly streamlined and easy. They send over pricing, backdrop styles, contract via email and they personalize the booth amenities to match your theme. It matched so well that we thought our event planner decorated her table. The decor blended right in and seamlessly. The photo booth was a hit for young and mature alike. Communication was excellent via email and via text capacity. She worked well and professionally with the event planner and team of coordinators for my event. They were professional and kind. I highly recommend TC Legacies and will definitely use them again in the future.
author: DrMariel Chiro

body: I had the pleasure to work with Tyra for son's  1st birthday, I was not deceived to say the least. She was thoughtful, creative, courteous and professional. She also went above and beyond to provide an amazing birthday party. Her team provided great service. My guests had a great time with the photobooth and were impressed about the creative flowers party favors. I highly recommend her and will definitely utilize her services for other events.
author: Vanessa Pierre-Louis

body: TC Legacies LLC has to be one of the best photo booth companies in the Rhode Island area! Tyrra is a professional that knows how to cater to her clients needs in the most efficient yet fun way possible. The communication before, during, and even after our event was above and beyond and her photo station is so easy to use and produces quality photos! I highly recommend her services if you’re looking to add some entertainment to your next event. You won’t be disappointed!
author: Sydney Buckholt

body: Thank you so very much to Tyrra of TC Legacies LLC! My first experience with TC Legacies was as a guest at a baby shower. I was so blown away that we contacted Tyrra the very next day & booked her services for our daughter's graduation/birthday party. We just had our event & absolutely loved the photo booth. It provided amazing photos, was user friendly & Tyrra's attention to detail was outstanding. Everyone enjoyed it & had so much fun. The customization was phenomenal & the decor flowed seamlessly with the venue. She does NOT disappoint!!
author: Nicole Ashley-Gilbert

body: Tyrra is amazing! She was great with communication and worked with us to help best meet the clients needs. She stayed on top of things and asked me questions I wouldn't have thought of when it came to a photobooth, to give our client the best experience possible. 10/10 would recommend and we will definitely be using her services again!
author: Andersson Tejeda

body: We hired Eboni to make our wedding cake for our Wedding in Middletown, RI on August 27, 2023. She was amazing! We had a wonderful consultation and constant communication with her. She drew up multiple designs for us to choose from and really nailed what we were looking for. She delivered a stunning cake that wowed is and it was delicious too!!
author: Malayna Knox

body: I can’t believe we forgot to write a review for Eboni after raving about her cake for over a year! We got married in October 2022 and the entire experience with ordering from Eboni was smooth and top-tier. We wanted to give our guests 3 flavor options and went with vanilla, strawberry shortcake and carrot cake. Our anniversary tier was carrot cake which we just enjoyed for our first anniversary and it was still just as good as the day we got married! We were sticking to a tight budget but the cake was something we really wanted to splurge on. Eboni made the process super easy by providing us with links to several different options at different price budgets. Our cake was absolutely beautiful and ridiculously tasty and our friends and family still bring it up all the time! I have referred all my engaged friends and family to her and I encourage you to try her yourself and head over for a tasting!! You wont regret it!!
author: Alyssa Cabral

body:
Glorious cake! This was to honor and celebrate my grandson’s graduation from the MA State Police Academy.
What an artist Miss Eboni is! I will be delighted to ask for help in the future for celebratory cakes. Thank you!
author: Carol Grunewald

body: Absolutely amazing!!! Ordered a Beyonce/Bee themed baby shower cake and cupcakes and it was spectacular. An absolute showstopper and delicious!!
author: Alicia Genisca

body: Absolutely some of the most amazing cake I've ever had and it was decorated beautifully
author: Peter Berthiaume

body: We booked MLA Photo Booths for my mom's 90th birthday party, and everyone had such a great time!  Guests of all ages loved the props and their poses gave us so many laughs later when we viewed the pictures!  Megan is a true professional.  She made the contracting and setup preparation so easy.  She arrived right on time and helped everyone get the best shots. I would hire this company again without a doubt!
author: Darlene Morris

body: I can't say enough great things about MLA Photo Booths. The set up was classy and blended in seamlessly with our wedding venue. Megan was incredibly helpful as the attendant - making sure everyone was in frame and using the props. I highly recommend using MLA for photobooth rentals :)
author: Katie & Chris Hannon-Laffey

body: Megan did our wedding photos and my boudoir photo shoot which was a wedding gift for my husband. I couldn’t have asked for better wedding pictures they are truly amazing. I have a huge wedding portrait done by Megan in my dining room that’s like 55” x 35”.   She was very professional and made me feel comfortable during the boudoir. Highly, highly recommend!!!
author: Alysha Paolillo

body: Megan is awesome! She did a great job at my grandson's bowling party! Yes I said bowling party. She's super accommodating and is great with kids. You will not be disappointed. Give her a call today for your events needs today
author: Karen Gauthier

body: Megan is awesome! Never had more fun taking photos in my life and I’m camera shy! Her service is a must have for any party or big function you decide to host! Check her out as soon as possible! Shout out to MLA Photobooths!
author: Derick Bellanti

body: Oleg and Ana were absolutely incredible to work with! From the very beginning, they were great communicators, making the entire process smooth and stress-free. On the wedding day, they were always one step ahead, capturing every special moment without ever feeling intrusive. Their attention to detail and artistic eye truly shine in our wedding video—we are completely in love with it! They perfectly captured the emotions, energy, and love of the day, and we will cherish it forever! Highly recommend them to capture your special day!
author: Brianna Murray

body: We are in awe of the work Ana and Oleg did for our wedding! They are absolutely incredible and talented! They captured our day so beautifully and I couldn’t recommend them enough!! If you are looking for an amazing team - Cinematic Horizons is it!!!
author: Amy Silbo

body: If you’re looking for a kind, professional, and incredibly talented team to capture your big day, book Cinematic Horizons! From the very beginning of meeting with Oleg and Ana, my husband and I knew we were in good hands. We can’t stop watching our wedding highlight video - we were so impressed! Thank you CH team for everything!
author: Christine Knudsen

body: We loved working with Oleg and Ana for our wedding. Leading up to our wedding Ana was so great to work with, she was extremely organized and I felt confident that they would be amazing for our wedding day. On our actual wedding day Oleg and Ana were very professional but also so fun to work with. They captured all of the special moments from our day while also making us feel so special. They have an excitement and passion for what they do and I would highly recommend them as your wedding videographer.
author: Lexie Hinrichs

body: Oleg and Ana were a joy to work with! They answered all of our questions and are both so nice and amazing. I cannot wait to see our film! I recommend them to everyone who still needs a videographer for their wedding!!
author: Casey Paraskevas

body: Hiring DJGaza was one of the best decisions my wife and I made when planning our Cape Cod wedding. Through the entire process, Gary was available, responsive, and adaptable to our requests as we worked to create our dream wedding. He went above and beyond by traveling a day early to attend the wedding rehearsal and get the best feel for how the evening would run. He created the perfect vibe during the ceremony and dinner events, and had the dance floor packed the entire night. Gary was truly an integral part of an unforgettable night for us. (By the way, he is affordable!). I would recommend DJGaza for any event without hesitation.
author: Geoffrey Ebbs

body: Gary is a funny man and will get the job done,, he'll work with you on all aspects of your party to please you and your guests.  NO issues NO drama.  The price was very reasonable too,, have fun at your next party with DJ Gaza
author: JeanPaul Lemieux

body: Gary rocked the HOUSE at my wedding last month and I would highly recommend him for events. He is very attentive and can mix whatever songs you want to make your day special. My guests would not stop raving about him!
author: Sarah Bawden

body: I could not have picked a better DJ for my wedding day! Through out the process of wedding planning DJ Gaza was attentive, thoughtful, and always there if I needed a question answered. On my wedding day DJ Gaza brought the party to life. His music selections were spot on for our guests and I could not of been happier! Thank you again DJ Gaza! Our wedding would not have been the same without you!
author: bianca calia

body: My husband and I hired Gary as a DJ for our wedding. He was organized, well prepared, and everyone loved the music. He got our vibe completely and the dance floor was never empty. He and his wife have great attention to detail and he even came to the venue for the rehearsal to make sure he had a feel for the space before the day. If you are looking for a DJ, rest assured DJ Gaza will deliver!
author: Alexandra Xenophontos

body: Shelley is the best. I had a small idea of what I liked for my wedding ceremony, but Shelley was able to take that with information she collected during our meeting and created a beautiful ceremony. She had our guests laughing, crying.. all of them are still talking about it to this day of how great she was and how she involved the crowd to not put them to sleep. They all thought we’d known Shelley for years with how personalized her ceremony was, but we had met her for the first time at our meeting for planning it. Shelley was organized and went down the list of yes/no to all different options of what to include in the ceremony and tailored it perfectly to match us. When there’s so many decisions to make, Shelley took that pressure off and handled it all. I didn’t have to worry about anything with the ceremony because she is really the best of the best. Cannot recommend her enough!
author: Caleigh

body: Shelley is the absolute best Justice of the Peace! She was so much fun to work with, so invested, and genuinely wanted to learn all about us as a couple as she prepared the ceremony. She was wonderful about our requests, offered suggestions, and delivered the most gorgeous ceremony I have ever heard (may be biased as the bride but, really!). If you are looking for an officiant or Justice of the Peace, look no further than Shelley!!
author: Jenny Price

body: I can promise you will not be disappointed choosing Shelley for your wedding ceremony. She is professional and extremely helpful, she will guide you through the process from start to finish. She is a great listener and will totally personalize  your beautiful ceremony. She is very responsive and informative. A true pleasure to work with!
author: Christine Durso

body: All.  Your.   So.  Good.  And.  So. Nice
