body: Absolutely amazing and helpful. If you want somebody to marry you this is the person to use. Very professional and informative, and made the day far more special than it already was
author: Tymar Hunt

body: Always an amazing experience from the time I’ve known Elder Quinn Mitchell. He is an excellent talent, gifted, anointed go getter! He knows how to set the atmosphere and mood for every event. Great music, fun, laughter and good food you will always get his events! He’s one of the best saxophone players I know. Thank you again Quinn for blessing and being a blessing for my dad and our family at his 90th Birthday Celebration you were truly phenomenal. I can’t wait until the next one. 🤗
author: Beth Morring

body:
Smudge was amazing to work with from start to finish. Amber is a true industry professional and made the entire process painless and fun while also making me feel the most beautiful I have ever felt! My bridal party, and guests gushed over the stunning work enhancing each of our natural beauty. The best part is even at the end of a action packed evening my makeup still looked unbelievable. If you are planning a wedding or a event I would highly recommend this talented and kind team of ladies!
Professional Images by Wild Arrow Photography.
author: Shannon Madden

body: I absolutely loved working with Amber and Sarah for my wedding hair and makeup! I am originally from New England but live in California now, and the Smudge team was super accommodating with fitting in my hair and makeup trial a few days before the actual wedding. Amber listened to how I wanted my makeup to look, and Sarah made small adjustments so that my hair looked beautiful, stayed in place, and could accommodate my veil! On the day of the wedding they were on time and came with a schedule- and stuck to it! We made it out the door to the venue on time, looking absolutely gorgeous. I appreciated Amber’s responsiveness to my emails, and both Amber and Sarah are amazing professionals at their craft. What’s more, my hair and makeup didn’t BUDGE through the entire day! I am so glad I went with them for my beauty needs.
author: Natasha McGarey

body: I loved working with Amber and Sarah for my wedding in Vermont! From our initial consultation, both were easygoing and fun to work with. Both of them navigated our larger wedding party and moms who were a bit indecisive on the day. My hair and makeup lasted all day and night and survived me crying at the altar! I am so happy Smudge made the trip up for me and made me and my bridal party look and feel gorgeous!
author: Alexandra

body: I’m so happy that we chose Smudge to help out on my wedding day. Everyone absolutely loved Amber and Sarah’s work, plus they were on time and efficient. Definitely don’t be afraid to see if they have suggestions too, they know what they’re doing. I had never felt like such a “princess.” The studio is super cute and I'm so glad we had that space to get ready. As someone who works for a wedding venue myself, I see first hand how important it is to have vendors that listen and support your vision for the day. Thank you for all your hard work, you ladies deserve the 5 stars and more!
author: Stephanie Medine

body: The Smudge team did an incredible job with hair and makeup for our wedding day! Adrienne & Megan were professional, talented, and a joy to work with. They listened to each person's vision and brought it to life perfectly, making everyone in the bridal party feel stunning. The makeup and hairstyles lasted all evening and photographed beautifully too. Smudge’s attention to detail and calming presence made the day stress-free. We highly recommend them for any wedding or special occasion!
author: Matt Anya Mees

body: Such a beautiful & elegant Venue with an extremely kind owner! Clean & has a very new look! Spacious. 10/10 I’ll definitely be using them again in the future. Thank you so much for sharing your space with us for our gender reveal!
author: Chantilly Oviedo

body: Lugar limpio, espacioso, las mejores atenciones, todas sus instalaciones en excelente condiciones ✅️
author: Alicia Quiñones

body:
Liz was a well-organized and visionary wedding planner. Our wedding was an early fall day with an outdoor ceremony and indoor reception. She executed my thoughts beautifully and made sure that everything went smoothly. My wedding party was mid-sized, and she got everyone organized and moving at the right times throughout the day. I highly recommend her to anyone looking!
-Danielle B
author: Danielle Beland

body: I hired EZ Occassions to help decorate the tent for our wedding. Karina and her team did such a wonderful job setting up the atmosphere for our tent! I loved the lighting and could not be more pleased with the outcome! Simple, elegant, amazing work. I would 100% recommend.
author: Miranda Shao-Davis

body: EZ-Occasions was hands down the best choice for our tent draping and lighting for our September 2023 wedding at Eiola Mansion at Harkness. Karina was great to work with, quick to respond and very pleasant. They are the PROS for lighting and draping at Harkness! We showed up and it was all ready to go and beautiful! Our wedding was like a fairy tale under the tent, absolutely gorgeous! Would hire them again, hands down.
author: Meaghan Melesko

body: As a very particular and picky wedding planner, I can confidently say, working with Karina is always the best. She is quick to respond, honest about her opinion and the overall experience with her company compared to other lighting and drapery companies is truly amazing overall! Her draping is incredible quality and always looks better than others we have worked with. Her lighting is always spectacular. If you're considering EZ Occasions HIRE THEM. You're welcome. : )
author: Sarah Brehant

body: Karina and her team visited our site and created a vision for our celebration that we never could have asked for. She is smart, personable, friendly and knows her stuff! For us, she turned a gymnasium into a banquet hall for 200 guests. The transformation was so stunning that our friends will be talking about it for years to come. We highly recommend working with EZ Occasions for any banquet/special occasion needs. Thank you Karina and all of your crew. You made our night!
author: Elena

body: Karina from EZ-Occasions was so, so great to work with! She was super responsive and easy to work with! Our lighting was so beautiful and I’m grateful that she was one of our many amazing vendors!
author: Josephine Eugene

body: I highly recommend Joe, he is absolutely wonderful to work with.  I couldn't be happier with our decision to have him capture such special moments of our lives.  He has such an artistic eye, and calming but funny way about him.  He captured our engagement photos, mini-wedding, and we're looking forward to having him photograph our reception next June.  We have gotten so many compliments on our pictures, and several of our friends and family wanted to know who we used.
author: Eva Musumeci

body: Joe was absolutely amazing. My wife and I planned our wedding pre covid. When the world changed, Joe was very easy to work with to change with it. The day of the wedding he was a lifesaver. Both bridal parties were going to Joe for advice and planning and in which he happily obliged. He was truly extraordinary throughout.  His personality really fit right in and had everyone at ease and most times laughing. I received so many compliments on Joe from my guests!  Lastly his photos are gorgeous. We are so very happy with all the shots he took and the quality of the photos. I would recommend Joe to anyone without hesitation!!!!
author: Katrina Perrelli

body: I can’t say enough about Joe, he’s an incredible photographer, bride helper, and human!  Just the absolute best.
author: Dawn Braun

body: I am the mother of the bride.. The wedding was this past weekend, July 9,2016.  Joe was amazing!!!! Everywhere you looked, Joe was there taking a picture through out the wedding ceremony and reception. Joe works alone and does not need an assistant. In addition to the wedding photos, Joe did the engagement pictures in Cape Cod. The engagement pictures were simply gorgeous! I would HIGHLY RECOMMEND JOE!!!!
author: Paula Reis

body:
To start I would like to say I have never had to hire a photographer in my life. This can be very overwhelming and ultimately devastating if you are not happy with your choice. Luckily for my husband and I, that was not the case......I am beyond thrilled with our choice to hire Joe.

All the wedding checklists said we were supposed to have our photographer booked long before we had actually gotten to it. We decided to visit the venue where we were getting married for their bridal show. This was an opportunity to meet vendors that were frequently hired to do Weddings directly at our venue and save us some time and research. It just so happens that Joe was not able to make it but had someone filling in for him and handing out materials to reference. Believe it or not, his boudoir photos that were displayed are what caught my attention. The fact that the photos were not only stunning, but the client looked so comfortable in the pictures and this spoke volumes to me! I do not enjoy being the center of attention and I needed someone who could make me feel amazing aside from the dress, hair and makeup, as well as comfortable! That's where Joe came in.

After going through his photos I noticed that while the lovely couples and their families were stunning, he has a way of catching people at the perfect moment. He had amazing action shots, which to me, shows true professionalism. Many photographers can make someone look good standing still....positioning and posing them. To catch people at a distance and capture their real smiles and facial expressions is priceless! Those pictures mean the world because it captures the true moment and personality of anyone in the photo.
While it was important to me that I liked our photographer, I wanted my now husband to like him too....Let me tell you, they hit it off right away! Joe could totally read my husbands sarcastic smart a** personality and was able to give it right back as if they had been friends forever. Joe fit right in with my friends and family. EVERYONE at one time or another has pulled me aside to tell me how awesome our photographer was even weeks after the wedding.....and that was before they saw any of the final photos. Also, 3 DAYS AFTER THE WEDDING, Joe had our pictures ready to go!!!!! That is unheard of!!! I am still in shock!
Great communication, flexibility, and advice is so much appreciated when you are planning a wedding. If you want one less thing to stress out about during your planning process, you can be confident in hiring Joe. You will not be disappointed!
author: Jill Connor

body: I couldn’t speak more highly of Clare and her amazing team! Clare was my day-of-coordinator for my November wedding which consisted of running the rehearsal, the wedding day, and setting up the ceremony/reception space. Her attention to detail and expertise really helped the planning process and the day-of run so smoothly! I explained to her my vision of the day and she executed perfectly. Not only was she in charge of making sure the day went well, but she also made sure to decorate the entire reception and ceremony spaces! I ordered my own flowers wholesale to save money and all I had to do was make sure the flowers/greenery were trimmed and organized - Clare & team handled the rest. Because of them I was really able to enjoy the entire day without having to worry about logistics. I would choose Completely by Clare  over and over and highly recommend anyone to do the same! Thank you, Clare!!! Xo
author: Catherine Toste

body: We recently hired Clare as a day-of coordinator for our wedding, and couldn't be happier! She was friendly and helpful before hand to make sure we had everything that we needed covered, and checked in with all the other vendors to make sure everything went smoothly. On the day, she showed up early and was hard at work all day getting everything set up to make sure our reception and ceremony were beautiful. We are very glad to have had her!
author: Benjamin Rockwell

body: Clare, Becca, and the team at Completely were absolutely AMAZING to work with! I reached out to Clare and explained what I was looking for (day of wedding coordination) and she worked with me to make sure we had the best day ever! I really could not have done it without them. Highly recommend!!
author: Bri Silva

body: We hired Clare and her team as a day before and day of coordinator for our wedding. As soon as they were hired, Clare reached out to the venue and all of the vendors.  She and her team thought of many items we would have forgotten regarding decor and other day of details.  Thank you for making our wedding day seamless and beautiful!
author: Sarah Siconolfi

body:
Clare and team were great! Months and weeks prior to the wedding she was very commutative and answered all our questions and got a good understanding as to what we envisioned for our special day. Two weeks prior to the wedding, she also kindly drove down to see where our wedding was taking place to get a good understanding and feel for space. Additionally, she also provided a detailed timeline to us (which included all the vendors) and was super helpful to have the day of.

The day of the wedding, Clare and her assistant wore many hats and filled in wherever needed while also moving the day and evening along. She was a great person to work with! Would highly recommend! Thank you, Completely LLC!
author: Skarlyn Rodriguez

body:
Just want to refresh this 2 years later and Debra is still the best place to buy flowers in CT.

I have been using Tulip’s for sending flowers to my wife at work, and the experience has been nothing short of fantastic. The arrangements are not only stunning but also have an incredible longevity that sets them apart.

My wife absolutely loves each bouquet she receives. The attention to detail in the selection and arrangement of flowers is evident, making every delivery a delightful surprise for her. The blooms stay fresh and vibrant for an impressively long time, bringing joy to her workspace.

The customer service at Tulip’s is exceptional. They take the time to understand preferences and offer personalized recommendations, creating a truly tailored experience. The prompt and reliable delivery service adds an extra layer of convenience to the overall process.

I highly recommend Tulips at WatersEdge for anyone looking to make a lasting impression with beautiful, long-lasting flowers. Their passion for floral artistry and commitment to customer satisfaction shine through in every arrangement.

Kudos to the team for consistently exceeding expectations!
author: Douglas Gingrave

body: Deb did an amazing job on my flowers for my wedding on 10/9/22. People still talk about how beautiful the flowers looked. She is so creative and knows what she is doing. She was a pleasure to work with and I highly recommend for any event!
author: Katelyn Manning

body: First time ordering flowers from here and had super fast delivery. They came out absolutely stunning! My mother was speechless at how beautiful they are! Highly recommend!
author: Jen Forte

body: Words cannot express the gratitude I have for this florist. I learned about Tulips less than 48 hours before my two retreats I was hosting at Watersedge. I appreciated their honesty about their constraints due to having over three weddings to take care of during the same time but also about what they were able to do within those constraints. I gave them a budget and details about each of my guests for inspiration and they NAILED it!! I was so greatful to Tulips for not only putting these beautiful creations together but also delivering them to my villa at Watersedge. It made me and my retreat guests feel EXTREMELY special. Thank you!! ❤️
author: Tawanna Marie Woolfolk, LCSW

body: Highly recommended.  We had placed an order for flowers for a funeral service and the online company cancelled it at 4:30 the evening before.  I️ called Tulips at Water’s Edge about 5 minutes before they closed and they came through and had it delivered the next morning in time for the service.  Thank you so much!!!  Great customer service.
author: John McClellan

body:
We had a lovely Fall wedding at the Providence Athenaeum. Everything about it went better than we could have ever hoped, and that was in no small part thanks to Nicole Marcelle. We had originally found her work on Instagram after looking for a wedding photographer, and we were impressed with her creative style and eye for detail. We knew immediately that she could create beautiful momentos of our special day that we could share with family and friends and that we could treasure forever.

Working with Nicole has exceeded all of our expectations. She was very communicative and responsive, and she even provided valuable scheduling and logistic advice for the big day. We totally could not have done it without her! Nicole first suggested that we do an engagement shoot as a preliminary meeting and to become more familiar with the process. It could not have gone more comfortably, and she quickly returned a beautiful portfolio of that day that is truly meaningful to us. She even gave us some pointers on how to pose for photographs!

Nicole's extensive wedding experience and can-do personality really shined on the big day. She knew everything about how to get the important shots and how to blend in the background to capture all of the important events. It's amazing just how many pictures, poses, and people she was able to get, though now it seems like such a blur!

We can't say enough that our wedding day would not have been nearly as successful without Nicole. Not only did she leave us a collection of photographs that we will treasure forever -- photographs that are the constant envy of family, friends, and even catering companies -- but her enthusiasm and professionalism was instrumental in making the day run smoothly. We cannot recommend Nicole enough for weddings or any special occasion.
author: Brian Bartling

body: We couldn’t have asked for a better wedding photographer than Nicole! From the moment we met her, she made us feel so comfortable and at ease. Her talent is beyond amazing, and she truly captured every special moment of our day in such a beautiful and authentic way. Nicole really took the time to understand our vision, and she brought it to life even better than we could have imagined. Not only did we find an incredible photographer, but we also gained a wonderful friend. Nicole will forever be our photographer for all the major events in our lives, and we can’t recommend her enough!
author: Alexandra Pelt

body: Nicole is the best of the best! My husband & I wish we could give her ten stars for this rating!! We were fortunate to work with Nicole for our engagement photos, and she is the most talented, creative, and compassionate photographer we have ever worked with. With Nicole, its like you get a friend and a photographer all in one!! She truly cares about her clients and is just so easy to vibe and work with. We were nervous during our shot and it was rainy but she quickly put us at ease. She is very attentive to detail and just has an eye that makes photos come out so chic and beautiful. Nicole's editing is also so special she truly captures the vibes you are looking for!! Thank you Nicole, we will always appreciate these photos xoxo
author: Dayanara Cruz

body: My experience working with Nicole was wonderful. She is hilarious, attentive, and will make you feel so comfortable in front of the camera if you are not used to taking professional photos. I picked Nicole as my wedding photographer because I wanted natural light photos and her style was something that interested me. She noticed that the time of my wedding would not allow natural light photography and notified me as soon as she could so I was able to tell the venue and get the time of our wedding changed. If Nicole did not say anything I would not have gotten the style of photos that she is known for and that I so desperately wanted. She is truly amazing and has such a great personality that will keep you happy and comfortable all day. Her prices are beyond reasonable in my opinion compared to the other quotes I received and I really felt that she had my best interest at heart throughout the whole planning process.
author: Samantha Collins

body:
Nicole was recommended to me by a friend, who had used her for their own wedding. After seeing their photos, we were impressed by her work. Reaching out to Nicole was super easy, and she was incredibly responsive. Since we don’t live in the same state, she set up a Zoom call for us to chat and get to know each other. We immediately clicked. Nicole also sent over additional examples of her work, which gave us a better understanding of her style. Every photo was stunning, and it was clear she knows how to capture the essence of each wedding she photographs.

After meeting with her and seeing her work firsthand, we knew she was the right choice for our wedding. She also offered to do our engagement photos, and we couldn’t have been happier with the results. We used them for our "Save the Date" cards.

Before the wedding, we met with Nicole to go over the details of how she works and discuss our expectations. On the day of the wedding, she was the epitome of professionalism. She took the time to learn the names of all our family members and was excellent at directing people for group shots. She was also fantastic with the kids. Our photos turned out beautifully, and our wedding day was truly memorable, thanks in large part to Nicole. She has a special talent for making people who are uncomfortable with posing (like me) feel at ease. She knows exactly how to capture the perfect shots and poses. She captures candid moments so beautifully that the photos feel alive, making you feel as though you're right back in that moment.

We couldn’t be more thrilled with how everything turned out. I highly recommend Nicole for your wedding or any event that needs a talented photographer. Thank you again, Nicole!
author: James Mancino

body: Baystate brought our wedding vision to life! We were planning our wedding from the ground up, and Samantha and her team were an integral part of making our big day as seamless and wonderful as it was. Samantha was communicative, patient, knowledgeable, and above and beyond helpful as we worked towards figuring out exactly what we needed for our seemingly ever-growing event! Everything was delivered on time, set up promptly, and all rentals were exactly as described! It was amazing to watch our empty field transform into the beautiful wedding space it was. I would choose Baystate Tent again in a heartbeat, and I would recommend them to anyone planning an outdoor event, wedding or otherwise!
author: Marshall and Beth

body: We rented our tent, table and chairs though Baystate for our wedding and I cant recommend them enough! I worked with Samantha and she was so helpful from start to finish -  she was always willing to give advice for tent size, dance floor etc and the time she spent with me on layouts once we had all of our RSVP's in made things so much less stressful. When it came time for them to set up all of the rentals it really was a smooth process. The gentlemen that did the set up were awesome and everything was rented was just as described. A fantastic experience!
author: Samantha Devaney

body: Bay State Tent is so great to work with. I have been using them for the past few years. I always order tables and chairs for an event we hold the day before Thanksgiving and there is never an issue. They keep good records so I don't have to second guess if I am ordering enough or too little. They are so friendly, their online system is so easy to use, and deliver on time every time with ease and a smile on their faces!
author: Marquis Tree Service

body: If you are looking for everything you need to put together your event, Bay State Tent is the place! Everything starts with their professional, helpful, responsive, customer centered staff - like Vicky in sales and continues throughout the process with people like Sean in dispatch - just to name two of the amazing people on the team. Our concert event involved multiple large tents, one of which covered a baseball outfield! For a very reasonable cost, we had a seamless set-up, break down and everything we needed to host an event for over one thousand people. Everyone at our event remarked on how impressed they were by the tents and amazed to hear how easily we worked with Bay State Tent.
author: Melinda

body: We love Baystate!!!  Easy to work with, very prompt, and all around great people!
author: Consider It Done Special Events

body:
Entertainment Nation is the most incredible and professional entertainment/DJ company I have experienced. My family and I used them for my mom's celebration of life and they were nothing less than excellent. Billy & Michael made us feel like we knew them our entire life - and were very good at reading the room. They were quiet and somber when those moments were ongoing and they opened the floor for karaoke at the end of the night when we really wanted to celebrate my mom in the best way she knew.

I was so taken back by their professionalism, outgoing and wonderful services that I actually cancelled my original wedding DJ and am now using them.

Greg is amazing and takes the time to get to know you and listen to what you want. He makes it happen. If I could give 100 stars I would.

If you are looking for a sign to use Entertainment Nation THIS IS IT!!
author: Michaela MacArthur

body: Entertainment Nation is Great! Greg and Maria are so professional and truly care about their business and making sure their customers are happy with their services they provide. Maria has been hosting Trivia with us for about a year now and continues to bring back a great crowd to our restaurant. Highly recommend!
author: Bell Inn Manager

body:
Entertainment Nation was great from booking, to set up, to party to wrap up!
We booked music bingo for my sister’s baby shower and it was a total hit! Our DJ Mike was great. We will absolutely use Gregory and his team again for other events!
author: kayla grealish

body:
We couldn't have asked for a better DJ for our wedding! Greg was exceptional from start to finish. His communication throughout the planning process was outstanding - he responded quickly to all our messages and really took the time to understand exactly what we wanted.

What really stood out was Greg's genuine care and dedication to making our wedding A+. When there was initially some confusion about a detail on his website, he went above and beyond to resolve it. He thoughtfully walked us through everything, offered to speak with our family to ensure everyone was comfortable, and handled the situation with utmost professionalism.

During the reception, his music selection and timing were perfect. He read the room beautifully and kept our guests dancing. His friendly personality and enthusiasm were infectious, and several of our guests commented on how great he was.

Greg is clearly passionate about what he does, and it shows in every aspect of his service. I would absolutely recommend him to any couple looking for a wedding DJ who will go the extra mile to make their day special. Without a doubt, he deserves every bit of this 5-star review.
author: Fiet Spad

body: We booked the EntertainmentNation for our wedding. From the start Greg was friendly, easy to work with and flexible. We received many compliments about the music, the volume of music, and the Photo Booth (which was very easy to use). He and His team didn't miss a single cue whether it was for ceremony or for formalities. The dance floor was alive all night long, and as the Bride all requests were verified by me (this was my asking). Book these guys, they are professionals, their dj booth looked great, and we had the time of our lives!
author: Meagan Cianci

body:
We recently returned from an unforgettable family vacation to Hawaii, thanks to the incredible work of our travel agent, Brian!

Planning a trip for a family of six—including children ranging from toddlers to teens—can be overwhelming, but he made the entire process seamless and enjoyable from start to finish.
Brian took the time to really understand our family’s needs, interests, and budget. Every detail was thoughtfully considered—from flights and accommodations to kid-friendly excursions and downtime built into the itinerary.  We especially appreciated his responsiveness and flexibility—always quick to answer questions, make last-minute adjustments, or offer helpful local tips. Thanks to Brian, we were able to truly relax and enjoy our time in paradise, knowing that everything was taken care of.

We wouldn’t hesitate to recommend him to anyone planning a family vacation. We’re already thinking about our next trip and will definitely be using Brian again!

Mahalo for the memories!
author: Robyn and Loren Estabrook

body: Booked a trip to DR through Brian.  He did a great job through the whole process.  From helping to select a destination to the booking  and all the way through until our day of departure.  We didn’t have to worry about a thing, Brian took care of everything, even the smallest of details.
author: Carl Gibeau

body: Brian has booked two trip for our family so far. We traveled to Disneyworld and Disneyland. Both trips were fantastic due to his careful planning, knowledge of both parks and character dining. I can’t recommend him highly enough! He is kind, knowledgable and extremely responsive to email and phone calls. He even thought about other information we may need for the trip. Our trips were perfect- thank you to his planning!!
author: Katie McCarty

body: This was our first time working with Brian and he was amazing.   He was always available to answer our questions and he made out anniversary trip stress free.
author: Sean Martin

body:
We had the absolute pleasure of having DJ Manolo from ECF Entertainment at our wedding on November 3rd at Flag Hill, and he was incredible! I first met him at an event at the same venue, which gave me so much confidence knowing he was already familiar with the space. He was kind, professional, and attentive to every detail my husband and I wanted, from playing my favorite West Coast tracks to ensuring the music reflected us perfectly. He even included the kids at our wedding by letting them be “guest DJs,” creating unforgettable memories for them and their families.

DJ Manolo’s energy was contagious, and he had everyone on the dance floor while keeping the focus on us as a couple. He was inclusive, interactive, and truly brought our celebration to life. If you’re looking for a DJ who is professional, fun, and full of heart, we highly recommend DJ Manolo—he made our wedding day unforgettable🤍
author: Alexandria Barrett

body: DJ Shyne (Jeff) absolutely crushed it at our wedding! His laser focus to detail, communication, and passion for music makes for one of the best people to work with for your wedding. We never had a doubt Jeff would make this wedding an absolute party! Our guests never left the dance floor once we started and the energy went right to 11pm. Thank you Jeff, truly a master of your craft!
author: Marc Paradise

body: We had a great experience with DJ Jay Tori (OJ) from E.C.F. for our wedding! The process was simple and price was very reasonable. DJ Jay Tori had almost all of our guests out on the dance floor throughout the reception. Even though the groom and I did not imagine we'd do much dancing ourselves, we were out there with everyone the whole time! We also used E.C.F.'s photo booth services, which went very smoothly as well.
author: Nicole Aaron

body:
Dj Mike. What can I say, he was amazing went above and beyond! We were on a mission to find a bilingual dj for our wedding in Wolfeboro NH. Mike was perfect for us he was able to MC the entire night to our guest in Spanish and English so everyone knew what was going on. He also read the room so well the dance floor was always so busy! Dancing was starting even before dinner, it was such a blast. Mike helped me mix 2 songs for my father daughter dance too during our wedding planning.

Thank you guys so much!
author: Victoria & Alejandro Ruiz

body: We spent a lot of time researching DJs for our August '24 wedding in Newport, RI. As a couple, we knew out of all the vendors, entertainment was such a priority for us. (you can't dance to flowers lol).WE CANNOT SAY ENOUGH GOOD THINGS ABOUT ECF AND DJ MANOLO!!!!! Jeff is so professional and responds to everything timely and with ease.  DJ Manolo, from the moment we met with him on our initial meeting, it just clicked. His energy is unmatched. It is so evident that not only is he incredible at what he does, but he is so passionate and truly in a good mood ALL THE TIME. I had a lot of requests for Manolo, and he delivered!!! Through the planning process, he not only became our BOY but he really started to feel like family. It was so fun meeting him in person on the day of the wedding and his energy was next level. He hyped us tf up. He is such a cool dude and NOT corny at all like other DJs. We added on some uplighting which was dope. (highly recommend this over an abundance of flowers bc these lights bring the vibes). DJ Manolo helped us to curate the most meaningful playlist for the ceremony, cocktail hour, and reception. He gets us. We had a absolute blast raging with him. We paired DJ Manolo with Joe Sax from Boston and the two of them also clicked and worked so well tg. The dance floor was packed , playing all our fav tunes. DJ MANOLO, you are our HOMIE our BOY our BROTHA and WE FREAKING LOVE YOU. Thanks for the best time, WE ALL HAD THE TIME OF OUR LIVES!!!!!!! Much love, Gina and Paul D'Anneo
author: Gina Balestrieri

body: I had an unforgettable experience! They welcomed me warmly and were eager to accommodate my needs. The lingerie was absolutely beautiful, and I felt at home from the beginning to the end. The way they set up everything was perfect. After the session, when I saw the pictures, my initial reaction was, "Is this really me? This is impossible!" It inspired me to feel confident and comfortable in my own skin. I'm truly grateful to the photographer and the cheerleader; I enjoyed the entire session.
author: Jamaal Johnson

body:
I've had 2 AMAZING sessions with Janae! My first session I remember walking out feeling on top of the world. I had just moved in with my then boyfriend, now husband, and to this day I still pull the pictures up and am in complete awe with myself.

My 2nd session I did at 36 weeks pregnant. I waited as long as I possibly could so I would have a nice big bump and I will never not recommend doing a maternity boudoir shoot. Everything from having my hair and make up done to getting to select from Janae's amazing wardrobe of lingerie, it was the best experience and everything I had hoped it would be. Lauren and Janae were amazing at coaching through different poses and helping figure out ways to be more comfortable in each pose. The only thing I regret is not buying the biggest package!

If you need a confidence boost, want to feel sexier than you already are, need some self love, or just want to express yourself in some lingerie, I will forever recommend Janae anytime someone brings up wanting boudoir pictures done.
author: Kacey Vicino

body: Recently participated in my second mini session with Janae & Lauren! It was a mini shoot for Valentine's Day! This time my daughter participated as well! As usual Janae & Lauren made me feel super comfortable! I feel so sexy and comfortable in my skin when I'm in their studio! I'm telling you know matter your body size everyone is welcome! We only get one life to live! Embrace your body!  They are super friendly and funny! I love The Amour Vixen!
author: Malika Edwards

body: Janae and Lauren are an amazing duo! I went in super nervous because I haven’t been in front of a camera in a long time but they quickly made me feel comfortable and confident. Hayley is phenomenal with her makeup skills and achieves exactly what you want. The entire experience is exactly what I needed!
author: Molly Hiller

body:
I recently had the most incredible photo session with Janae, and I cannot recommend it enough! From start to finish, the experience was nothing short of amazing.

First, the talented hair and makeup artist did an absolutely flawless job. My look was so perfectly put together—it felt like I had stepped out of a magazine. She took the time to understand exactly what I wanted and truly made me feel like the best version of myself.

The wardrobe selection in the client closet was beyond impressive. There were so many beautiful options in a wide range of styles, colors, and sizes. Whether youre looking for something romantic, classic, or a little more spicy, they have it all! I was able to pick out pieces that not only fit perfectly but also made me feel amazing.

What truly set this experience apart was how Janae and Lauren made me feel. From the moment I walked in, they were so warm, welcoming, and professional. They encouraged me every step of the way and helped me feel comfortable and confident in front of the camera. For someone who usually doesn't love how they look in pictures, I was absolutely stunned by the final images. I couldn't believe how amazing I looked! The photo viewing session was such a surreal moment—I felt like I was seeing a completely new version of myself.

I would absolutely encourage every woman to book a session. Whether you want to celebrate yourself or just have a fun and empowering experience, this is something you need to do. Trust me, it’s an experience you won’t forget!
author: Kate S

body: If you are looking for the best wedding or general photographer, look no further than Danyel DeBoise Photography. We hired Danyel for our wedding in October 2023 and she went above and beyond all our expectations. From the very beginning, Danyel was the best to work with. She answered emails and all questions quickly, was very professional, so easy to work with and has a great personality that makes everything so fun. Leading up to the wedding we had an engagement session with Danyel which was amazing. She went through the key phrases she was going to say on wedding day and truly made us feel comfortable so that on wedding day we could just relax. The engagement session photos came out incredible. Then the wedding was a top-notch experience as well! Danyel and her second photographer Christine did an unbelievable job capturing all the photos we wanted and then also photos that were natural and not planned. We had a massive wedding party which is nerve-racking for photos but everything went so smooth and perfectly. I highly recommend Danyel DeBoise Photography, you will not regret booking her I promise!
author: Mackenzie Merrick

body: 10/10 recommend going with Danyel to capture your special day! Danyel was very quick to respond to any questions we had and she was super helpful. She caught all of the moments we wanted and more for our wedding! We happened to have had a flurry of snow the night of our wedding and Danyel was right on getting us some amazing shots in the snow. Our wedding was 11/26/21 and Danyel got us our sneak peak collages about a week after our wedding, and our full gallery the week of Christmas. We were so impressed with how quick she provided us with our full gallery and how amazing the pictures turned out! Danyel is amazing to work with!
author: Lisa Cabral

body: Danyel was AMAZING she made me and my husband feel so comfortable in front of the camera. She made sure to captures all the special moments of our day and even recorded a couple TikTok’s of me and my bridesmaids! She made the day so much fun! Her work is truly amazing and I would highly recommend her to anyone. I am looking forward to booking with her again in the future for other needs. Thank you Danyel and your assistant Jess for making our wedding day something we can forever remember.
author: Catherine Meyers

body: I can't begin to explain how amazing Danyel was to work with. She made us feel so comfortable and at ease during both our engagement shoot and our wedding. The photos speak for themselves when it comes to what a great photographer she is. She's extremely quick at getting the photos back and very communicative when it comes to any questions we had. I couldn't have asked for a better photographer to capture our day!
author: Lauren LeBarron

body: Best of the best! Danyel will literally stand in the middle of the street in the city downtown to test the wind direction and get the absolute most perfect shot. We could not be more thrilled with all of the pictures, both engagement session and wedding day, Danyel took. She is extremely professional yet relatable and oh so kind! She not only delivered gorgeous stunning pictures, she essentially ran the timeline of my wedding night and I could not be more grateful for all of her help. We absolutely adore her and would recommend 1000x over! Thank you Danyel!
author: Julie Iavicoli

body:
We had the 2 best drivers in and out of Black Falcon Pier, Seaport for a cruise to Bermuda!!
On time, professional and was an overall enjoyable ride!! Easy reservations!
5 Stars!!
author: Lee MacDonald

body: We had a very long, delay-full series of flights last night and ended up landing at Logan after 3am. Cheers to Brooke, our amazing A-Plus driver who waited hours to pick us up and bring us home. Over and over, A-Plus has taken care of our family going to and from airports. They are on time, day or night, rain or snow, and always exceed our expectations! Thanks again Brooke.
author: Scott Semel

body: Booked A plus coach for my brothers wedding and our driver George was early which was appreciated. He was very nice and helpful. Steve was also very helpful with booking and ensured all pickup and drop off locations were accurate. 10/10 service they are great and the communication is phenomenal!
author: Evanjuline Elisma

body: Jackie, our driver, was amazing!  He was early for the pick up. As this was a surprise for my daughter, we really didn’t have a plan. Decided last minute to go to Boston.  Jackie was so accommodating with a “no problem” response.  He brought us to 3 different locations.  Whenever we called to ask to get picked up, he was so kind and always said “of course, not a problem”.  Considering we had 6 teenage girls singing their hearts out (loud), he just was amazing.   We got a call from the owner asking how our night was, which was above and beyond.  The Sprinter Limo was clean, filled with water, and the AC was on, ready for us!  I highly recommend A Plus Coach and will always call them whenever we need a limo!  My daughter was so surprised and we all had a great day, thanks to Jackie and A Plus Coach!
author: Wendy Hutchins

body: Steve was an amazing driver. He assured us our kids would be safe and he texted me throughout the night to update us. Told us when they arrived and let us know when he was heading home with them. He supplied waters for the ride and the kids all said he was kind and personable all night! The Limo looked brand new! It was so great to not have to worry about prom kicking off a long Memorial Day Weekend. Thank you Steve And A Plus Coach!
author: Creative World

body: Tiny Loaf is a new company that sells just that—-tiny loaves such as banana bread, carrot cake, and lemon poppyseed bread.They are scrumptious and perfect for gifts for birthdays or for major events like baby showers or weddings. I just tried the new winter flavor Choco-Mint Cheer and it is delicious. I plan to order more to send friends and family this Christmas.
author: Anne Lewis

body: Absolutely delicious!!! My favorites are the banana bread and lemon loaf. Convenient shipping options, and the owner is a quick and effective communicator. Highly recommend!
author: Willie Biddings

body: Kimberly was wonderful to work with and so accommodating. Everyone who received the loaves loved them. And the price is right! A+++
author: Steven Greenberg

body: PERFECTION! These little loaves are so well made, keeping nostalgia at the heart of the bake while elevating the flavors. Highly recommend!!!
author: Hanna Brucker

body: Delicious little quick breads - awesome snacks treats and gifts!
author: Angela Kelly

body: This was my first time working with Veronica on a personal project, but we’ve already collaborated on four client events and have another one coming up this year. She is always the first person I recommend. Veronica is not just an incredible makeup artist. She is also a licensed esthetician, which means she brings a deeper understanding of how to care for skin in a way that feels gentle, thoughtful, and luxurious. She knows how to work with every skin tone and every face, and she has this amazing way of making people feel truly beautiful and seen. My couples love her. My clients love her. I love working with her. She brings calm, warmth, and so much talent to every experience. Honestly, if you get the chance to work with Veronica, take it.
author: Dominique Holliday

body: Veronica was exceptional to work with for my wedding day! I was so worried about having a make up artist understand my need for minimal makeup and she made all my worries melt away. At my trial, she made sure I loved my look, and also felt comfortable as well. My entire bridal party has been raving about how amazing of a makeup artist I found. Not only did she do amazing work, the makeup lasted the night through many many happy tears. She even gave me a customized touch up kit for the evening to make sure I felt beautiful all night long. If you’re looking for a makeup artist who really listens to you, this is the girl to hire! She helped make my day perfect!
author: Sarah Martin

body: Veronica is one of the sweetest souls I've had the pleasure of meeting! She made the morning of my wedding so incredibly relaxing and I even went into a trance with the facial massage she gave me. I cannot thank her enough for starting the day off so well and for being an awesome ear when I needed some vendor advice. If you ever need makeup services, go to Veronica. She's an absolute gem!
author: Gabriella Bennett

body: Veronica is an amazing makeup artist and was extremely professional and well-organized vendor for our wedding (which we celebrated at Hawthorne Hotel, this past January). From the early planning stages, the 'day of' timeline she created, my bridal trial and the perfect natural look that I was looking for, she was exceptional! She came so prepared on the day of and was such a great and calming person to work with. Everything went absolutely seamless and I was again, so happy with the natural/glowing look and SUCH A GREAT JOB on my lashes! Thanks so much Veronica! Highly, highly recommend!
author: Jennifer Banks

body: Veronica was an absolute dream to have as our makeup artist for our wedding! All my girls absolutely LOVED her, my bridal makeup was absolutely perfect, I felt so beautiful. She really took the time to make sure everything was perfect, her communication was phenomenal and her super sweet friendly demeanor put everyone at ease on such a busy morning. I cannot recommend her high enough- book Veronica to make your wedding makeup everything you dreamed- just like she did for me 💕
author: Kaelyn Bamford

body: Paula and Dan are AMAZING!!!! They did our engagement and wedding photos! My husband is someone who doesn't like to smile in pictures but they captured him looking so happy!! I'm plus sized and i usually hate how I look in pictures. They made me feel comfortable getting my picture taken and the images they captured are BEAUTIFUL and STUNNING!!! They were so GREAT with our nieces and nephews! I am in awe of their work and am so grateful they took our pictures. I will be using Luz Photography for everything I need pictures of. Thank you Paula and Dan for always going above and beyond!
author: Crissy Raymond

body:
Paula and Dan did an excellent job at photographing our wedding, and engagement photos. Paula is responsive and a lot of fun. Guests even told us she was great!
She got our photos to us way sooner than we were expecting! I can't stop looking at them.
author: Sara Greene

body: I have worked with Paula on many occasions at this point, but this last photo session might take the cake on them all. I asked Paula to take photos of my son after he earned his black belt and she delivered an incredible gallery that I will treasure forever. Not only did she make my 8 year old feel comfortable, special and confident, but she worked hard to “get the shot” when he requested to do a flying side kick. So grateful for these photos and for this overall experience with Paula. My song loves “Miss Paula” and we are so excited to share these photos with friends and family and display them with such pride! Thanks so much for helping us create a frozen moment in time and for all your hard work behind the scenes to make it happen!
author: Marisa Paradis

body: Paula and Dan are absolutely wonderful! They were so fun to work with and they have such talent to capture just the perfect shots. Their personalities made them feel like friends immediately! Highly recommend and will 100x over. Thank you Paula and Dan so so much!
author: Sydney Marshall

body: Had my daughter’s newborn session with Paula the week she came home. Paula and her colleague were exceptional. Funny, kind, talented, caring, gentle. Made my husband actually laugh and smile for the pictures which was wonderful! The photos of our baby girl are so special it was so worth it doing this. I have beautiful keepsake photos forever. Her studio is very cozy and clean. Our full newborn session was very comfortable there. Can’t wait to go back for our second baby’s! Thank you Paula.
author: Daschia Bahler

body: My husband and I worked with Teresa on our engagement shoot and our wedding ( I also worked with her on a styled photoshoot, where I first met her). She is not only a phenomenal photographer, she is also a wonderful, kind, and amazing person. When you book with Teresa it right away feels like you are working with a close friend you've had for your whole life. She made us feel comfortable during our engagement shoot (which was a surprise to me right after I got proposed to!) as people who were not used to being in front of the camera. She kept in touch throughout the wedding planning process and helps create a seamless timeline for the day of. She is such a light and a joy to communicate with during wedding planning, it really was stress-free working with her, and both Teresa and her team were incredible to work with the day of our wedding! I highly recommend Teresa to anyone who is getting married and/or is looking for engagement photos. You can really tell that she is passionate about her job and loves what she does! I couldn't thank her enough for our beautiful photos that we will cherish forever!
author: Mary & Mike Zeranski

body: Teresa Johnson Photography was one of the greatest decisions we made for our wedding day. Since first meeting Teresa over zoom back in 2020, we knew immediately we made the best choice. Teresa is so kind and thoughtful as she cares so much about each of her clients. When we did our engagement shoot with her before our wedding, she made the experience so fun and relaxing. The pictures turned out amazing! On our wedding day, we had the pleasure of having Michelle and Katherine being our photographers and they were just as outstanding as Teresa. They captured everything we wanted and more. The pictures are so timeless and beautiful and everyone has been so impressed! We cannot thank Teresa and her team enough for capturing everything about our big day.  It would not have been the same without them!!
author: Jackie O

body: Teresa!! Working with Teresa for our wedding was such a great experience. She is kind, organized, talented, and thoughtful. She did an amazing job balancing the need for efficient scheduling and adherence to a timeline with deep empathy and care for our wedding day. Ultimately, the day ran smoothly, and we have such amazing photos to show for it -- both thanks to Teresa. If you have the opportunity to work with her, do it! You won't regret it.
author: Noah Weingart

body: Absolutely recommend Teresa Johnson for all any photography needs!!! My husband and I got married this past summer and Teresa was with us at every step of the way! Working with Teresa was easy, comfortable, and truly a great experience. Teresa listened and made sure that our needs and preferences for how the day would be met and her team did not disappoint! Not once did we feel uncomfortable when working with Teresa and her team. She was highly organized, reliable, and friendly to work with. AND THE PHOTOS!! I can’t express how amazing the photos are as we were blown away by how beautiful they turned out. You don’t realize how much the photos mean until you have them, and man…I am so grateful for the beautiful memories captured. Thank you so so much, Teresa and to the rest of your team!
author: Kat M

body: Teresa Johnson Photography did SUCH an AMAZING job with our wedding photos!!! From both of our engagement sessions to our wedding day, Teresa was in contact with us making sure we were set with anything we needed. She made us feel welcomed, heard, loved and so much more working with her! Everyone is always nervous to take pictures but she made the nerves go away with how funny and friendly she is. Our pictures turned out AMAZING!! One reason we chose Teresa Johnson Photography was because of how vibrant the photos look when you receive your gallery. The quality of the photos is crystal clear, the turn around is the quickest I’ve heard of, and they even send your whole gallery to you in color AND black and white. We HIGHLY recommend Teresa Johnson Photography for all of your photo needs!! They are the BEST!!
author: Rachelle Brine
